name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch: Records from DC Metropolitan Police Reveal New Information and Questions about U.S. Capitol Police Shooting of Unarmed Ashli Babbitt
body:
Babbitt was shot and killed as she climbed through a broken interior window in the United State Capitol.

| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56905&L=26034&F=H&) | **[DHS Ends Worksite Enforcement Operations to Protect “Noncitizen Victims” from Deportation](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56905&L=26034&F=H&)** In a major policy shift to help illegal immigrants in the U.S. workforce, the Biden administration is ordering the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) to end mass worksite enforcement operations that often result in large-scale arrests and deportations of undocumented employees. The administration is also directing agencies that operate under DHS, which was created after 9/11 to counter terrorism, secure borders and uphold the nation’s economic security, to protect foreigners working in the country illegally by shielding them from removal proceedings when they get caught. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56905&L=26034&F=H&)

| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56905&L=26035&F=H&) | **[Targeting Trump: Durham Uncovers New Clinton, FBI Connections in Russia Probe](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56905&L=26035&F=H&)** The wheels of justice grind slow—much to the exasperation of, well, everybody. In April 2019, Attorney General William Barr appointed federal prosecutor John Durham to get to the bottom of the Russia mess: the sensational allegations, both before and after Donald Trump’s November 2016 presidential election victory, of Trump connections to dirty Russian money, dirty players, and dirty deeds. ### [Judicial Watch Obtains CRT Teacher Training Guide For Westerly, Rhode Island ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56905&L=26036&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvanctY3J0LXRyYWluaW5nLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTEwMTkwMDIxNDM=) Legal Insurrection We don’t teach Critical Race Theory! But how dare you try to stop us from teaching what we don’t teach!

That’s pretty much the argument you will find at almost all school districts. As explained a gazillion times, you will not find a third-grade book called Critical Race Theory. Instead, you find the race-focused principles of CRT under other names, such as “antiracism,” “equity,” and “culturally responsive learning.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56905&L=26036&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvanctY3J0LXRyYWluaW5nLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTEwMTkwMDIxNDM=)

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: We can *all* feel the stakes of this election, and this moment.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
The stakes have never been higher for working families.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20211018-3070-header&t=1&akid=3070%2E434096%2ErLPsq_)
We’ve got a tough reality confronting us, Peter. Democrats are facing an uphill road to the 2022 election.
Just like John, you probably care deeply about the future of Pennsylvania + our U.S. Senate Democratic majority.
Whether you’re a local volunteer who has been working on campaigns since the 90s, or someone who is tuning into federal politics for the first time this year, we can *all* feel the stakes of this election, and this moment.
**It's not an exaggeration that, without the proper resources to fight for Senate seats like ours in PA, Democrats could outright lose our majority.**
[****](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33376?refcode=em20211018-3070&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3070%2E434096%2ErLPsq_)
John Fetterman is in this race because the stakes over the last decade have only increased for working families, for the state of our climate crisis, and for our rights — from voting to protections for LGBTQIA+ people — that have been the product of decade and century long fights.
**[We know you’re in it with us, Peter, which is why we’ll be honest with you at every step of the way along this campaign. And right now — we’re looking at tough odds, and we’ve come too far to turn back now. It would mean the world to our entire team if you would choose to make a $5 donation to our campaign today.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33376?refcode=em20211018-3070&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3070%2E434096%2ErLPsq_)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33376?refcode=em20211018-3070&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=3070%2E434096%2ErLPsq_)**
You heard it, Peter. _"Democrats have virtually no room for error in 2022."_
**John’s been there with this movement every step of the way. From Mayor, to Lieutenant Governor, and now as your candidate for U.S. Senate, these numbers only cause us to double-down on our commitment, not shy away.**
**[You can join John in his commitment to flipping this seat blue with a contribution of $5 to our campaign today. Anything you can afford will help us overcome these odds and add another loud voice for working families to Washington.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33376?refcode=em20211018-3070&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=3070%2E434096%2ErLPsq_)**
We couldn’t do it without you, Peter. Thank you for believing in our work and the importance of this movement, whatever the odds.
— Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211018-3070-footer&t=24&refcode2=3070_434096_rLPsq_&akid=3070%2E434096%2ErLPsq_)**

clean_body: The stakes have never been higher for working families. We’ve got a tough reality confronting us, Peter. Democrats are facing an uphill road to the 2022 election. Just like John, you probably care deeply about the future of Pennsylvania + our U.S. Senate Democratic majority. Whether you’re a local volunteer who has been working on campaigns since the 90s, or someone who is tuning into federal politics for the first time this year, we can all feel the stakes of this election, and this moment. It's not an exaggeration that, without the proper resources to fight for Senate seats like ours in PA, Democrats could outright lose our majority. John Fetterman is in this race because the stakes over the last decade have only increased for working families, for the state of our climate crisis, and for our rights — from voting to protections for LGBTQIA+ people — that have been the product of decade and century long fights. You heard it, Peter. "Democrats have virtually no room for error in 2022." John’s been there with this movement every step of the way. From Mayor, to Lieutenant Governor, and now as your candidate for U.S. Senate, these numbers only cause us to double-down on our commitment, not shy away. We couldn’t do it without you, Peter. Thank you for believing in our work and the importance of this movement, whatever the odds. — Team Fetterman | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

subject: She calls herself Trump in heels

body:
and now she’s Glenn Youngkin’s top surrogate. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miV04tp4Fy6FnycaH8AsjDGDuuLh4zQRLC0sRGfrMJYcK2CdXqzryP8d5XIEpdmdK1flxUzJ0oitJx05luJlYHGnkaBPi3ohbccNhg7qv1V3x0NsdVuV0VwQ-VtS_Wri5eTb-FKnXYgZMnlNojBaf-EW8_hBs4f20vlscsgmpQsxVgan45irtpgqZnEEi_eC86whC4Y10NTA7TIm-SrU0J0e9N4G6cHWwoBdLX7X1N35Vr8Exesm8jzYI7Tn42Petw21877FmJ31Tw-uagabgxI2Hco_Bmv_AUyOIM3DqhKeW5Mljd6Wf5l-80gMp_yrvEv-LxhUZK8_itTrJJJ1t-Rw/3ga/M9dzaIF7RCm9LEHS74pUIg/h0/aHkx1AB1gO5qAtH8xAUzpL_bczhxl3bM-5ynH7Nok0A)
Amanda Chase likes to call herself “Trump in heels,” and it’s pretty clear why:

She attended the January 6 insurrection as a speaker, held an event to hand out an AR-15 on stage to a supporter, and is so extreme on COVID-19 that she refused to wear a mask at the state capitol building, endangering her coworkers.

Now? She’s Glenn Youngkin’s top surrogate, traveling the state and working as hard as she can to get Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate elected.

**_And she might just succeed._**

**[Polls are tied right now, and Glenn Youngkin looks like he could pull ahead any minute. Will you pitch in right now to help us take on extremists like Glenn Youngkin and Amanda Chase?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miV04tp4Fy6FnycaH8AsjDGDuuLh4zQRLC0sRGfrMJYcLeayzmOUVEyIUSy24yqb5YBKWoUL1jZWAt7dsvs4gAIgrBJYRAHPRr_CorYaZRJHTP7XU9D7x9HvQMm1L2cEEPquDpIbQYG9g4olhUnuMCx9EDy6EmAmju0rh0Eu_WA5w2RqP0NrSOMicBMCRTsCjxMPrigmmpxg2dwWf_KtJjh7F57HqhB7KbYLO9cbAr4R_vTp13pbygEXRdweISMzHwGvw8FLsAXj4qcJaucXiMPy4-bGBJp2NHjjF-s3sf4eyjpEQqtQhvu3hx7E53f6q0wwEMSV9zXM2bkh595COOiA/3ga/M9dzaIF7RCm9LEHS74pUIg/h1/_rhGxF10YukHo2E4b2WW98X-9j_KhAHryg0IXc40LRI)** **[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miV04tp4Fy6FnycaH8AsjDGDuuLh4zQRLC0sRGfrMJYcJhP_8Q5cI6naob9G5BrmY15hWmQJNVl8oLpJYoHtWbtf4DjSuZ1XskDiEKVVK9TS6XWVx97Nmt3CzWHPFF8CIXWPCmzLIEbBy9UZnK4_rrbJ2PmUW3Gg7uGhduvfHz99krYtGsoOMLi4wiAhfQp0eeemu6Z3MRZbsYx3N9zwyjBua5uT9u_LfUbq0dKhEzQUe_Jd6Mf5d2zJY0Du3TozbAoSa6AcyGl9fFjv77jFjbUL2E87B0gVATnWYd_pquN99VHwfo4q7doTLnvzKsjwUSSqhvSt5o71nEWWIyNUb98w/3ga/M9dzaIF7RCm9LEHS74pUIg/h2/wRsnYnS-53FvMXoyKyDqoQc1f-Jy479xAkcfCLb_vho)

National Democrats are rallying behind Senator Warnock's campaign because they know Georgia WILL DECIDE the Senate majority in the upcoming election.

clean_body: We need your urgent help to pick up the pace to win this race and help Republicans take back the Senate majority! | Peter, I'm personally reaching out to you today with both good news and bad news. The good news is that in the final 5 weeks of the 3rd quarter - versus the full 12 weeks other campaigns had, with the help of grassroots conservatives, we were able to raise $3.75 MILLION. The bad news is the Democrat senator in Georgia just released his fundraising numbers: $9.5 MILLION in the last three months. Here's what one reporter tweeted: Senator Warnock raised more money in the 3rd quarter than any Senate candidate in the entire country - Republican or Democrat. And he already has $17.2 million in his campaign war chest! National Democrats are rallying behind Senator Warnock's campaign because they know Georgia WILL DECIDE the Senate majority in the upcoming election. Peter, we're facing the top funded Democrat in the country - so we can't afford to let our foot off the gas for a single day. The Senate majority is on the line, and we have a tough fight ahead. The Democrats are raising record amounts of money, but we will win if we have the support from conservatives like you. Thanks, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for US Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

Can you donate now to ensure we have the resources we need to compete with Glenn Youngkin on the ground and on the air?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37676152/312180046/-2023814932?refcode=20211019.1_TM_10ET&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDY2ODEzYy1jMTMwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9P9et-QrVUPILLgvQ5kkMxl-yYAluLQxMEfsTd7yDV4=)**_

Glenn Youngkin’s resources are endless because he’s willing to cut his campaign gigantic checks at a moment’s notice, and it’s clear he’ll spend anything to buy the Governor’s office for himself and Donald Trump.

Look, money isn’t always everything in politics. But in a race that’s as close as this one, it truly does matter. Right now, our grassroots supporters are directly fueling our critical voter mobilization efforts.

**We’re knocking on doors. We’re calling voters. We’re running TV ads. And none of that would be even remotely possible if folks like you weren’t chipping in $25 whenever you can.**

_**[So please, rush a matched donation to my campaign right now to help me protect our democracy and keep Virginia blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37676153/312180047/-2023814932?refcode=20211019.1_TM_10ET&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDY2ODEzYy1jMTMwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9P9et-QrVUPILLgvQ5kkMxl-yYAluLQxMEfsTd7yDV4=)**_

Thank you for being on my team,

Terry McAuliffe | **[DONATE>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37676154/312180048/-2023814932?refcode=20211019.1_TM_10ET&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDY2ODEzYy1jMTMwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9P9et-QrVUPILLgvQ5kkMxl-yYAluLQxMEfsTd7yDV4=)**

name: National Republican Polling
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from National Republican Polling is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z61b2eotm46hqhat23nmlqm0uh1r084epp1uam4o_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cdj6eor1chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zvqnprnv8c3abhnumjjsdh70blvomfkssfjtugs8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cdj6eor1chh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zp7p2bdonlsnp7cs5gaqrdekntet2tj3fa9g6pn8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cdj6eor1chh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for National Republican Polling, [please use this preferences page](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/prefs/9z2zhu73s2r5a28rdot7gc9mkhfe7388310dq6j2m7o).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z5kou1mfm49hgatfh3o06ma9gtagqkc95phsoamg_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6c5hmcpr3c5i649fg)

name: Ryan Girdusky
subject: Replace Leftist School Boards Pushing CRT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
Peter, Will you join Tucker Carlson, Laura Ingraham, and Donald Trump Jr. In supporting our campaign to take back our schools from the radical socialist Left? [**_We need your help as we launch a nationwide effort to replace socialist, anti-American school board members with Patriots. Will you please support us?_**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58564143:JNEnkD2NX:m:1:3298722022:25AFA217BF842919C9BD6CCCE16C5430:r) For too long, the Left has worked to infiltrate schools and indoctrinate our kids with hateful "critical race theory" lessons. **As you may know, Critical Race Theory or "CRT" teaches our children to ****hate****our country,****hate****our history, and****hate****our American values. ** It's being taught in every state across the nation, and it MUST be stopped. If we're not careful, we will soon wake up in a country run by the generation that was trained by their teachers to hate America. And they'll work to destroy everything our country stands for. And friend, you may not have seen it happening at the time, but for too long Republicans have neglected local races and instead focused on "BIG" races for President, Governor, and Congress. **_But in the process, we 've neglected smaller local races - like school board - that are often not publicized._** One of the reasons these races get overlooked is that they're discussed as "non-partisan." What that means is radical leftists get to quietly slip into a position of power and waste your tax dollars on "equity" equity consultants and train your children and grandchildren to HATE America. That's the bad news: our nation is under assault by the left, and our children are their number one target. But here's the good news. We can and will stop the radical left from corrupting the minds of an entire generation. My name is Ryan Girdusky, and I founded the 1776 Project PAC to take back our local school boards and ensure that our children are taught to love and respect America. **Here 's my ****_3R 's Campaign Battle Plan:_****_ _** **_Resign:_** we'll turn up the public pressure with TV, Radio, and Print media campaigns calling for far left school board members to quit. **_Recall:_** we'll help collect petitions signatures and aid local parents, grandparents, and concerned taxpayers in efforts to recall radical school board members who must be removed from officed **_Replace:_** We'll support the campaigns of pro-America conservatives who run for local school board against liberal pro-CRT school board members. [_**But we can 't roll out this plan without your support. Will you rush in $17.76 to the 1776 Project PAC ahead of the 40+ November elections we're targeting?**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58564143:JNEnkD2NX:m:1:3298722022:25AFA217BF842919C9BD6CCCE16C5430:r) Now, you may not be familiar with me... But you're almost certainly familiar with Tucker Carlson, Laura Ingraham, and/or Donald Trump Jr. They know how effective the 1776 Project PAC will be, and you can take their word for it! **> >>> Tucker Carlson:**** "**Parents have almost no support, _but now they do_. The **_1776 Project PAC_** _ _ is a political action committee designed to help school boards and communities elect sane people." **> >>> Laura Ingraham:****** "For all the parents out there looking to reclaim your local school boards from radical leftists - help is on the way - a new political action committee called the **_1776 Project_** is going to support school board candidates who oppose indoctrinating kids with things like Critical Race Theory." **> >>> Donald Trump Jr.:****** "The **_1776 Project_** is the very first Political Action Committee of is kinds - specifically created to take on this sinister attack on our way of life from within our own communities by working to take local schools boards out of the hands of these America-hating radical liberals..." Even the failing and biased New York Times admitted that we "lit a fire" that is only growing as more conservative patriots like you join the fight in supporting the **1776 Project PAC.** **After 30 years of left-wing billionaires like George Soros flooding cash into local school board races, we finally have a way to fight back with the 1776 Project PAC.** [_**Help us fight back against George Soros and the radical socialist left in our school boards with a generous contribution of $17.76, $25, $50, and $100.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58564143:JNEnkD2NX:m:1:3298722022:25AFA217BF842919C9BD6CCCE16C5430:r) In closing, my friend Tucker Carlson said "If you're thinking of writing a check to [another group] maybe you should pause and send it to Ryan Girdusky instead." With your help, we will rid our schools of hateful Critical Race Theory by ridding our school boards of radical left-wing activists who despise our Country, our Constitution, and our Conservative American values. Sincerely, Ryan Girdusky P.S. I know you may not know anything about me, but I hope that the endorsements from incredible conservative leaders like my friends Tucker, Laura, and Donald Trump Jr. give you confidence in my dedication to the mission of taking school boards back from radical liberals. [_**Will you invest in the future of our country by making a generous contribution to the 1776 Project PAC as we fight to Resign, Recall, or Replace far-left indoctrinators? **_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58564143:JNEnkD2NX:m:1:3298722022:25AFA217BF842919C9BD6CCCE16C5430:r) [**DONATE NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58564143:JNEnkD2NX:m:1:3298722022:25AFA217BF842919C9BD6CCCE16C5430:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58564143:JNEnkD2NX:m:1:3298722022:25AFA217BF842919C9BD6CCCE16C5430:r) **[Please consider making a critical donation to the 1776 Project PAC today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58564143:JNEnkD2NX:m:1:3298722022:25AFA217BF842919C9BD6CCCE16C5430:r)** Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
184 7th Ave #106, New York, NY 10011 Not Authorized by any candidate or campaign committee click **[here]({{unsubscribeUrl}})** to unsubscribe

Wisconsin has a KEY role to play in the race for the majority, and Democrats are already spending big bucks to turn Wisconsin blue.Don't let liberals flood our state unanswered! We have big investments to make over the next several weeks in preparation for 2022, and this deadline will determine whether or not we can make them. Thanks,Team Fitzgerald | Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress P.O. Box 5048, Elm Grove, WI 53122 |

| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE TUESDAY, OCTOBER 19, 2021 MEAGAN HANSON EARNS ENDORSEMENT OF TWO STATEWIDE ELECTED OFFICIALS ATLANTA - Today, Meagan Hanson, conservative candidate running to unseat liberal Democrat Lucy McBath in Georgia's 6th Congressional District, became the first candidate in her race to earn the endorsement of two statewide elected officials: Public Service Commission Chairman Tricia Pridemore and Public Service Commissioner Jason Shaw. "After an incredible fundraising quarter, I'm thrilled to continue our strong momentum with the endorsement of two of Georgia's top statewide elected officials," said Meagan. "Tricia and Jason know what it takes to win conservative victories in Georgia's increasingly competitive elections - and they know that I am the only candidate in my race who can beat liberal Lucy McBath to take back Georgia's 6th District. It is an honor to have their endorsements - and to be the only candidate who has earned the support of Georgia's top Republican officers." "Georgia conservatives once again have the opportunity to help take back the Congressional majority in Washington, which means we can't afford to leave Georgia's 6th District to chance. As the only candidate in her race with a strong record of winning swing districts, I know that Meagan Hanson is our best shot at beating Lucy McBath," said Georgia Public Service Commission Chairman Tricia Pridemore. "I am proud to have called Meagan a friend for many years - and I am proud to support her now in her race to end the liberal agenda and restore conservative leadership to Washington." ### Press Contact: media@meaganhanson.com

In 15 days, so much is at stake -- it is hard for us to even put into words.

Because in 15 days, our freedoms as Virginians are more in jeopardy than ever before.

Terrible Terry isn't just a nickname -- **it 's a reality.** His failure to lead will hold us back the next four years.

name: American Defense News
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkq2rpfl3ft7ed7kr00kktm3jcfmi7qo9255jloo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbrjecllmtgjao9n6jjr0t5n64q3cddhedpn3c9ge8pm0s3i65h3eojjcdpbctpgsv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3imhj32dplmhjr4cr66pgb4ohme8gq48bi4bh28or6c5hm2o71cpge49fg)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3u3hkfusn8upv7vnk51cs0q2bu3mqj26lhqtuk8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cdgm1ob6c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsqfn4dbc4tni3pe302tkc4fjmd4fgu58ikctv40_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cdgm1ob6c3h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zncn2k514fllerr943o3has4c9h210f9f56f92n0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cdgm1ob6c3h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

clean_body: Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losi This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “The Second World Wars ” on DVD: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: You'll hear this a lot - the biggest election in 2022
body:
3 big reasons why this is the most important race in 2022.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015PkOyHg_TVyw_4tX83V0RGbHMsoD9TuFPa2h2Pf_aX86PxyzfWvORh3mDFyVApDXkpc2fCz08C7-gIFTU_TPzwbs2BcslfHre1lKpkQ4nS0Y8RrT2ji1mGheWPsBG8Y_CkDE9KoRTJ9Dk64pKTElK7FbqzmkRq416-JD8Bg4mrQflmzKxrKgeQ==&c=SDUuBx7xNIivdW0BCX2lA-Nt3DQHXQIy78xEhIDOQM478-6IYK3TuA==&ch=NCO0xe9EKlxJ7wOTk2DLP0oJ4KM9bvZqFP11bODk6kvAb8Erndw2ug==)
---
| Peter,
3 big reasons why this is the most important race in 2022.

1. Record spending \- Democrats and their corporate interests are dropping MILLIONS into this race already.
2. The Senate \- This race will determine who controls the Senate for the next few years.
3. Biden \- Not only is this race a testament to Biden's approval, but it will quite literally be our only shot at stopping his radical agenda.

I know I've said it before, but I have to say it again.
I don't have special interest SuperPACs behind me. I don't have the corporate media, nor big tech. Like President Trump, I'm a businessman. I'm an outsider.
My campaign for Senate relies 100% on your support.
[Please click here to donate any amount you can generously afford >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015PkOyHg_TVyw_4tX83V0RGbHMsoD9TuFPa2h2Pf_aX86PxyzfWvORh3mDFyVApDXkpc2fCz08C7-gIFTU_TPzwbs2BcslfHre1lKpkQ4nS0Y8RrT2ji1mGheWPsBG8Y_CkDE9KoRTJ9Dk64pKTElK7FbqzmkRq416-JD8Bg4mrQflmzKxrKgeQ==&c=SDUuBx7xNIivdW0BCX2lA-Nt3DQHXQIy78xEhIDOQM478-6IYK3TuA==&ch=NCO0xe9EKlxJ7wOTk2DLP0oJ4KM9bvZqFP11bODk6kvAb8Erndw2ug==)
With your support, we can gain control of the Senate and elect a true conservative, not a RINO.

* Protect businesses from unconstitutional COVID mandates
* Defend the integrity of our electoral system.
* Secure our border.
* And reclaim our government from the Deep State operatives.

I'm counting on you to continue your support, Peter.

name: Natalie Monteiro, NextGen Pennsylvania
subject: Are you ready to vote by mail, friend?
body:
| | Friend, **Last year, over 2 million Pennsylvanians voted by mail and absentee ballot for the 2020 general election. Will you help keep up the momentum this year? ** **Next Tuesday, October 26, is the deadline to request a mail-in or absentee ballot for the upcoming election.** With important judicial and local elections on the ballot this year,**it’s important we all get our votes in. ** [Take a minute to request your ballot before the October 26 deadline.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37686975/312213821/160247767?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjJkZmRkYy1lNDMwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XQJgwcmrGwO1qdYQUWk_mZzDWrgV93hraePro0optWA=&emci=7118c527-1530-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=162dfddc-e430-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=6787172) Your vote on the open seat on the state Supreme Court will impact the future for millions of young Pennsylvanians, as the court rules on high-stakes legal matters. Young voters are shaping the future of our democracy — we just need to keep showing up like we did last year. **Together, we get to decide who represents us and our community through this Supreme Court election and local elections across the commonwealth.** **As soon as your ballot arrives,** make sure to carefully read the directions, fill it out, sign it, and then immediately put it back in the mailbox or drive it to a drop-off location so you can ensure you have a say in such a crucial election. [Ready to make your voice heard? Request your ballot now before October 26.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37686977/312213830/160247767?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjJkZmRkYy1lNDMwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XQJgwcmrGwO1qdYQUWk_mZzDWrgV93hraePro0optWA=&emci=7118c527-1530-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=162dfddc-e430-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=6787172) Thank you, Natalie Monteiro
Pennsylvania Organizing Manager
NextGen Pennsylvania

clean_body: | | Friend, Last year, over 2 million Pennsylvanians voted by mail and absentee ballot for the 2020 general election. Will you help keep up the momentum this year? Next Tuesday, October 26, is the deadline to request a mail-in or absentee ballot for the upcoming election. With important judicial and local elections on the ballot this year,it’s important we all get our votes in. Your vote on the open seat on the state Supreme Court will impact the future for millions of young Pennsylvanians, as the court rules on high-stakes legal matters. Young voters are shaping the future of our democracy — we just need to keep showing up like we did last year. Together, we get to decide who represents us and our community through this Supreme Court election and local elections across the commonwealth. As soon as your ballot arrives, make sure to carefully read the directions, fill it out, sign it, and then immediately put it back in the mailbox or drive it to a drop-off location so you can ensure you have a say in such a crucial election. Thank you, Natalie Monteiro Pennsylvania Organizing Manager NextGen Pennsylvania | NextGen America 268 Bush St. #2919 San Francisco CA 94104-3503 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | =

body:
This is an emergency, so we'll cut to the chase:
**FIRST:**
_" Biden terminating border wall construction contracts" \-- Politico (April 2021)_
**THEN:**
_" Migrant encounters at U.S.-Mexico border are at a 21-year high" \-- Pew research Center (August 2021)_
**NOW:**
_" $100 million in border wall materials rusting away in Texas: report" \-- New York Post (October 2021)_
******[HELP US BUILD THE WALL AND SAVE AMERICA](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58565119:J1FJbD2Nm:m:1:3253819041:454587F00B8CA260C1C1C8EAB67DC547:r)******
Peter -- as you're reading this email, the border crisis is spiraling out of control and Joe Biden is holding Wall materials -- enough to build 100 miles -- HOSTAGE for political purposes.
_And worst of all? The American People already paid for it. Now Joe Biden is letting it waste away while our border is falling apart._
This is an emergency, so we'll cut to the chase:
[**We 're PLEADING with every Patriot to help us build The Wall, defeat the open-borders Democrats, AND save America. We need everyone to do their part before closing out of this email.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58565119:J1FJbD2Nm:m:1:3253819041:454587F00B8CA260C1C1C8EAB67DC547:r)
President Trump fought SO HARD to secure our border -- we're not going to give up on his number one priority.
**Not when the future of our country is hanging in the balance.**
******[HELP US BUILD THE WALL AND SAVE AMERICA](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58565119:J1FJbD2Nm:m:1:3253819041:454587F00B8CA260C1C1C8EAB67DC547:r)******
You've seen the headlines. You've watched the news. You know how urgent the situation is.
Now you can do something about it.
[**Before doing anything else -- Help us build The Wall, defeat every last open-borders Democrat, and save our great country.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58565119:J1FJbD2Nm:m:1:3253819041:454587F00B8CA260C1C1C8EAB67DC547:r)
Thank you,
**BREAKING BORDER NEWS**

name: Roger Stone
subject: The corrupt Democrats are after me again...
body:
| |
---
**ROGER STONE**
---
| Dear Friend, From the moment that President Donald Trump recognized that Special Counsel Robert Mueller and his thugs targeted me for prosecution on completely fabricated charges of lying to Congress and _when I refused to be pressured into falsely testifying against President Trump_ , subjected me to a legal railroading in a DC Trial, my wife and I have been attacked in over SIXTEEN totally baseless, unsubstantiated, groundless but entirely sensationalized civil lawsuits filed by crackpots, disgruntled leftists and hysterical Democrats. Despite there being no evidence whatsoever to support these defamatory but baseless lawsuits, the real purpose of these civil suits Is to continue to destroy my family financially as well as dragging my name through the mud yet again, since the dismissal of the lawsuits never receives the same fake news media coverage as the announcement of the filing of the lawsuits which are continually reported as if they were legitimate and fact based! So far, _thanks to the many patriots who have contributed to the Stone Defense Fund_ I have won dismissal in ELEVEN cases but still face legal action in another FIVE bogus cases.
Click Image to Enlarge It's bad enough that my wife and I lost everything including our home, our savings, our insurance and - for two years - my ability to make a living. The cost of being censored, deplatformed and demonetized on the Internet has made getting back on our feet financially extraordinarily difficult. The massive legal costs of defending ourselves is designed to bankrupt and destroy us. I have no choice but to mount a legal defense in every one of the remaining cases, particularly the completely bogus lawsuit against me by the IRS and the Biden Department of Justice in which they falsely claim that I have either hidden assets or under declared income to the IRS. Fortunately this will go to trial in Miami before a judge who wasn't appointed by Barack Obama. The charges are so completely inaccurate that my lawyers will demand formal sanctions and disbarment for the dishonest federal prosecutors who filed the lawsuit. Just last week a George Soros funded left wing front group, "The Lawyers for Civil Rights Under Law" filed a completely baseless lawsuit against President Trump and me, falsely blaming us for the January 6 disturbance at the US Capitol which looks more and more like a FBI set up everyday. Needless to say this latest defamatory lawsuit is baseless as well! Despite these lawsuits being groundless if I do not mount a legal defense the court will enter a default judgment against my wife and I. That is why I have no choice but to appeal to you for a contribution to the Stone Defense Fund. I will never give up fighting but I cannot afford the lawyers I need without your help. The fact that my wife is battling stage 4 cancer and that our finances are already stretched thin by the cost of the all natural, holistic and homeopathic cancer therapies which are most definitely helping her, has not deterred the drooling leftists who are still apoplectic about the fact that President Trump had the courage to save my life. Please consider a contribution to the [Stone Defense Fund](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0pomkkkaok2o2wkpm&linkid=0&link=6ed0e49f9c114bbe92d6d73267d5e971) today. I have no intention of settling any of these lawsuits because I will never agree to admit doing something I am completely innocent of. Only with your help can I defeat these corrupt Democrats and their never-ending smears and legal harassment. God Bless You, ROGER STONE PS- If you aren't comfortable using your credit card to make a donation on the internet you can make your check payable to the 'STONE DEFENSE FUND' and mail it to us at 1007 North Federal Highway, Box 405, Ft. Lauderdale, Florida 33304. Thank you. [StoneDefenseFund.com](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0pomkkkaok2o2wkpm&linkid=1&link=d8a0e1dc614e44b396186e5d29422006)
---

But Republicans like Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump are working hard to flip this seat and take back the Senate. If they succeed, all of our progress will be lost.

clean_body: | | | Team, will you chip in $24.14 to help us build the campaign resources to defend against McConnell's millions? | | = Mitch McConnell and his GOP allies are spending millions of dollars to attack Maggie Hassan and flip New Hampshire’s Senate seat. So far, they've dumped over $3 million into the Granite State. We can’t match their megabucks, but we can show the strength of this grassroots team. We’re proud that our average online donation is $24.14. Maggie and our Democratic majority have passed critical legislation to put vaccines in arms, support small businesses, help families pay bills, and improve mental health services. But Republicans like Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump are working hard to flip this seat and take back the Senate. If they succeed, all of our progress will be lost. We can't afford to lose Maggie's voice in the Senate. = | = Maggie won her last election by only 1,017 votes, making it the closest Senate race of the cycle. And now, news outlets across the country are calling her the most vulnerable Democrat up for reelection. subject: We will never back down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michele For Florida Michele For Florida
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37689867/312224491/124312502?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmI4NTg4OS1lYjMwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tO-LrP_lF8bztX52a9SfSM-7CitksB8GGIEr_7yTho4=)

Peter,

The right to vote and participate in our free and open elections is a core principle of our democracy. At first, that principle extended only to a handful of people: rich, powerful white men. The fight to expand the right to vote has quite _literally_ taken countless lives and hundreds of years. And yet, the fight continues to this day.

**But it's a fight we can _never_ back down from and _never_ give up on --** _**[and it's one Michele has no plans to fall short on. It's why we're working tirelessly to elect her.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37689869/312224493/-578272527?refcode=em21_211019_vrights&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmI4NTg4OS1lYjMwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tO-LrP_lF8bztX52a9SfSM-7CitksB8GGIEr_7yTho4=)**_ [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37689871/312224495/-578272527?refcode=em21_211019_vrights&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmI4NTg4OS1lYjMwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tO-LrP_lF8bztX52a9SfSM-7CitksB8GGIEr_7yTho4=) Here is a fact to sit on: _Over 250 voter suppression bills have been passed since the 2020 election._

FL SB-90 is part of a Republican-led effort nationwide to restrict voting access and disenfranchise voters. It includes stricter voter ID requirements for voting by mail and creates limits on who can pick up and return a voter's ballot -- all of which will disproportionately impact low-income, disabled, and Black voters.

The trail doesn't end there: Georgia's state House also passed SB-202, which is an extreme anti-voting rights bill that will create unconscionable barriers to voting, particularly for our Black neighbors. _There are no words to describe how unacceptable and insidious this political maneuvering is._

We've known for quite some time that Republicans are working selfishly against us, especially as their attacks on our democracy pile up. **That's why we're working tirelessly to elect Michele.**

**She's the representative we need in Congress who's unafraid to stand up to the Republicans trying to bully folks into submission, and wouldn't dare to back down on the fight to pass federal voting rights legislation. She shows up to do the work for the people and the people _only_ \-- and is a leader that will fight for your right to vote -- not to take it away.**

**[Peter, can we count on you to chip in $5 or whatever you can to help elect Michele and back her in the right for our voting rights?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37689873/312224497/-578272527?refcode=em21_211019_vrights&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmI4NTg4OS1lYjMwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tO-LrP_lF8bztX52a9SfSM-7CitksB8GGIEr_7yTho4=)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37689875/312224499/-578272527?refcode=em21_211019_vrights&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmI4NTg4OS1lYjMwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tO-LrP_lF8bztX52a9SfSM-7CitksB8GGIEr_7yTho4=) | [Express Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37689877/312224501/-578272527?refcode=em21_211019_vrights&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmI4NTg4OS1lYjMwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tO-LrP_lF8bztX52a9SfSM-7CitksB8GGIEr_7yTho4=)

But it's a fight we can never back down from and never give up on -- = = Here is a fact to sit on: Over 250 voter suppression bills have been passed since the 2020 election. FL SB-90 is part of a Republican-led effort nationwide to restrict voting access and disenfranchise voters. It includes stricter voter ID requirements for voting by mail and creates limits on who can pick up and return a voter's ballot -- all of which will disproportionately impact low-income, disabled, and Black voters. The trail doesn't end there: Georgia's state House also passed SB-202, which is an extreme anti-voting rights bill that will create unconscionable barriers to voting, particularly for our Black neighbors. There are no words to describe how unacceptable and insidious this political maneuvering is. We've known for quite some time that Republicans are working selfishly against us, especially as their attacks on our democracy pile up. That's why we're working tirelessly to elect Michele. She's the representative we need in Congress who's unafraid to stand up to the Republicans trying to bully folks into submission, and wouldn't dare to back down on the fight to pass federal voting rights legislation. She shows up to do the work for the people and the people only \-- and is a leader that will fight for your right to vote -- not to take it away. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for standing up for our democracy, Team Rayner = *

name: Gary Black
subject: Do you want a pro-amnesty Republican?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/d3e1ed9912f68d10/f2130d3addefde2fc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
# **Friend — Last week, Herschel Walker said in an interview that, “everything the Democrats want, I guarantee it is what I want.” **

---
Yesterday, we found out what that means. **Herschel supports sweeping amnesty for MILLIONS of illegal immigrants, including a pathway to citizenship. **
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/d3e1ed9912f68d10/f052676fd3d293a6c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
**Like any University of Georgia alumnus, I’m a fan of Herschel Walker the football player. ** **But Herschel Walker the candidate? Don’t we have enough politicians who want amnesty and citizenship for illegal immigrants? ** Today, we’ve released a new radio ad about this issue.**[Listen to it here, and if you agree, I hope you’ll donate whatever you can to help us broadcast it across Georgia.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/d3e1ed9912f68d10/2188af974a2297eec3d6b838967d376c/37793)** I went to the southern border and saw the devastation caused by Joe Biden and Raphael Warnock’s policies. They’ve allowed an invasion of our country and they want to reward lawbreakers with citizenship. It’s got to stop. **We need to secure the border, finish President Trump’s wall, and stop incentivizing illegal immigration. No jobs. No amnesty. No citizenship. ** _But this change won’t happen if Georgia simply trades one pro-amnesty, pro-citizenship U.S. Senator for another. _ I stood on the border. And on border security, you’ll always know where I stand.
I hope you’ll stand with us. [**Listen to our ad here, and please donate what you can to help us keep it on the air.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/d3e1ed9912f68d10/1a0652f179251e46c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/d3e1ed9912f68d10/925c383b3a92da69c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Gary Black
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/d3e1ed9912f68d10/187c41ba9b0b7796c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
| | _**Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary:**_ I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $10 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below.
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/d3e1ed9912f68d10/0b9bc516aa7dac46c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---

| | Derek, Election Day is right around the corner and the team over at the Democratic Party of Virginia asked me to take a moment to reach out to you and remind you of what is at stake on November 2nd. I’ll be honest — this election is going to be a close one. My friends Terry, Hala, and Mark, and a lot of our Democratic candidates running for House seats all across the Commonwealth are in tight races that could come down to just a handful of votes. Our narrow five seat Democratic majority in the House of Delegates and all of the progress we have made in the last few years hangs in the balance. This means we need to spend these final 2 weeks leading up to Election Day talking to as many Virginia voters as possible to make sure they have a plan to get out to vote for Terry, Mark, Hala, and our great Democratic legislative candidates. The DPVA has been working around the clock on making their Get Out the Vote program the best and most effective it can be, but it needs your help to make it happen, Derek. This is why I am asking: **[Can I count on your help to make sure the Virginia Democrats have the money they need to fully fund their Get Out the Vote mobilization program? Any amount helps them to turn out the votes we need to decide this election.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37690317/312227430/272180825?refcode=dpva-em-211019-beyer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjZiOTAzZS1lZDMwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xfk5C5YjLPQAUbOyL0FpYraMCYGVQWjHXO26w_f3fBA=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: | | | Derek, Election Day is right around the corner and the team over at the Democratic Party of Virginia asked me to take a moment to reach out to you and remind you of what is at stake on November 2nd. I’ll be honest — this election is going to be a close one. My friends Terry, Hala, and Mark, and a lot of our Democratic candidates running for House seats all across the Commonwealth are in tight races that could come down to just a handful of votes. Our narrow five seat Democratic majority in the House of Delegates and all of the progress we have made in the last few years hangs in the balance. This means we need to spend these final 2 weeks leading up to Election Day talking to as many Virginia voters as possible to make sure they have a plan to get out to vote for Terry, Mark, Hala, and our great Democratic legislative candidates. The DPVA has been working around the clock on making their Get Out the Vote program the best and most effective it can be, but it needs your help to make it happen, Derek. This is why I am asking: = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = Thanks for your help in these final days, Derek. Stay safe and healthy, Don Beyer = = | | Click here to . | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: A must win for Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/dFIG3SKWKzL5hyL-xlpOZBWwR28DdUh7ryWil_0tphk=/89x_M-FW6J04hYaX00HxxA630yBFlNVhdBxRQG00qrA=?refcode=20211019_RN_TRM)
---
Let me lay it out for you, friend: the Virginia Governor's race is the most important election in the country this year -- it's a must win for Democrats. For the last decade, Virginia Democrats have led the nation by delivering victory after victory for working families. But now, our progress is under attack. If Donald Trump's handpicked candidate Glenn Youngkin becomes Virginia's Governor, he'll roll back every inch we fought so hard for. And right now, Youngkin winning is a real possibility. Polls show a razor thin margin, we're being outraged, and initial reports show diminishing enthusiasm amongst Democrats. [**So**](https://act.myngp.com/el/dFIG3SKWKzL5hyL-xlpOZBWwR28DdUh7ryWil_0tphk=/wHtaHVthhbeX2VU8CxBXM45Zzwvf_tV5zdQZE_4b5eQ=?refcode=20211019_RN_TRM)**[ right now, will you split a contribution between The Way Ahead and my campaign? I need all hands on deck if we're going to win this race.](https://act.myngp.com/el/dFIG3SKWKzL5hyL-xlpOZBWwR28DdUh7ryWil_0tphk=/wHtaHVthhbeX2VU8CxBXM45Zzwvf_tV5zdQZE_4b5eQ=?refcode=20211019_RN_TRM)** Friend, Donald Trump wants to use this election as the launchpad for his 2024 campaign -- and Glenn Youngkin has already said he supports four more years of Donald Trump. If a Trump-wannabe like Youngkin can win in Virginia, a guy like him can win anywhere. We have to send the message that we're ready to end Trumpism in this country once and for all. [**With stakes this high, we can 't afford to miss even one fundraising benchmark. So please, split a contribution of whatever you can between my campaign and The Way Ahead right now.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/dFIG3SKWKzL5hyL-xlpOZBWwR28DdUh7ryWil_0tphk=/wHtaHVthhbeX2VU8CxBXM45Zzwvf_tV5zdQZE_4b5eQ=?refcode=20211019_RN_TRM) Thank you, Terry McAuliffe

name: Jenna Henry, Keystone Progress
subject: This is not a drill -- abortion rights are on the line.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

Before we become Gilead, we need to rise up and demand abortion liberation NOW.

Efforts to ban abortion are quickly gaining momentum around our nation.

The unusually cruel new Texas law S.B. 8 not only bans abortions after 6-weeks of pregnancy -- before most people even know they’re pregnant -- but it encourages bounty hunters to sue anyone helping someone get an abortion for $10,000, which includes anyone from nurses to Uber drivers.

Pennsylvania is not far behind with legislators already cooking up new ways to ban abortion. Nationwide, more laws restricting abortion access were introduced in 2021 than in any year prior since Roe v. Wade made abortion our constitutional right. These laws harm everyone, but due to systemic inequities and racism, they are most harmful to people making low incomes, as well as Black and Latinx people.

Donate today to help us keep abortion accessible and legal for everyone in PA through thoughtful coalition building, organizer trainings, and Get Out The Vote efforts.

clean_body: Dear Friend, Before we become Gilead, we need to rise up and demand abortion liberation NOW. Efforts to ban abortion are quickly gaining momentum around our nation. The unusually cruel new Texas law S.B. 8 not only bans abortions after 6-weeks of pregnancy -- before most people even know they’re pregnant -- but it encourages bounty hunters to sue anyone helping someone get an abortion for $10,000, which includes anyone from nurses to Uber drivers. Pennsylvania is not far behind with legislators already cooking up new ways to ban abortion. Nationwide, more laws restricting abortion access were introduced in 2021 than in any year prior since Roe v. Wade made abortion our constitutional right. These laws harm everyone, but due to systemic inequities and racism, they are most harmful to people making low incomes, as well as Black and Latinx people. Donate today to help us keep abortion accessible and legal for everyone in PA through thoughtful coalition building, organizer trainings, and Get Out The Vote efforts. name: Adam Schiff
subject: We need Abby Finkenauer in the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37692275/312235605/-1484552876?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk294-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzQzMmM2ZS1mMTMwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6p5nvBqJ8FOqlkO6yIuLf-kGuQhqG09KccEQDr2OYjE=)
Hey Peter, it’s Adam Schiff. My friend Abby asked me to reach out because this moment is critical: Donald Trump just rallied with and endorsed Abby’s opponent, Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA). I want to be respectful of your time, so I’ll cut right to the chase – we need Abby Finkenauer in the U.S. Senate.
Over the past few years, we’ve learned that our democracy is fragile. In the aftermath of Donald Trump and his Big Lie, it’s more important now than ever to protect it. We need champions for our democracy in the Senate – **and with Abby Finkenauer, Iowans would gain a true public servant in the U.S. Senate. I saw firsthand just how hard she fought for Iowa's working families and our democracy during her time in Congress. And in the U.S. Senate, she’ll continue that fight.**
**[Abby’s Senate campaign is gaining momentum, and she needs to make a big statement before her next big fundraising deadline. I'm personally asking: Will you split a donation between our campaigns right now? We must elect Abby to the Senate and hold on to our Democratic majorities in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37692276/312235606/-1484552876?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk294-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzQzMmM2ZS1mMTMwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6p5nvBqJ8FOqlkO6yIuLf-kGuQhqG09KccEQDr2OYjE=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37692277/312235607/-1484552876?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk294-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzQzMmM2ZS1mMTMwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6p5nvBqJ8FOqlkO6yIuLf-kGuQhqG09KccEQDr2OYjE=)
---
When I served with Abby in the House, I knew from the very start she was there for the right reasons: To do the hard work. The critical work. The kind of work that makes a difference.
It may not earn headlines – but it improves the lives of the people we represent. It has become rarer and rarer to see these days, but for Abby, public service is personal. She was raised in a working-class family. The fight is in her blood. And she would do anything and everything to better the lives of her community.
As for the current Iowa Senator, Chuck Grassley, it’s a different story. He's held this seat in the Senate for more than 40 years. And showing up for Iowa's working families seems to be a thing of his past. He's actively working against affordable health care and empowering unions – the sort of things that would improve the lives of so many in Iowa and across the country. Worse still, he's helped propagate Donald Trump's lies and encouraged dangerous voter suppression laws, and he has done Mitch McConnell’s bidding for much of his career.
**Our best hope for a better Iowa, and for a Democratic Senate, is Abby Finkenauer.** But it won’t be easy. Mitch McConnell doesn’t want to lose Grassley. His super PACs have nearly limitless resources to keep this seat red. And their work to take down Abby has already begun. **That's why I need you to make a critical donation right now.**
**[Peter, will you split a contribution of $5 or more right now to our campaigns? We must ensure Abby can defeat Sen. Grassley and keep our razor-thin majority in the Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37692278/312235608/-1484552876?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk294-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzQzMmM2ZS1mMTMwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6p5nvBqJ8FOqlkO6yIuLf-kGuQhqG09KccEQDr2OYjE=)**
I’m grateful for your support. Your continued fight for the truth. And for our democracy. Let's win in Iowa. Let’s elect Abby.

– Adam Schiff
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37692279/312235609/-1484552876?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk294-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzQzMmM2ZS1mMTMwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6p5nvBqJ8FOqlkO6yIuLf-kGuQhqG09KccEQDr2OYjE=)
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37692280/312235610/496662621?refcode=jtk294-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzQzMmM2ZS1mMTMwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6p5nvBqJ8FOqlkO6yIuLf-kGuQhqG09KccEQDr2OYjE=&emci=6e8c7f41-3330-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=fc432c6e-f130-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=13784334#!).

name: Karen Bass
subject: Community came out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
Team, I'm overwhelmed.

On Saturday, the city I've called home for decades showed up for me in a big way at our official campaign kick-off. When I looked out into the (fully vaccinated!) crowd, I was proud to see that our coalition is made up of folks from all over -- nurses and artists, students and veterans, business leaders, and activists. And yes, even Tiffany Haddish!

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/AsaRH5enEZ18NECV01K9IWw-5G-zw-4LOCfT40ca81w=/YRooE6ZS8bdUIl-M8Svpp9RSEeIZW0pFy_rnedXqxOI=?ms=em21_211018_kckoff_fndd_gq_act_rbk_kb_ettx_img1&refcode=em21_211018_kckoff_fndd_gq_act_rbk_kb_ettx_img1&source=em21_211018_kckoff_fndd_gq_act_rbk_kb_ettx_img1&utm_campaign=em21_211018_kckoff_fndd_gq_act_rbk_kb_ettx_img1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/AsaRH5enEZ18NECV01K9IWw-5G-zw-4LOCfT40ca81w=/YRooE6ZS8bdUIl-M8Svpp9RSEeIZW0pFy_rnedXqxOI=?ms=em21_211018_kckoff_fndd_gq_act_rbk_kb_ettx_img2&refcode=em21_211018_kckoff_fndd_gq_act_rbk_kb_ettx_img2&source=em21_211018_kckoff_fndd_gq_act_rbk_kb_ettx_img2&utm_campaign=em21_211018_kckoff_fndd_gq_act_rbk_kb_ettx_img2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/AsaRH5enEZ18NECV01K9IWw-5G-zw-4LOCfT40ca81w=/YRooE6ZS8bdUIl-M8Svpp9RSEeIZW0pFy_rnedXqxOI=?ms=em21_211018_kckoff_fndd_gq_act_rbk_kb_ettx_img3&refcode=em21_211018_kckoff_fndd_gq_act_rbk_kb_ettx_img3&source=em21_211018_kckoff_fndd_gq_act_rbk_kb_ettx_img3&utm_campaign=em21_211018_kckoff_fndd_gq_act_rbk_kb_ettx_img3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)
---

No matter what zip code we live in, all of us are ready to rebuild our city on a foundation of social and economic justice. We have the tools and the passion to make our vision for Los Angeles a reality, team. Put simply, we believe in PEOPLE.

Our people-powered team has the momentum to take our campaign straight to City Hall, but it's going to take continued grassroots support to make it happen.

**[Help us keep up the energy from this weekend by making a gift to our campaign. Angelenos, your donation can be matched 6-to-1 by the city, so it's extra important we have your support.](https://act.myngp.com/el/AsaRH5enEZ18NECV01K9IWw-5G-zw-4LOCfT40ca81w=/YRooE6ZS8bdUIl-M8Svpp9RSEeIZW0pFy_rnedXqxOI=?ms=em21_211018_kckoff_fndd_gq_act_rbk_kb_ettx_alask1&refcode=em21_211018_kckoff_fndd_gq_act_rbk_kb_ettx_alask1&source=em21_211018_kckoff_fndd_gq_act_rbk_kb_ettx_alask1&utm_campaign=em21_211018_kckoff_fndd_gq_act_rbk_kb_ettx_alask1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)**

I'm not going to sugarcoat it. We have real problems we need to tackle -- homelessness, stagnant wages, climate change, and more. But I'm not afraid of a tough fight, particularly not when justice, security, and a future for the next generation is on the line.

**[Los Angeles has called me home, and I am ready to serve. I need to know if you're with me in this race. Will you donate what you can now?](https://act.myngp.com/el/AsaRH5enEZ18NECV01K9IWw-5G-zw-4LOCfT40ca81w=/YRooE6ZS8bdUIl-M8Svpp9RSEeIZW0pFy_rnedXqxOI=?ms=em21_211018_kckoff_fndd_gq_act_rbk_kb_ettx_alask2&refcode=em21_211018_kckoff_fndd_gq_act_rbk_kb_ettx_alask2&source=em21_211018_kckoff_fndd_gq_act_rbk_kb_ettx_alask2&utm_campaign=em21_211018_kckoff_fndd_gq_act_rbk_kb_ettx_alask2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)**

In solidarity,

Karen

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/AsaRH5enEZ18NECV01K9IWw-5G-zw-4LOCfT40ca81w=/YRooE6ZS8bdUIl-M8Svpp9RSEeIZW0pFy_rnedXqxOI=?ms=em21_211018_kckoff_fndd_gq_act_rbk_kb_ettx_img4&refcode=em21_211018_kckoff_fndd_gq_act_rbk_kb_ettx_img4&source=em21_211018_kckoff_fndd_gq_act_rbk_kb_ettx_img4&utm_campaign=em21_211018_kckoff_fndd_gq_act_rbk_kb_ettx_img4&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)
---

Karen is building a grassroots campaign by and for the people of L.A. Thanks to L.A.'s matching funds program, individual donations from residents up to $214 may be matched 6-to-1 by the city, meaning your $5 contribution could become $35. Rush a donation today to support Karen's campaign:
[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://act.myngp.com/el/AsaRH5enEZ18NECV01K9IWw-5G-zw-4LOCfT40ca81w=/YRooE6ZS8bdUIl-M8Svpp9RSEeIZW0pFy_rnedXqxOI=?ms=em21_211018_kckoff_fndd_gq_act_rbk_kb_ettx_alftr&refcode=em21_211018_kckoff_fndd_gq_act_rbk_kb_ettx_alftr&source=em21_211018_kckoff_fndd_gq_act_rbk_kb_ettx_alftr&utm_campaign=em21_211018_kckoff_fndd_gq_act_rbk_kb_ettx_alftr&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)

name: Joan Greene
subject: What’s Important To You?
body:
In my last email I talked about how from a young age I was taught the value of public service

| | | | |
---
| | [](https://joangreeneaz.lt.acemlnc.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZqb2FuZ3JlZW5lYXouY29tJTJG&sig=237CCkMJ6tRKJHRuSY4ousALJATjt6Q8t31akYbz4XPN&iat=1634662698&a=66715302&account=joangreeneaz%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=f4c37e1e8c793c25028af187405f72b3&i=222A233A1A2430)
---
| | Hi,

In my last email, I talked about how from a young age I was taught the value of public service and community-building by my grandmother who was the second woman to be elected to Phoenix City Council.

I talked about how my dreams and struggles as a businesswoman gives me unique perspective that equips me to be of better service to my community.

Today, I want to dig in a bit about my "why" and then share what I’ve been hearing from people like you around the district.

1) **Please explain why you are running for the City Council and not again for Congressional District Five?**
****

> _"I am so proud of the work and overwhelming support I received as a Candidate for Congressional District Five. I demonstrated that I could unite a diverse community around our kitchen table issues but it was time to pass the baton to another candidate who will continue to move CD5 forward._
> _Phoenix is where I was born, educated, started a business, raised my family and volunteer. I am running to make a difference in our district._
> _Phoenix City Council is a "boots on the ground" position. I excel at talking with the people in the community and speaking with experts so we can solve problems together._
> _The_ _people in District Six have real concerns and they do not feel they have a voice. I will have community events throughout District Six and respond to questions in a timely manner._
> _I have already started the process of visiting our neighbors. For one community member I found the answer to their problem and responded to them with the result within a day._
> _I know when we work together, we thrive together."_

2) **What are the three most important issues facing Phoenix that you would like to work on if you are elected to the Phoenix City Council? Please explain.** **
**

> _"These are[ only three of the important kitchen table issues the people of District Six are talking about:](https://joangreeneaz.lt.acemlnc.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cuam9hbmdyZWVuZWF6LmNvbSUyRnByaW9yaXRpZXM=&sig=8rMu7Ga3BYd4e6znxr6vknpuNjapVsgXoaXn8VuoaX3E&iat=1634662698&a=66715302&account=joangreeneaz%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=f4c37e1e8c793c25028af187405f72b3&i=222A233A1A2448)
> _ _1) __Attainable and healthy housing. Rents are rising faster than paychecks. Teachers and first responders are not able to live in the neighborhoods they work in. People are being forced to relocate to a different neighborhood because the rent increase is no longer within their financial means. We need more multi-generational housing options, density buildings and walkable communities so people can work, play, access to health and childcare, and food stores within 15 – 20 minutes of where they live. This includes reliable public transportation options._
> _2) __Public Safety. We need more police, and we need to do a better job screening the applicants. Longer training times and removing the people with a history of racism or violence. Fund more social and mental health experts to help on calls that will diffuse escalation. Increase transparency and accountability._
> 3) _Environmental Protection. Arizona should be the leader in solar and I will champion the benefit of natural resources. Protecting our land, water and air must be a top priority. I will work with the City of Phoenix and council members on the programs they have in place and work with experts to implement best practices from other cities or countries."_
> What about you? Reply to this email and tell me what issues are important to you.
> Stay tuned for Part 3 tomorrow as I finish the interview with some personal information **about myself and my candidacy to the City Council. **

Talk Soon,

Joan Greene****
---

name: Derek Marshall
subject: 100% people-powered
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,

**Like me, you’ve probably seen two Democratic senators in the media this week, once again making headlines because of their refusal to get behind the Democratic budget bill.** Like me, you’re probably sick and tired of seeing their faces and hearing their excuses. Like me, you probably care about climate change, healthcare, infrastructure, and more that are all being blocked by these two holdouts.

Here’s the thing. **There’s a reason Senators Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema are imploding the budget bill, and it’s a simple one: money.** Manchin and Sinema receive millions of dollars from mega corporations and special interest groups who are doing everything they can to stop Democrats from taking the action we desperately need.

If you’re feeling frustrated and disheartened by the stalemate these Senators have created, I understand. **I share your disappointment and anger, because our party is supposed to stand up for the working class, not corporate interests.** But I also know there’s something we can do about it. **[As a progressive candidate, I have to work twice as hard for our donations, but it’s worth it to know that our campaign has made the ethical choice to ensure we are truly grassroots.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37694158/312241542/-1802129310?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjBlNDRhMS1mNTMwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aQ5rGi64rD6TmmsPTt0O3kDYU3iTvwUNAxfL0Svuz34=)**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37694159/312241543/-1802129325?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjBlNDRhMS1mNTMwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aQ5rGi64rD6TmmsPTt0O3kDYU3iTvwUNAxfL0Svuz34=)

At the core of my candidacy for Congress is one major commitment: I take zero donations from companies, corporate PACs, or billionaires. **I refuse to bow down to the special interests who have run Washington for too long. I believe Democrats should serve constituents, not companies.** The movement for corporate-free, 100% people-powered campaigns is one of the pillars of what it means to be progressive today. It takes courage to stand up against the status quo, but I will do it every time if it means running a clean campaign with integrity.

**I take pride in the fact that all of our contributions come from individual donors who want to invest in a better future.** I know we don’t need corporate donations to win. But it does put us at a disadvantage when we know my opponent can receive unlimited support from corporations who want to keep progressives out of office at any cost.

**[Your donation keeps us competitive and proves that progressives can run winnable campaigns without accepting corporate money. Your investment today sets me up to fight for your rights and needs as a true progressive in the halls of Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37694160/312241553/-1802129310?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjBlNDRhMS1mNTMwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aQ5rGi64rD6TmmsPTt0O3kDYU3iTvwUNAxfL0Svuz34=)**

I’m committed to a better, brighter future for our party and our country. **Will you join me? **

In Solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**
* * *
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37694161/312241572/-1802129325?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjBlNDRhMS1mNTMwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aQ5rGi64rD6TmmsPTt0O3kDYU3iTvwUNAxfL0Svuz34=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37694162/312241573/-370388119?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjBlNDRhMS1mNTMwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aQ5rGi64rD6TmmsPTt0O3kDYU3iTvwUNAxfL0Svuz34=&emci=6ede3eb2-5c30-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=960e44a1-f530-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=21617867) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37694163/312241574/1746218842?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjBlNDRhMS1mNTMwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aQ5rGi64rD6TmmsPTt0O3kDYU3iTvwUNAxfL0Svuz34=&emci=6ede3eb2-5c30-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=960e44a1-f530-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=21617867) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37694164/312241575/1746222677?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjBlNDRhMS1mNTMwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aQ5rGi64rD6TmmsPTt0O3kDYU3iTvwUNAxfL0Svuz34=&emci=6ede3eb2-5c30-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=960e44a1-f530-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=21617867)
