name: ICYMI News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nati
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zre1gu60rhbsd5vpfqrodstahdjovfui3881j41g_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cdimeor3c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqho6v7aqgg5m6uf5svorvb476i80tbb749vn6rg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cdimeor3c5h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zuf5o1i4jd59nmae0rd7nm39v1dlefdtfgln477o_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cdimeor3c5h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;” Reaching over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

I’m a physician and a veteran, and I believe the vaccine has saved lives. But this decision is a personal medical choice — and veterans who choose to refuse the vaccine shouldn’t be dishonorably discharged as though they committed treason. But that’s exactly what Joe Biden wants to do. That’s not just wrong. It’s un-American. And I’m leading the fight to stop it. [**Hope you’ll watch my conversation with Ben Shapiro about this important issue and chip in to help share our message.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/10b08857259951a9/56090ddfbcce5b69c3d6b838967d376c)

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: NEW: Our 5th Justice Democrat recruit for 2022
body:
Summer Lee is running for Congress to represent every community in her district, because for too long, leadership has left them behind.
#
Peter,
**Summer Lee just announced her campaign for Congress in Southwestern Pennsylvania! She’s got our support from Day 1, because she’s ready to bring the fight to upend the status quo to Congress.[Can you donate directly to Summer’s campaign to help her raise $50,000 as she launches her campaign for Congress?](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/77280?refcode=em20211019-20079&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=20079%2E1203867%2EVt869R)**
Born and raised in North Braddock, Pennsylvania, Summer is a longtime advocate for a strong labor movement, guaranteed health care for every person in the country, and an end to America’s reliance on fossil fuels. She made history in 2018 when she unseated a 20-year incumbent in PA’s State House and became the first Black woman to represent Southwestern Pennsylvania in the state legislature.
Summer is committed to representing every single community in her district, Pennsylvania’s 18th Congressional District, because so many have been ignored for so long.
_"I’m running for Congress because our community deserves to have leadership that tackles our crises with the urgency of someone who has lived through the struggles of environmental racism, unaffordable healthcare, crushing student debt and job insecurity."_ -Summer Lee
Summer is running to upend the status quo, pass a Green New Deal and Medicare for all, and grow our group of elected officials in Congress who truly fight for the people.
[Summer needs a strong start to show the political establishment that she’s ready to win this race for Congress. She just launched her campaign today — can you donate $3 or anything at all directly to Summer’s campaign so we can help her raise $50,000 in her first 24 hours?](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/77280?refcode=em20211019-20079&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=20079%2E1203867%2EVt869R)
**[Contribute](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/77280?refcode=em20211019-20079&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=20079%2E1203867%2EVt869R)**
It takes all of us to help Justice Democrats run successful primary campaigns. Early grassroots fundraising is an extremely important part of the campaign — it will bring important media coverage to the campaign and help Summer get the organizing tools and resources she needs to run a good primary early on.
**Summer won’t take a cent from corporate PACs or Wall Street CEOs, so our support for her campaign is critical.[That’s why we need you to chip in right now on Summer’s campaign launch day. Donate whatever you can directly to Summer’s campaign!](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/77280?refcode=em20211019-20079&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=20079%2E1203867%2EVt869R)**
We can’t wait to help Summer run this race in Pennsylvania’s 18th Congressional District, and we can’t wait to keep you updated on how you can help.
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats
P.S. It’s extremely hard for regular, working people in this country to run for office because it requires so much time and money. Corporate Democrats can reach out to rich friends and corporate PACs for big donations. [Justice Democrats don’t take a cent from corporate PACs, so it’s critical that we bring in a wave of grassroots donations for Summer right now. Give $3 directly to Summer’s campaign, and collectively we can make a huge difference in her race.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/77280?refcode=em20211019-20079&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=20079%2E1203867%2EVt869R)
**[Contribute](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/77280?refcode=em20211019-20079&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=20079%2E1203867%2EVt869R)**

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=25&akid=20079%2E1203867%2EVt869R) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=26&akid=20079%2E1203867%2EVt869R) and your state public health department.
---

clean_body: Summer Lee is running for Congress to represent every community in her district, because for too long, leadership has left them behind. Peter, Summer Lee just announced her campaign for Congress in Southwestern Pennsylvania! She’s got our support from Day 1, because she’s ready to bring the fight to upend the status quo to Congress. Born and raised in North Braddock, Pennsylvania, Summer is a longtime advocate for a strong labor movement, guaranteed health care for every person in the country, and an end to America’s reliance on fossil fuels. She made history in 2018 when she unseated a 20-year incumbent in PA’s State House and became the first Black woman to represent Southwestern Pennsylvania in the state legislature. Summer is committed to representing every single community in her district, Pennsylvania’s 18th Congressional District, because so many have been ignored for so long. "I’m running for Congress because our community deserves to have leadership that tackles our crises with the urgency of someone who has lived through the struggles of environmental racism, unaffordable healthcare, crushing student debt and job insecurity." -Summer Lee Summer is running to upend the status quo, pass a Green New Deal and Medicare for all, and grow our group of elected officials in Congress who truly fight for the people. It takes all of us to help Justice Democrats run successful primary campaigns. Early grassroots fundraising is an extremely important part of the campaign — it will bring important media coverage to the campaign and help Summer get the organizing tools and resources she needs to run a good primary early on. Summer won’t take a cent from corporate PACs or Wall Street CEOs, so our support for her campaign is critical. We can’t wait to help Summer run this race in Pennsylvania’s 18th Congressional District, and we can’t wait to keep you updated on how you can help. In solidarity, Justice Democrats P.S. It’s extremely hard for regular, working people in this country to run for office because it requires so much time and money. Corporate Democrats can reach out to rich friends and corporate PACs for big donations. Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the and your state public health department. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Federal candidates or officeholders mentioned above are not asking for more than $5,000 per calendar year from individuals or other federally permissible sources, nor are they asking for any funds from corporations, labor unions, or any other federally prohibited sources. JusticeDemocrats.com 10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932 Email us: mailto:us@justicedemocrats.com

Top Republicans from across the country are pulling together right now to defend Marco and make history. By joining us today, you will be letting it be known to the world that you STOOD UP against the dangerous Left when your back was against the wall. "Will you join us?" But I need you to stand with me once again. Fox News said my race could be the most expensive ever, CNN said my race was even MORE likely to flip blue, and now my opponent has outraised me. name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: We need to win this battle on the campuses
body:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1nqdfffcrfuq4r2fn57j5i0ii2nb8ban1s5bgb0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uhrrdcb0e2or8t5hc2oj3db7caqjepjn6ph6apbimcpm6t3l6pj38dbi6prm6dpnq9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0slkcooj1ddhcup36phgm2p64dji46h22sh2s8i66pj1cdhm4ob6chh2bs)
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrperu5vjid220ds67pn2fotq0fvpp7p2nn81n7o_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cdhm4ob6chh2bs) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has _**_NO_ _POWER_**_ to get involved in your medical decisions. **_PERIOD!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than __2,500 colleges and universities__ are _FORCING_ students to get the COVID vaccine... _DEMANDING_ that they publicly share their medical history... and _BANNING_ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with us today by making a generous, tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50, $75, or whatever you can possibly afford to help fuel our ongoing efforts?_**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zsk0ks7a9lrfe1pn3v9cci1ubmcokoaj155ga140_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cdhm4ob6chh2bs) [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zdjpqs0uu7i69lhtq9poj94vh6cthg13ql1ebme0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cdhm4ob6chh2bs) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a “NO FORCED VAX” campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re ready to ship out right away— and we must get them into the hands of students who need and want them right now. [**Your gift right now will help make that possible.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zkforldv4p51ugqpd2gbjd4ftuof17sadfjgnv7g_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cdhm4ob6chh2bs) This move by the universities is not about vaccines AT ALL. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students — the least affected by the disease — must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. **The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with --__and put their policies on steroids_._** As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next! We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced vaccinations! With your gift of $25 today, you’ll help fund one activism kit for students on a campus that’s essentially forcing them to get the COVID vaccine. These activism kits are crucial to teaching students how to stand up for their freedom at these anti-liberty schools.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmakugh8qh24296jedk6uv7noqsvnbo2cv4ttd9o_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cdhm4ob6chh2bs) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zsbas68pqfl69eph2bqk059nop4gjsnp5hrhfoh0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cdhm4ob6chh2bs) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

clean_body: Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has NO POWER to get involved in your medical decisions. PERIOD! But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are FORCING students to get the COVID vaccine... DEMANDING that they publicly share their medical history... and BANNING them from school if they don’t comply! My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a “NO FORCED VAX” campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re ready to ship out right away— and we must get them into the hands of students who need and want them right now. This move by the universities is not about vaccines AT ALL. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students — the least affected by the disease — must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with --and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his ONLINE college classes until he takes the vaccine! If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next! We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Folks, **Last week, Governor Abbott issued a total ban on COVID vaccine mandates among businesses and employers, once again putting lives at risk across Texas.** Despite President Biden’s executive order mandating all private employers with more than 100 employees to require vaccines for their workers, Abbott is going against all scientific evidence to prevent these lifesaving measures from taking place. As a result, Abbott is setting business owners up for failure and confusing the public with more misinformation than before. Businesses and employers should be able to decide how they are going to keep their workers and customers safe. Vaccines are the most effective way to reduce the spread of COVID-19 and protect our neighbors and community members from severe illness. Banning them only jeopardizes the health and safety of Texans. **[Abbott and Patrick are putting partisan politics over people. Sign our petition today calling on Abbott and Dan Patrick to stop playing political games and allow employers to choose vaccine requirements to protect their workers>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37697251/312255465/1878064783?refcode=AU_MC_EG_GEN_PET_AC30_20211019_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTg0ZmM2MS1mZTMwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IKJ-3x6jSWFP0FlNiBkLSoxRnhyWgVst3RXeU1Ycl0U=&emci=f140f5a7-f330-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=3a84fc61-fe30-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=7689298)** | [SIGN OUR PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37697253/312255466/1878064783?refcode=AU_MC_EG_GEN_PET_AC30_20211019_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTg0ZmM2MS1mZTMwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IKJ-3x6jSWFP0FlNiBkLSoxRnhyWgVst3RXeU1Ycl0U=&emci=f140f5a7-f330-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=3a84fc61-fe30-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=7689298)

name: Tim Ryan
subject: I'm gonna lose my damn voice, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
| | | I need your help to send a message. Because frankly, I’m about to lose my damn voice!

I’ve been making headlines lately for getting a little riled up -- okay, for outright shouting -- at my GOP colleagues on the House floor.

Because when it comes to speaking up for our workers and our democracy, I’m never going to hold my tongue. But our campaign’s deadline is tomorrow night, and I need YOUR help to let the country know that I’m not standing on my own.

[**Our fundraising numbers need to show that I’ve got a grassroots army behind me ready to flip this Senate seat so that we can start getting big things done for the American people. So Derek, will you split a few bucks between my campaign and Common Good VA to help us reach our critical goal before the clock runs out?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7XrSQfQLgEyDIkeGR7BRKzHRVF5kgJk_H6Fb02eDyLaXUfCXPyEGnTOvlGQysehzqg-7x7iAC2gn24-NuowTwN-X4BBcc4hP-5Fd9SpEOkR-iH_x2m7meuahztzf--GIpu0i1_TCDl89PT9E4854JBP4YAOGQf4Sv4R9qWG4ts5osKrKQI4wk4H3MLbnIuKub-BPgTSCG0qVBpizmTa8jNL03sQOZzcAmiM5sWbFguDeo18lsC_7gBSvKgkvTpflKVLyQfuiY4YvFng1tlvaCUoNmE3ReJlHOFjZvUaLi6B1idckjUn6awIFrG-ZM_IVf0Q/3ga/h9wspeaQSu60bLoXfpdx3Q/h0/Dgm8bTY1kSE91O43gWwIpVUyQQu74lAyUSbGqA0pFeg) | [**DONATE »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7XrSQfQLgEyDIkeGR7BRKzHRvzJKp11AeZlXkmkzYgXqp6a3p_-EuilR7nGsKg7PLkhCK02jH3ruTANICd8t1J1Cqnswr2-uEcdgVOUGSgPggSidGmGwPYFPfJ61QbFBVy3MTjq7iPZohbQmK3oKA0di5aUl_jSqMvPLXs37Sbk3h2N8UE0bJ-SqoIK5Lcyk3kb0meIBJt5prLn-33jPyyRaR-szS_lw9LsjGD8rjM4q2gDXdsmm-x8aB4l4oAohuev8l-vDbGNidySwWhgmQfbnF4Yd0LbzfUt8PbSKW2gh86W_yr3NhOx2Osj2xFMgrYQ/3ga/h9wspeaQSu60bLoXfpdx3Q/h1/0M_RWAxgeJ42iqVMivzNuCScW5uA3ATIysPHj4JZnfU)

clean_body: | | | I need your help to send a message. Because frankly, I’m about to lose my damn voice! I’ve been making headlines lately for getting a little riled up -- okay, for outright shouting -- at my GOP colleagues on the House floor. Because when it comes to speaking up for our workers and our democracy, I’m never going to hold my tongue. But our campaign’s deadline is tomorrow night, and I need YOUR help to let the country know that I’m not standing on my own. | In the age of Citizens United, money talks. But together, we’re gonna show the pundits and the national Republicans watching this race that we’ve got a winning team that’s ready to see this thing through to the end. Thank you, Tim Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Terry McAuliffe, please .

name: Dick Durbin
subject: The Senate is on the line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
This is an all-hands-on-deck situation. I need you to make a commitment to keeping the Senate blue in 2022.
#
There’s no time to sugarcoat things, Peter: _**We need to fight for the Senate.**_
This is an all-hands-on-deck situation. I need you to make a commitment to keeping the Senate blue in 2022.
**[Can I count on you to pitch in $5 or any amount to reach our mid-month goal to fight for the Democratic Senate majority? And if you can, will you make that a recurring contribution?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37697444/312256180/1881055903?refcode=dd_em_211019_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTEzMmZhYS1mZTMwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pyxYR0pJYnCNYIGpYOxOXWOhYIUqEmHZr0HvV-gLBbc=)**
**_Republicans are continuously obstructing_ any and all progress that President Biden and Democrats are trying to make for our country.** I’m sick of it. And I’m sure you are too.
It’s time to show Republicans that we want to fight for our families and demand affordable child care, action on climate change, as well as long overdue immigration reform. We can’t do that without our Senate majority.
**[That’s why we need to show the Republicans we’re ready to win. Will you chip in $5 or any amount?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37697445/312256186/1881055903?refcode=dd_em_211019_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTEzMmZhYS1mZTMwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pyxYR0pJYnCNYIGpYOxOXWOhYIUqEmHZr0HvV-gLBbc=)**
Together, we can continue to have a blue Senate in 2022.
My best,
Dick Durbin

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37697449/312256188/1881055903?refcode=dd_em_211019_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTEzMmZhYS1mZTMwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pyxYR0pJYnCNYIGpYOxOXWOhYIUqEmHZr0HvV-gLBbc=)**

body:
So far, thousands of people have signed on to say they’ve endorsed Cheri, and we’re hoping to add another 500 to that number today.
#

Winning this race and bringing change to our state can’t happen alone. It will require the largest people-powered campaign North Carolina has ever seen.
And it takes a shared commitment by each of us to do the work necessary to win this fight.
One small but important action you can take is personally endorsing Cheri Beasley’s campaign. It sends a powerful message that you’re all in to help us hold Democrats’ Senate majority and deliver real change for our families.
So far, thousands of people have signed on to say they’ve endorsed Cheri, and we’re hoping to add another 500 to that number today.
**That’s why we’re reaching out to ask you to add your name to the list of folks who’ve endorsed Cheri. What do you say?**
[**Will you add your name to say you personally endorse our campaign for Senate? It’s important to Cheri and to our team to know that we can count on your support in the tough fights ahead.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37697540/312256427/-488322519?refcode2=a1285ac2-fe30-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211019-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTI4NWFjMi1mZTMwLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xb3RPLA2coXa7ULvr0KHVy4QFqOLzlYAqZesPROHVho=&emci=9f285ac2-fe30-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=a1285ac2-fe30-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=20912107)

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: We need to win this battle on the campuses
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4katef88j2qp9rhtefu91tv59dscq16eqbqv1lg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cdhm4o74cph2bs) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has _**_NO_ _POWER_**_ to get involved in your medical decisions. **_PERIOD!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than __2,500 colleges and universities__ are _FORCING_ students to get the COVID vaccine... _DEMANDING_ that they publicly share their medical history... and _BANNING_ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with us today by making a generous, tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50, $75, or whatever you can possibly afford to help fuel our ongoing efforts?_**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zli6tcdu4o6dt4r5k9oo8i8vdili3slpimr42qmg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cdhm4o74cph2bs) [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znvqff37vau9552kgeoh3sab2s70lamga6tolo70_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cdhm4o74cph2bs) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a “NO FORCED VAX” campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re ready to ship out right away— and we must get them into the hands of students who need and want them right now. [**Your gift right now will help make that possible.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr69bj72cauemc4i864v48oh0cf23lqfluetsipg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cdhm4o74cph2bs) This move by the universities is not about vaccines AT ALL. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students — the least affected by the disease — must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. **The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with --__and put their policies on steroids_._** As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next! We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced vaccinations! With your gift of $25 today, you’ll help fund one activism kit for students on a campus that’s essentially forcing them to get the COVID vaccine. These activism kits are crucial to teaching students how to stand up for their freedom at these anti-liberty schools.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zeaulrdt372kku4cuopuhtm38ctgihhf0mk2goh8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cdhm4o74cph2bs) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjosdj7f5peh5nubjqkspb04tm82scndm62m03do_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cdhm4o74cph2bs) Thank you for your support! clean_body: By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal | Sponsored message | ---|---|--- Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has NO POWER to get involved in your medical decisions. PERIOD! But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are FORCING students to get the COVID vaccine... DEMANDING that they publicly share their medical history... and BANNING them from school if they don’t comply! My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a “NO FORCED VAX” campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re ready to ship out right away— and we must get them into the hands of students who need and want them right now. This move by the universities is not about vaccines AT ALL. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students — the least affected by the disease — must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with --and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his ONLINE college classes until he takes the vaccine! If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next! We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

| Friend,

With the Governor's election approaching, Terry McAuliffe went out of his way to make a pit stop in the 7th congressional district and campaign with his liberal ally, Abigail Spanberger.

Take a look for yourself...
[](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=d9807e3acb&e=ae0ea222da)
We aren’t writing to just give you an update; we are writing because these two want to force CRITICAL RACE THEORY on our children!
**Terry even said, “I don’t think parents should be telling schools what they should teach.”**
As a mother, Tina wants her daughter to be taught the fundamentals, not divisive and Marxist indoctrination.

That is why we want to take our survey below.
**WHERE DO YOU STAND?**

name: Nina Turner
subject: Friends, all that we love is on the line.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
We must have the courage to ask for more.

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37698433/312260929/1761773496?refcode=211019_CLTV_mvmtvideolaunch_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmZiN2QyNy0wNDMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pfR0gUNDtwAK_BPj1tkxzRue4l_OY9X6_tFOUVeS43U=)
---
Friends, all that we love is on the line. Our country is at a crossroads, and the American people deserve better.

We deserve universal healthcare and livable wages. We deserve clean air, clean water, and clean food. We deserve a well-funded public education system, from pre-k to college or trade school. We deserve a justice system that is just.

Although we did not get the outcome we wanted during the primary election in Ohio District 11, opportunities are in front of us. The work towards justice remains the same, and we will continue paving the way towards progress. We are not slowing down. **Lives and livelihoods are at stake.**

Our collective success is rooted in organizing—always. We must mobilize like-minded folks and build a bold coalition that demands change. clean_body: We must have the courage to ask for more. | | | = Friends, all that we love is on the line. Our country is at a crossroads, and the American people deserve better. We deserve universal healthcare and livable wages. We deserve clean air, clean water, and clean food. We deserve a well-funded public education system, from pre-k to college or trade school. We deserve a justice system that is just. Although we did not get the outcome we wanted during the primary election in Ohio District 11, opportunities are in front of us. The work towards justice remains the same, and we will continue paving the way towards progress. We are not slowing down. Lives and livelihoods are at stake. Our collective success is rooted in organizing—always. We must mobilize like-minded folks and build a bold coalition that demands change. We need to take action, come together, and push for the nation and world we want to inhabit. That is why we are building a movement... = ** Let's do this together. ****Nina Turner**** ************** ************ ******************EXPRESS DONATE to Nina Turner****************** ******************If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:****************** | ******************= "="****************** | ******************= "="****************** | ******************= "="****************** | ******************= "="****************** ---|---|---|--- Nina Turner is building a movement to empower working families and mobilize Democrats on key progressive issues that impact everyday Americans who have been left behind. body:

Peter,

Early returns are coming in from our race, and the results are alarming. The Democrats are not ignoring this race, they’re turning out in RECORD numbers to flip this seat.

**With just 15 days left in this race, our team needs to act NOW if we’re going to stay ahead of the Left’s record turnout.** Our team is taking immediate action to expand our voter-outreach programs and increase our ad budget to drive our voters to the polls.

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpq6ju7aiousr0kj0dc2pbh2mk3l6eq40dcr5t2o_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cdhm6ob2c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm29kvafbnksm72i3ghtnhq61d3f2ofbppejrip8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cdhm6ob2c5h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zki01m19up1qrt9ts8s6efkuuc0kal97tf2m02s0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cdhm6ob2c5h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
Trump Train News

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to unsubscribe](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zosctapoh2jkp4dfn3ng2qemt612vljhsmr2o0r8_)

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv20eec1kjibiiqu9kdnl8kbiee67jrsn840tt6g_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cdhm6ob2c5h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

| | Peter,

As a pediatrician, I hear stories every day from patients and their families about the struggles they face just to afford the rising costs of prescription medications. **[We can’t let corporate profits get in the way of necessary healthcare. Sign my petition if you agree >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37699921/312267593/1805139759?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTRmMDdjOC0wNzMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dU8VA6XP4n1_yxfE5WLtNKGNS7zERMuGY9nAPrZfnR0=&emci=0e8838f4-e630-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=014f07c8-0731-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=12666102)** | ****[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37699923/312267597/1805139759?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTRmMDdjOC0wNzMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dU8VA6XP4n1_yxfE5WLtNKGNS7zERMuGY9nAPrZfnR0=&emci=0e8838f4-e630-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=014f07c8-0731-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=12666102)****
---
In the state legislature, I was proud to write and pass legislation that forced big pharmaceutical companies to limit the cost of lifesaving drugs, make prescription drugs more affordable, and allow the state to investigate increases in prescription drug costs.

Today, Colorado is a leader in lowering prescription drug costs. But this isn’t a challenge unique to us. This is a nationwide problem, and it needs to be addressed at the federal level.

When I am in Congress I will stand up to big pharma — just like I did here in Colorado. But this can’t wait. **[I need 50 grassroots supporters from FL to join me and send Congress a message — it’s time to take action and lower prescription drug costs >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37699925/312267599/1805139759?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTRmMDdjOC0wNzMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dU8VA6XP4n1_yxfE5WLtNKGNS7zERMuGY9nAPrZfnR0=&emci=0e8838f4-e630-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=014f07c8-0731-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=12666102)**

Thank you,

Dr. Yadira Caraveo

body:
Calling All Patriots: look inside!

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58567459:JG6xHD2Nk:m:1:3253819041:BFEC87743E9F0B1648C491C80026DD99:r)

**The Trump Patriot movement is unstoppable**. From Florida to California, millions of freedom-loving Americans have shown their support for President Trump. But only the most dedicated are invited to join the 1776 Donor Club.

_Congratulations, you 're one of them!_

[**To join, all you have to do is chip in $17.76 to help freedom loving patriots across the nation fight back against the Left 's attacks.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58567459:JG6xHD2Nk:m:1:3253819041:BFEC87743E9F0B1648C491C80026DD99:r)

245 years ago our Founding Fathers declared independence and embarked on the greatest experiment in history. They laid the plans for a new nation built on the ideals of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.

_**But now those freedoms are under attack. And the Radical Left will not stop until they have dismantled this great nation from the inside out.**_

That's why we're asking top patriots, like yourself, to fight the good fight and keep America free from Pelosi's socialist agenda. We will not win this fight alone....

[**ACCEPT INVITATION**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58567459:JG6xHD2Nk:m:1:3253819041:BFEC87743E9F0B1648C491C80026DD99:r)

Peter, Donald Trump and House Conservatives are watching what you do in this moment: You can ignore this email and give Nancy Pelosi more power in Congress _OR_[**you can RUSH your $17.76 gift to join an elite group of America First patriots and leave Nancy Pelosi shaking in her boots!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58567459:JG6xHD2Nk:m:1:3253819041:BFEC87743E9F0B1648C491C80026DD99:r)

[**CHIP IN $17.76**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58567459:JG6xHD2Nk:m:1:3253819041:BFEC87743E9F0B1648C491C80026DD99:r)

America's Founders fought for our independence from big government. Now you've got the chance to do the same. [**Chip in $17.76 ASAP!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58567459:JG6xHD2Nk:m:1:3253819041:BFEC87743E9F0B1648C491C80026DD99:r)

Thank you,

1776 Donor Club

P.S. There are millions of other Trump Patriots who would happily join the 1776 Donor Club. We chose YOU! [**Answer the call**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58567459:JG6xHD2Nk:m:1:3253819041:BFEC87743E9F0B1648C491C80026DD99:r) or we will have to select the next conservative on our list...

___________________________________________
**
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58567460:JG6xHD2Nk:m:1:3253819041:BFEC87743E9F0B1648C491C80026DD99:r)

ATTN TRUMP PATRIOTS: TRUMP'S 2024 RUN HINGES ON FLIPPING 5 SEATS RED!**

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. She's determined to ERASE Trump's legacy and OBLITERATE his allies in Congress... _because she knows if we TAKE BACK THE HOUSE, Trump will run for PRESIDENT!_

We're facing an uphill battle. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER. [**Can we count on you to step up?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58567461:JG6xHD2Nk:m:1:3253819041:BFEC87743E9F0B1648C491C80026DD99:r)

[**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58567461:JG6xHD2Nk:m:1:3253819041:BFEC87743E9F0B1648C491C80026DD99:r)

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

| | Northwest Washington's natural resources are some of the prides of our nation. We represent the Puget Sound, America's largest estuary, as well as vital species like our orcas and salmon that call those waters home. A healthy environment is vital to our region's and our nation's economy and way of life. We must protect our lands, water, and wildlife. And we can create tens of thousands of family-wage jobs in Washington, and millions across the country. I am committed to increasing funding for low and zero-emission buses and ferries, investing in public transit, making transportation and the electric grid cleaner through new renewable energy infrastructure. Our fisheries rely on healthy oceans, and outdoor recreation in our forests and mountains is critical to so many family-wage jobs. **It is with that in mind that I am proud to announce an endorsement from the Sierra Club's National Political Team and Washington State Chapter** for our shared commitment to protecting our communities. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37700138/312268455/1596212816?refcode=2021-10-18-sierra-club-endorsement&refcode2=e9d12aaa-0831-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWQxMmFhYS0wODMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V-C1-yAd-9KitUgqR649ZwL3XBUOMymFB49FdhmTcow=) As founder and co-chair of the Estuaries Caucus, championing rich investment in our critical waters, and an avid supporter of our Land and Water Conservation Fund, this endorsement means a lot to me. For more than 120 years, the Sierra Club has been a top partner for protecting our most treasured natural assets.I have always been committed to protecting our environment and tirelessly fighting the climate crisis, and it means so much to me to have recognition from one of the most devoted groups to that effort across the country. **We only have one planet, and I will continue to fight every day name: Team Mondaire
subject: Join Mondaire in urging Congress to take action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

Team, climate change is real, and it’s directly affecting people in Westchester and Rockland Counties. In our district, Hurricane Ida damaged homes, destroyed small businesses, and tragically, took four lives.
Yet, Senator Joe Manchin is actively hindering Congress from addressing climate change in President Biden’s Build Back Better Act.
Low-income communities and communities of color experience climate change the worst. Across our country, these communities are exposed to polluted air and live in communities that lack basic infrastructure like weather-proof housing and public transportation. But it doesn’t have to be this way, team.
Human activity plays a major role in the climate crisis, and it’s time for Democrats to come together to ensure the Build Back Better Act addresses our biggest challenges and helps us make progress in our fight against climate change.
We have a narrow majority in Congress, so every Democrat needs to step up and fight for our climate goals.
[_**Add your name if you believe that Senator Joe Manchin should put aside his personal and financial interests, and stand with Democrats to take urgent action and include climate change provisions in the Build Back Better budget.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37700186/312268669/1593034663?refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_GEN_PET_AC_20211019_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWMzOWNlMy0wODMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ijT_KZi02Q7HtdKLIDCnqhIGY_5banJ8nT3uK3sSX1U=&emci=7ef21edd-0831-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=cec39ce3-0831-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=24719896)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37700187/312268670/1593034663?refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_GEN_PET_AC_20211019_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWMzOWNlMy0wODMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ijT_KZi02Q7HtdKLIDCnqhIGY_5banJ8nT3uK3sSX1U=&emci=7ef21edd-0831-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=cec39ce3-0831-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=24719896)**
Our most vulnerable communities are experiencing the worst of the climate crisis, and it’s shameful that politicians are turning a blind eye to it. It’s time to push Congress to ensure a livable future by taking action on climate.
[_**Please add your name and stand with Mondaire if you agree that Congress needs to protect our most vulnerable communities and create millions of new jobs in the process.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37700188/312268698/1593034663?refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_GEN_PET_AC_20211019_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWMzOWNlMy0wODMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ijT_KZi02Q7HtdKLIDCnqhIGY_5banJ8nT3uK3sSX1U=&emci=7ef21edd-0831-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=cec39ce3-0831-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=24719896)

clean_body: Team, climate change is real, and it’s directly affecting people in Westchester and Rockland Counties. In our district, Hurricane Ida damaged homes, destroyed small businesses, and tragically, took four lives. Yet, Senator Joe Manchin is actively hindering Congress from addressing climate change in President Biden’s Build Back Better Act. Low-income communities and communities of color experience climate change the worst. Across our country, these communities are exposed to polluted air and live in communities that lack basic infrastructure like weather-proof housing and public transportation. But it doesn’t have to be this way, team. Human activity plays a major role in the climate crisis, and it’s time for Democrats to come together to ensure the Build Back Better Act addresses our biggest challenges and helps us make progress in our fight against climate change. We have a narrow majority in Congress, so every Democrat needs to step up and fight for our climate goals. Our most vulnerable communities are experiencing the worst of the climate crisis, and it’s shameful that politicians are turning a blind eye to it. It’s time to push Congress to ensure a livable future by taking action on climate. Thank you for being a part of this team, Team Mondaire * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. name: Marjorie Taylor Greene & Mary Miller
subject: Impeach. Convict. Remove.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marry Miller for Congress
body:
Dear Peter,

IMPEACH. CONVICT. REMOVE.

I need you to sign your petition to help us
IMPEACH JOE BIDEN.
IMPEACH JOE BIDEN - SIGN YOUR PETITION
Last year, Mary and I were part of the
historic number of newly-elected pro-Trump conservative women who
took Washington, D.C. by storm.

Since her first day in office, she has served
as a faithful defender of the America First policies of secure
borders, low taxes, less regulations, and fair trade.

In fact, Mary has become one of my closest
allies in Congress - standing shoulder to shoulder with me by
co-sponsoring three articles of impeachment against Joe Biden.

You see, Mary Miller isn't a career
politician.

She is a farmer, a Christian, and a devoted
wife to her husband, Chris. She's also a mom of seven
homeschooled children and a grandmother of seventeen!

Unlike the D.C. elites, Mary understands the
value of hard work and the dignity that comes from earning an
honest living.

That's why she decided to step out of her
comfort zone and run for office.

Mary saw firsthand just how much President
Trump's America First policies boosted the economy.

Low taxes, less regulation, rising wages, and
energy independence brought real and positive change to her
Illinois community.

But President Trump's success also exposed
just how many other "status quo" politicians had failed
hardworking families like Mary's for too long...

Mary knew something had to change. She knew
conservatives like you deserved real America First representation
in Washington.

Today, it is such a blessing to have Mary
fighting beside me in Congress.
That's why I'm teaming up with Mary Miller to
IMPEACH JOE BIDEN - SIGN YOUR PETITION
You see, it's because of conservatives like
her that we have a real shot at stopping the left's socialist
takeover and saving our country.

But Mary's commitment to defending the
traditional American values of family, faith, and freedom has
made her the #1 target of the corrupt Democrat machine.

And they've already enlisted their elite
billionaire donors to spend millions of dollars to unseat her in
2022.

So, as we prepare for one of the most
important midterm elections in our history, we must make sure we
defend real America First conservatives like Mary.

That's why I'm asking you to do TWO things
today:

First, please read Mary's email below, which
lays out what's at stake if we don't take back our government
from Joe Biden and the corrupt, leftwing extremists who control
him.

And second, please consider making a generous
$35 grassroots donation to Mary Miller for Congress.

I can say, without hesitation, that it will
be money well spent. Mary Miller is the kind of real America
First conservative who will never stop fighting for us.

Today, I hope you will join me in fighting
for her.

Sincerely,

Marjorie Taylor Greene

Member of Congress (GA-14)

P.S. We need to keep America First patriots
like Mary Miller in Congress.

That's why I'm asking the most dedicated and
committed conservatives I know to please consider supporting Mary
with a generous $35 donation today.

Thank you!

Peter,

Joe Biden must be IMPEACH. CONVICTED.
REMOVED.

I had no choice but to rush you this email
without further delay.

I'm Congresswoman Mary Miller.

Last year, I was elected to Congress as a
true America First Conservative ready to take on the Swamp, defy
the establishment's rules, and be a thorn in the side of the fake
news media.

And well, let's just say our fight to put
America First hasn't made us very popular with the D.C. Ruling
Elite...

That's because, since day one, we've been
exposing Joe Biden's socialist plot to weaken our country through
illegal immigration, out-of-control inflation, and immoral and
unconstitutional mandates.

But now his incompetence and corruption
aren't just hurting us here at home...

Biden's botched Afghanistan withdrawal left
13 American service members dead, thousands of Americans stranded
behind enemy lines and billions of dollars of weapons and
military equipment in the hands of terrorists.

Peter, Joe Biden's failed leadership is a
threat to our national security, and his authoritarian mandates
are a threat to the American way of life.
That's why I'm teaming up with MTG to IMPEACH
JOE BIDEN - SIGN YOUR PETITION

That's also why I hope I can count on you to
join our team by signing your petition to IMPEACH JOE BIDEN and
give an urgent $15 pledge of support today.

But before you decide to join me, let me tell
you a little more about who I am - and who I'm not.

I'm the mother of seven children and the
grandmother of seventeen.

Together with my husband, Chris, we operate
the Oakland, IL grain and cattle farm that has been in our family
for over 40 years.

I'm also a former homeschool mother, a
Christian, and a Sunday School teacher.

What I'm not is a lawyer. Or a lobbyist. Or a
member of the establishment.

In short, I'm one of you. And I have no
interest in becoming one of them.

That's why I have a huge target on my back.

I know I don't need to tell you what's at
stake.

As one of our country's strongest
conservatives, you already knew Joe Biden would be a disaster for
our country...

You knew he was a corrupt career politician
who spent the last 50 years in Washington selling out America to
the highest bidder.

Now Biden is more concerned with appeasing
the most radical members of his base than actually defending our
country and protecting its citizens.
That's why Joe Biden must be removed from
office. SIGN YOUR PETITION TO IMPEACH BIDEN

But since filing these articles of
impeachment, the left has been after me like never before.

They know their majority hangs by a thread -
so now they're fundraising against me, attacking my record, and
shadow-banning me on social media.

I refuse to be intimidated.

And I hope you won't be either.

Because we MUST speak up now.

And we MUST hold the corrupt ruling class
accountable for the fraud and failure of the Joe Biden
Presidency.

But I can't do this on my own.

You see, even though recent polls show that a
majority of Americans believe Joe Biden is unfit for office,
there are still some conservatives who haven't signed on to our
articles of impeachment.

And the truth is, if I'm going to rally the
rest of the Republican Party to join this effort, I'm going to
need an overwhelming show of support.

That's where your help will make all the
difference.

So will you help me remove the most corrupt,
incompetent President ever foisted upon the American people?

And will you help me fight back against the
Democrats who are determined to silence me?

If your answer is yes, please sign your
pledge of support to IMPEACH JOE BIDEN along with a $15 gift
today.

And if you can give a larger gift of $25,
$50, $100, or any amount up to the $2,900 maximum, it would send
a loud and clear message that Americans want Joe Biden IMPEACHED
NOW.

This is a pivotal moment in history.
Americans everywhere are realizing Joe Biden's Presidency is a
failure and a fraud.

But we cannot wait - we must act today to
build on this momentum.

Thank you in advance for your support!

Sincerely,

Mary Miller
Congresswoman (R-IL)

P.S. Americans everywhere realize Joe Biden
is a failure and a fraud.

That's why it's time for Republicans to FIGHT
FOR OUR COUNTRY and IMPEACH JOE BIDEN.

Will you help me?

Please sign your pledge your support to
IMPEACH JOE BIDEN today.

Thank you!

Paid for by Marry Miller for Congress.

But Mary's commitment to defending the traditional American values of family, faith, and freedom has made her the #1 target of the corrupt Democrat machine. And they've already enlisted their elite billionaire donors to spend millions of dollars to unseat her in 2022. So, as we prepare for one of the most important midterm elections in our history, we must make sure we defend real America First conservatives like Mary. That's why I'm asking you to do TWO things today: First, please read Mary's email below, which lays out what's at stake if we don't take back our government from Joe Biden and the corrupt, leftwing extremists who control him. And second, please consider making a generous $35 grassroots donation to Mary Miller for Congress. I can say, without hesitation, that it will be money well spent. Mary Miller is the kind of real America First conservative who will never stop fighting for us. Today, I hope you will join me in fighting for her. Sincerely, Marjorie Taylor Greene Member of Congress (GA-14) P.S. We need to keep America First patriots like Mary Miller in Congress. That's why I'm asking the most dedicated and committed conservatives I know to please consider supporting Mary with a generous $35 donation today. Thank you! Peter, Joe Biden must be IMPEACH. CONVICTED. REMOVED. I had no choice but to rush you this email without further delay. I'm Congresswoman Mary Miller. Last year, I was elected to Congress as a true America First Conservative ready to take on the Swamp, defy the establishment's rules, and be a thorn in the side of the fake news media. And well, let's just say our fight to put America First hasn't made us very popular with the D.C. Ruling Elite... That's because, since day one, we've been exposing Joe Biden's socialist plot to weaken our country through illegal immigration, out-of-control inflation, and immoral and unconstitutional mandates. But now his incompetence and corruption aren't just hurting us here at home... Biden's botched Afghanistan withdrawal left 13 American service members dead, thousands of Americans stranded behind enemy lines and billions of dollars of weapons and military equipment in the hands of terrorists. Peter, Joe Biden's failed leadership is a threat to our national security, and his authoritarian mandates are a threat to the American way of life. That's why I'm teaming up with MTG to IMPEACH JOE BIDEN - SIGN YOUR PETITION That's also why I hope I can count on you to join our team by signing your petition to IMPEACH JOE BIDEN and give an urgent $15 pledge of support today. But before you decide to join me, let me tell you a little more about who I am - and who I'm not. I'm the mother of seven children and the grandmother of seventeen. Together with my husband, Chris, we operate the Oakland, IL grain and cattle farm that has been in our family for over 40 years. I'm also a former homeschool mother, a Christian, and a Sunday School teacher. What I'm not is a lawyer. Or a lobbyist. Or a member of the establishment. In short, I'm one of you. And I have no interest in becoming one of them. That's why I have a huge target on my back. I know I don't need to tell you what's at stake. As one of our country's strongest conservatives, you already knew Joe Biden would be a disaster for our country... You knew he was a corrupt career politician who spent the last 50 years in Washington selling out America to the highest bidder. Now Biden is more concerned with appeasing the most radical members of his base than actually defending our country and protecting its citizens. That's why Joe Biden must be removed from office. SIGN YOUR PETITION TO IMPEACH BIDEN But since filing these articles of impeachment, the left has been after me like never before. They know their majority hangs by a thread - so now they're fundraising against me, attacking my record, and shadow-banning me on social media. I refuse to be intimidated. And I hope you won't be either. Because we MUST speak up now. And we MUST hold the corrupt ruling class accountable for the fraud and failure of the Joe Biden Presidency. But I can't do this on my own. You see, even though recent polls show that a majority of Americans believe Joe Biden is unfit for office, there are still some conservatives who haven't signed on to our articles of impeachment. And the truth is, if I'm going to rally the rest of the Republican Party to join this effort, I'm going to need an overwhelming show of support. That's where your help will make all the difference. So will you help me remove the most corrupt, incompetent President ever foisted upon the American people? And will you help me fight back against the Democrats who are determined to silence me? If your answer is yes, please sign your pledge of support to IMPEACH JOE BIDEN along with a $15 gift today. And if you can give a larger gift of $25, $50, $100, or any amount up to the $2,900 maximum, it would send a loud and clear message that Americans want Joe Biden IMPEACHED NOW. This is a pivotal moment in history. Americans everywhere are realizing Joe Biden's Presidency is a failure and a fraud. But we cannot wait - we must act today to build on this momentum. Thank you in advance for your support! Sincerely, Mary Miller Congresswoman (R-IL) P.S. Americans everywhere realize Joe Biden is a failure and a fraud. That's why it's time for Republicans to FIGHT FOR OUR COUNTRY and IMPEACH JOE BIDEN. Will you help me? Please sign your pledge your support to IMPEACH JOE BIDEN today. Thank you! Paid for by Marry Miller for Congress. This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system January 17, 2021. Hey friend,
Wow. That's all we can say.
This past weekend we had our first candidate forum of this campaign and Kirsten blew it out of the water. Without a doubt, she is the best choice for this district.
While it was disapointing that not all of the candidates were able to participate, Kirsten appreciated the opportunity to share her vision for the district and the conversation was full of valuable insight!

As both an educator and as an elected official, fighting for environmental justice has always been a top priority for Kirsten.
She made a strong case for immediate action on climate change, which will both protect our environment AND create more good-paying clean energy jobs. Kirsten's passion and her expertise are badly needed in Congress, particularly on this critical issue.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37700761/312271526/-1327914006?refcode=X_101821_EventRecap&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTBhMjhhZC0wYzMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=StFsI4RB1_nIwtb1G7wGZxhPt6R7pxznDFmTafXHvjY=)

name: Monica De La Cruz
subject: Do you care if Texas turns blue?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
5 reasons you should be paying attention to this Texas House race. South Texas shifted more dramatically toward Trump than any other region in the Uni | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bedee5855958420fb5a881222430e50e&_e=u-Ql1lOKIfJ1ySsdeXArX7nZ9pIHQUd6syVFmz3y8qbRJiZ8Qs9q5INsesZn7m8b64A6sS-q3olXq9ad3HEWZoLgPWITBhFaSS_yTjgjRwhgN0QzwBmXxS1KRsyH9Y9iGi8Cc3INvzJnyVeRH44x6dVC_64rQSGVbJUkcuSp8m43DhkIodcXLXfY11IlDSAtVidpr6en55j9Y8-6LaSgJ4-9Wll61F2IYiJx14-U8xFz_JwLgDIcbguYShn3OXDSIG1DOYOvsossHWRRh3MrTGqhrJDNECDo6wlKpOiTm1CO0lxhFXQUgJkzafNUKD9CIoiUypXZYq7sQSq-9NS9iZlpfES6zp94dJUPJ0apkjaj5MtbYp9IznJhEy2cPWpS7ZRC9jRz7Pb0MerTeTHK71Ov7gfJnb6hoPv8srYuIZ8lRLRdj7a9szmlC9kRiVArpyFQ3E325DxXY-WEUQEBKLhINEt_MoAC3AqaQygcuUI%3D)
---
Fellow patriot,

If you take a moment to listen to the mainstream media talking heads or read opinion pieces in left-leaning newspapers, there is a good chance that if they reference Texas in a story it’s likely they’re trying to get the reader to buy into the narrative that Texas is on the cusp of flipping Democrat in the near future and that Republicans are doing everything in their power to stop the inevitable.

**But that couldn’t be further from the truth.**

My name is Monica De La Cruz and I’m a conservative Hispanic Republican running for Congress. 2021 marks the second year in a row that I’m running to represent Texas 15th Congressional District in the U.S. House– **which since 1903 has only ever elected Democrats as federal representatives in Washington. **

Here are five reasons you need to pay attention to my congressional race deep in the heart of South Texas:
1. **Last year I ran against a Democrat incumbent no one thought I could beat; while I came up short, I only missed the mark by 6,588 votes – or 2.8%**
2. South Texas shifted more dramatically toward Trump than any other region in the United States in the 2020 election. The counties comprising the Rio Grande Valley are home to communities that are almost entirely Hispanic.
3. **Despite what national Democrats want people to believe, Hispanics in South Texas support border security, despite being labeled as “self-hating” by angry leftists.**
4. Democrats look at Hispanics through a single lens, whether they’re trying to court Mexicans in Los Angeles or Puerto Ricans in New York. South Texas is neither.
5. **Tejanos (as we call ourselves in South Texas) are culturally conservative; There is nothing conservative about today’s Democrat Party.**

Flipping the House Republican isn’t going to just happen by itself. The Republican Party has to invest in areas in which we’ve not traditionally had a presence. That’s why I’m asking you to chip in whatever you can right now. **[We’re making a splash here in South Texas and we cannot let up. Our momentum grows by the day- will you help ensure it doesn’t let up?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bedee5855958420fb5a881222430e50e&_e=u-Ql1lOKIfJ1ySsdeXArX7nZ9pIHQUd6syVFmz3y8qbRJiZ8Qs9q5INsesZn7m8b64A6sS-q3olXq9ad3HEWZoLgPWITBhFaSS_yTjgjRwhgN0QzwBmXxS1KRsyH9Y9iGi8Cc3INvzJnyVeRH44x6dVC_64rQSGVbJUkcuSp8m43DhkIodcXLXfY11IlDSAtVidpr6en55j9Y8-6LaSgJ4-9Wll61F2IYiJx14-U8xFz_JwLgDIcbguYShn3OXDSIG1DOYOvsossHWRRh3MrTCXj77K7AtjmZ5RkwWq_hJJs1xil_IRRNFUw2vXvnQ1E0-L5ung5839Muzhllh9nMptgVICQBA-rFhenSlPihdEnZcrbloxecq2YQEoYPYtKUNaG8Avc_pndHMueo3RRapFa-vzehYVcBMV4_eHuTpXt2v1Mf8Bg1eQHTMfYuvISdtztEEnu8is16MifFSPQe9_FvaYxFsNJHUiqM-rJiXI%3D)**

[**INVEST IN HISPANIC REPUBLICANS
CHIP IN $5 NOW -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bedee5855958420fb5a881222430e50e&_e=u-Ql1lOKIfJ1ySsdeXArX7nZ9pIHQUd6syVFmz3y8qbRJiZ8Qs9q5INsesZn7m8b64A6sS-q3olXq9ad3HEWZoLgPWITBhFaSS_yTjgjRwhgN0QzwBmXxS1KRsyH9Y9iGi8Cc3INvzJnyVeRH44x6dVC_64rQSGVbJUkcuSp8m43DhkIodcXLXfY11IlDSAtVidpr6en55j9Y8-6LaSgJ4-9Wll61F2IYiJx14-U8xFz_JwLgDIcbguYShn3OXDSIG1DOYOvsossHWRRh3MrTAzcdk9sNHN1hDTGCcc_IFCAK5nZP_YHvPLarCd9UtWg6p5tB4tWv19q_8_BGUe5tooBAoIXR5-R8-nu1lhNtWd4TVRcftJ7eSJ4LkZ8eExXey-952n566eLEoLALrD89SZUQ2I316al3ooojdSyghdT0jxnWjxgl9g43SZFPPt7_YXCtFJ81GymwxxETNRNm7DahgcSu4fkQBP8-pNrMrI%3D)
The fact of the matter is that Hispanics, which make up nearly 30% of eligible voters in Texas, are increasingly becoming a force to be reckoned with in Texas politics – presenting a big problem for Democrats as they look to 1.) drag Texas further to the left and 2.) Hold onto their razor-thin majority in the House.

_“**For decade after decade, part of being Hispanic in South Texas, just like wrapping tamales on Christmas Eve or listening to Selena at family reunions, meant voting Democratic, even as the party became less welcoming to those with conservative views**.”

_ Chances are if you’re reading this right now, you opened the email because of the subject line I chose. Texas is for Republicans what California is for Democrats: Our heartland and stronghold. **For Democrats in Texas and Republicans in California** , the hope that the party in power will overplay their hand is always front of mind.

**[With your immediate help, we can ensure that Democrats never succeed in their quest to turn Texas into the next California.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bedee5855958420fb5a881222430e50e&_e=u-Ql1lOKIfJ1ySsdeXArX7nZ9pIHQUd6syVFmz3y8qbRJiZ8Qs9q5INsesZn7m8b64A6sS-q3olXq9ad3HEWZoLgPWITBhFaSS_yTjgjRwhgN0QzwBmXxS1KRsyH9Y9iGi8Cc3INvzJnyVeRH44x6dVC_64rQSGVbJUkcuSp8m43DhkIodcXLXfY11IlDSAtVidpr6en55j9Y8-6LaSgJ4-9Wll61F2IYiJx14-U8xFz_JwLgDIcbguYShn3OXDSIG1DOYOvsossHWRRh3MrTEbwbc0IPhRq_JfAiVsTAMBm9IsGTCxxzq5yHjhP48nK7l2tZNLECAJFVeLXnmgQR-XG9Gxftlo0OfOYepc4Ux5Hs_RtBbBVwZMnbpHQCbA5DexwJxZIUsza4Ev330jLkAciuW8B8SYGZpwhqMleUXEvFfTLdlIxgUHGG_sYNXjpP5L4RS46qXLtj8hQfgfOIh_PwyiOYfOmHdT2Me9Os-I%3D)**

Thank you for your time,

Monica De La Cruz

[**INVEST IN HISPANIC REPUBLICANS
CHIP IN $5 NOW ->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bedee5855958420fb5a881222430e50e&_e=u-Ql1lOKIfJ1ySsdeXArX7nZ9pIHQUd6syVFmz3y8qbRJiZ8Qs9q5INsesZn7m8b64A6sS-q3olXq9ad3HEWZoLgPWITBhFaSS_yTjgjRwhgN0QzwBmXxS1KRsyH9Y9iGi8Cc3INvzJnyVeRH44x6dVC_64rQSGVbJUkcuSp8m43DhkIodcXLXfY11IlDSAtVidpr6en55j9Y8-6LaSgJ4-9Wll61F2IYiJx14-U8xFz_JwLgDIcbguYShn3OXDSIG1DOYOvsossHWRRh3MrTEcHmfqbslVm82uhfD-NGpYvbuW9ff3T3PU5lzLhtJZw4L8cw1uvLL9AXCn3uarhnPWLKEPcvd-DMmRCuhw-1kF62lzNa8JrRaJ_KZLhw8ap9qFAa01R5VH2Dlm2gvRCuRAxcnaKwQ9j8HqXMJ1GtjPQvJzwKYqPmOFner7KMFQRw4B_Ed-3HU-1yNbOYygOuR4J_ARMpCPl_3OE7r865D0%3D)

| | Hey there, Derek! Y’all we’ve really reached peak crunch time for Election Day. We’re just TWO weeks away from the biggest day of the year and we have to make every moment count. Part of my job on the finance team is to make sure we’re bringing in enough money to fully fund our ground game. Listen, **Terry told us we need to raise another $70,000 to expand our Get Out the Vote operations** in key districts where we need to increase Democratic turnout between now and Election Day. To keep Virginia blue in this upcoming election we need to win everywhere — _especially in these key districts_ — and we can’t do that unless we hit this goal so we can continue to ramp up our mobilization efforts. I’m reaching out to you and many other strong grassroots supporters like you,Derek because your donation of $10 or $25 could be what helps us turn out the final votes we need. **[Can I count on you to chip in to help us get Virginia Democrats to the polls and keep Glenn Youngkin and his Trump agenda out of the Governor’s office?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37701367/312274451/272180825?refcode=dpva-em-211019-2weeks&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjVjY2JjNS0wZTMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uuhT56S11hlGXLATDHGwuURKigvmcAagpMkcOVszZvE=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Hey Peter, Today, pastor, counselor, and fellow Democrat Casey Nicholson announced that he’s dropping out of the race for Tennessee’s next governor. I know firsthand how difficult that decision to run for office can be. It takes courage, fortitude, and, most importantly, a commitment to something much, much bigger than yourself. Casey has those qualities in spades. His grassroots campaign serves as a reminder of how to put people first and empower our communities. **Thank you, Casey, for stepping up to fight for the people of our state.** We look forward to continuing this fight with you and Democrats across all of the state. Because just like Casey’s, ours is a campaign for ALL Tennesseans. No matter who you’ve supported in the past — Democrat, Republican, or independent — together we’re going to build Tennessee into a place where everyone thrives. [_**Make a contribution of any amount now to help us keep growing this movement.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37701509/312274825/862036749?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211019casey_JM_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWNjYWNkYS0wZTMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R3LYo8Dx0XQIu_WQq1bqu5ggea0ob8W14805bcDdtvw=) | [Donate ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37701511/312274827/-103157484?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211019casey_JM_all_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWNjYWNkYS0wZTMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R3LYo8Dx0XQIu_WQq1bqu5ggea0ob8W14805bcDdtvw=)
