name: Martin Heinrich
subject: “first endorser”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37701675/312275931/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20211019_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGVjNWRjNC0wZjMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DFMtuy7k3yNSETby0d4grdOUSUzE3rYXT3tSsSDkKdo=&emci=ea359ef9-0931-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=bdec5dc4-0f31-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=252045)
---
Folks, over the years I’ve realized that leadership requires risk — even when I’m not on the ticket. Don’t get me wrong, my own Senate elections are important. But it’s equally important to elect even more folks across the state whose hearts and actions are rooted in what’s best for New Mexico. That’s why I make my endorsements in races — local and federal — early. Some folks joke I’m the state’s “first endorser” — but I don’t weigh in at the start of a race just for the sake of being first. I endorse early because getting strong candidates the resources and support they need makes a real difference in the outcome of a race. The results speak for themselves. I endorsed 15 primary candidates across New Mexico in the 2020 elections, including four challengers, three open seats, and eight incumbents. **All 15 of those candidates won their races.** Then, I endorsed 55 candidates in the general election —**with 42 claiming victory.** Now, every single candidate I endorse doesn’t always win. But that’s OK. It’s not only the end result that matters. It’s also important to help elevate candidates who give important issues a platform — like preserving our public lands, improving our education system, and taking action on climate change. **Win or lose, these candidates lay the groundwork for a stronger, more prosperous New Mexico for all. (But we’ve sure had a lot of wins!)** **So, will you split a donation between my campaign and my leadership fund to help support strong candidates in New Mexico and make a real difference for our state?** _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will immediately be split between Martin Heinrich and Lobo Leadership Fund:_ | [$10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37701676/312275932/1317197333?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20211019_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGVjNWRjNC0wZjMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DFMtuy7k3yNSETby0d4grdOUSUzE3rYXT3tSsSDkKdo=) | [$25 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37701677/312275933/1317197333?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20211019_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGVjNWRjNC0wZjMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DFMtuy7k3yNSETby0d4grdOUSUzE3rYXT3tSsSDkKdo=)

clean_body: Folks, over the years I’ve realized that leadership requires risk — even when I’m not on the ticket. Don’t get me wrong, my own Senate elections are important. But it’s equally important to elect even more folks across the state whose hearts and actions are rooted in what’s best for New Mexico. That’s why I make my endorsements in races — local and federal — early. Some folks joke I’m the state’s “first endorser” — but I don’t weigh in at the start of a race just for the sake of being first. I endorse early because getting strong candidates the resources and support they need makes a real difference in the outcome of a race. The results speak for themselves. I endorsed 15 primary candidates across New Mexico in the 2020 elections, including four challengers, three open seats, and eight incumbents. All 15 of those candidates won their races. Then, I endorsed 55 candidates in the general election —with 42 claiming victory. Now, every single candidate I endorse doesn’t always win. But that’s OK. It’s not only the end result that matters. It’s also important to help elevate candidates who give important issues a platform — like preserving our public lands, improving our education system, and taking action on climate change. Win or lose, these candidates lay the groundwork for a stronger, more prosperous New Mexico for all. (But we’ve sure had a lot of wins!) So, will you split a donation between my campaign and my leadership fund to help support strong candidates in New Mexico and make a real difference for our state? If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will immediately be split between Martin Heinrich and Lobo Leadership Fund: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Your grassroots contributions make a real impact, especially in close races. Thank you. — Martin | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. | | **POLITICO: Republicans terrified of 2022 election**
Here’s the honest truth straight from Politico:

**Republicans are DREADING this upcoming election because of our Democrats’ chances.**

And they absolutely should be, Peter.

Just this month, 100% of you that took my October Priorities Survey told me Florida Republicans are not representing your interests.

**But make no mistake, Republicans are already laying the groundwork to better their chances -- they’ve enacted new voter restriction laws to suppress every last voter that won’t support them.**

That’s why we can’t slow down our efforts one bit.

I need each and every one of you to stand up for Democrats, like me, who are taking this fight against the Republican agenda head on.

I’m calling on 500 grassroots supporters to sign on and CONDEMN these Republicans for trying to suppress voices in our electorate.

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: WSJ: In 2022, It’s the Culture, Stupid
body:
[](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=08902cf5c1b144a9b297af7d83f00959&_e=YmrHWnD2Z2gB4g_lXy_5IopBFG-KaqqjUfZxeUfRAzGUAeBZR42daA_jRQ_jihZqqlLZjrL8BYNQfDcQARydZHV39RfSoIzIjmcE5CkIhgw8EcpakQsvtHH_YM1mQ3VbFqr4Lg1tGXQaobkwXf84hfRseKzJ8b-sykQn_uVnE_-zEdnaLwRWTh1CPRQcNsqZ12LFvgKh_oeZ5uwYZdUwsH_vFF-mQvsKTeQW4Xn2_cmgSj5FFObCcBPhBDGpCRm1y1JwoyXR_15NVsfsw2QXmA%3D%3D) In 2022, It’s the Culture, Stupid By Bobby Jindal Democrats’ economic overreach is bad enough, but it isn’t the Republicans’ most effective line of attack. | |
---
Progressive Democrats, not content to accept incremental steps toward a larger, more powerful government, have invested their hopes and proposals in President Biden’s bloated reconciliation package. They want to use their party’s slender majorities to move the country as hard left as they can, fearing midterm election losses mean they won’t soon get the chance again.

Democratic leaders hope they keep their slim majorities by giving other people’s money to as many groups as possible, but they’re undermining their spending initiatives with extreme cultural positions. It is going to be hard for liberals to buy voters’ loyalty with “free” child care, paid family leave, community college and dental benefits at the same time they denounce their constituents as racist...
_Read more_**[HERE](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=08902cf5c1b144a9b297af7d83f00959&_e=YmrHWnD2Z2gB4g_lXy_5ItOSHVvVAOC77_Kz8HdTHM_6e6LU84Z444Nki-u0CWCzYpj2HSMUwD6HvzCiWiKsEcTs-cvdo2RSh1LmiruecY4qXx84HF9nPq196DWmYxj617xemI46iN2ysVJKB25DomF_TqNN-AbRB9YgcH-F7eyFn9QRqq76xG85-Y_nbFg0yhwjtvb78y3OQR9M9SBhffrL8IgipjAFu4HVGXvK6PXx2U3NDWQktFQ6DM1QUwOMtCzb8jaLLuymiPyBlvshaWNAOs__npSVkblMrYgSrQQrx1SbqNXPv0tYho9mcjo441cUdeaduqttDJdur3WZ8ZComIH77_ffzFmA01MFszjpXN-sJmDfHCIdJcL1wx0h)**.

body:
My friend Jacky Rosen said I should reach out, because all the national attention means Florida is being flooded with GOP dark money.
#
All eyes are on this movement, team. As I challenge one of the most powerful GOP politicians, this fight to flip Florida blue is turning into the "marquee race" of 2022.
But my friend Jacky Rosen said I should reach out, because all of that national attention means Florida is being _flooded_ with GOP dark money. And unlike Rubio, I don't get massive checks from Republican billionaires -- I depend on grassroots donors like you.
**[That's why I'm reaching out to you personally. I can only replace Rubio if people like you stand firmly by my side, every step of the way. So please, will you split $5 or more between me and Jacky Rosen to join my Replace Rubio movement before tonight's midnight deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37702115/312278093/-895363003?refcode=jr_em_nd_211019_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzE5NjM4MS0xMjMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DdZGaGrW29veb0QOrG025Wppp5UpwqbPFqb6LKtPy3Y=)**
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37702116/312278094/-895363003?refcode=jr_em_nd_211019_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzE5NjM4MS0xMjMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DdZGaGrW29veb0QOrG025Wppp5UpwqbPFqb6LKtPy3Y=)**
**Florida is one of the states most likely to determine Senate control** , which means Rubio won't be going at this alone -- in fact, the Senate Republican campaign fundraising arm already helped him raise $28 MILLION! So it's no surprise he already has the resources on hand to run deceitful attack ads smearing my reputation.There’s so much on the line here -- if we don’t flip this seat and expand the Senate majority, Mitch McConnell will snatch back the gavel and plow forward with his dangerous agenda. We can’t afford that, folks.
This race won't be easy, but I know we can deliver better leadership for Floridians and expand our Democratic Senate majority -- if we work together to Replace Rubio. Competing against a well-funded incumbent is a herculean effort, so I'm asking you now: **Will you join me in this fight to flip Florida blue?**
**[There are only hours left to become a Replace Rubio member, and I simply can't win in Florida without your help. So please, split a $5 between my campaign and Jacky Rosen today to help me replace Marco Rubio and expand our Democratic Senate majority! ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37702117/312278095/-895363003?refcode=jr_em_nd_211019_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzE5NjM4MS0xMjMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DdZGaGrW29veb0QOrG025Wppp5UpwqbPFqb6LKtPy3Y=)**
Thanks for joining me in the fight to defend our Senate majority. I'm so proud to have Democrats like you by my side.
Congresswoman Val Demings

subject: What’s emptier – grocery shelves or Biden’s promises?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KISTNER FOR CONGRESS
body:
It’s time for the Biden Administration to address their failing economy, devastating supply chain, border crisis, and soaring inflation. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=664f9a7c50ff4398914264a10c5b0510&_e=9ECrIp0JPjeVkhuVa5edbAMc4IRrcMYlqAeEgwsHpvrVK2QUuBwH6TMEZE59mEENhsxcnioKhxsilpYSJWVw7MemakMa_jqusiPTTDdpr3RkkhQLXYqfJCPw6bKH1foDy6GbS4t3zRsIJSTTmkOsHt29tAFvwuXZXiCQvtUlxxY6I3Xc7Y8JHPSAD6jQR-lQ40y-1izpTxXPRIobkjtngLNZJLee5MsZkGP0tLJ0Y-epxlL3rBLhfPPOU2PUeUo_s-01rTL7yGN4xDhc34X1-i87Lo4jTzAf8S97BP1KMlXP83VGLqAj7Qeo1wwSoYHegPnz8gr3ewhFrR7aDtBYTiF280lYK2076WzM-Qwu3NvD_j4lRtZ1iWI0ROoXsdNUBolUCkCGJEDtgzZYNjEduIXpsj1HUy7ixhKqk8pmv9ywLTBxUUiHinddi4qNgW67A6chTC7_ZsqCXBUdJ8TlkCq3dHaKcbuzUtWPcIqPENVQIv-fAwCpC7TWyJbEnxzJiK0DqASsQHubwWrLkjU_yBzHs_t80qz4tZrIrHIvoHM%3D)

---
Fellow American - what’s emptier, shelves at the grocery store, or Biden’s empty promises to fix the problems in America that he created?

_Empty shelves at the grocery store._

_Shortages of people willing to work._

_Gas prices are at an all-time high._

_Kids not being able to get Christmas presents._

**This is Joe Biden’s America.**

It’s time for the Biden Administration to address their failing economy, devastating supply chain, border crisis, and soaring inflation.

[**I’m calling on Joe Biden to do something,_anything_ , to fix the problems he’s created. Will you help him prioritize what he needs to do first since he’s clearly unable to do so?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=664f9a7c50ff4398914264a10c5b0510&_e=9ECrIp0JPjeVkhuVa5edbAMc4IRrcMYlqAeEgwsHpvrVK2QUuBwH6TMEZE59mEENhsxcnioKhxsilpYSJWVw7MemakMa_jqusiPTTDdpr3RkkhQLXYqfJCPw6bKH1foDy6GbS4t3zRsIJSTTmkOsHt29tAFvwuXZXiCQvtUlxxY6I3Xc7Y8JHPSAD6jQR-lQ40y-1izpTxXPRIobkjtngLNZJLee5MsZkGP0tLJ0Y-epxlL3rBLhfPPOU2PUeUo_s-01rTL7yGN4xDhc34X1-i87Lo4jTzAf8S97BP1KMlXP83VGLqAj7Qeo1wwSoYHegPnz8gr3ewhFrR7aDtBYThFHkmc_1VXAqx3VOMVf53YBfQ3L9Nj1w7MjOaNbrZWCtRFpb9GTU9vxkhBauOnmKi8xHYk7TAsuTGAKnIiq_4roXhgVBg0e-bdxsBmRRUjg7O7dn18oKqZE496sTQnN2Ff4yahLEL75ao_hf99HCMwhU2eJDITpwxeZ6o21bE_SAy8KzRl82PLEAZwNmRw1SfI4eVXNd4ewkvk-2aPNnWg%3D)

[** ****PRIORITIZE BIDEN’S CRISES ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=664f9a7c50ff4398914264a10c5b0510&_e=9ECrIp0JPjeVkhuVa5edbAMc4IRrcMYlqAeEgwsHpvrVK2QUuBwH6TMEZE59mEENhsxcnioKhxsilpYSJWVw7MemakMa_jqusiPTTDdpr3RkkhQLXYqfJCPw6bKH1foDy6GbS4t3zRsIJSTTmkOsHt29tAFvwuXZXiCQvtUlxxY6I3Xc7Y8JHPSAD6jQR-lQ40y-1izpTxXPRIobkjtngLNZJLee5MsZkGP0tLJ0Y-epxlL3rBLhfPPOU2PUeUo_s-01rTL7yGN4xDhc34X1-i87Lo4jTzAf8S97BP1KMlXP83VGLqAj7Qeo1wwSoYHegPnz8gr3ewhFrR7aDtBYTipmgJOJ26sTwTZjWq4Makb1ZoheS6od_PhL9qHQdKmMDhRWtN4yoQsTvCZbW7gwGhEW0Fgxm59Jby3uugMsZrhL7KfXhKHtexrRtDizZVeUO1lZdAJRiFrq7ZcaR95nTRZDr2Iv-PsOn76-rpMoWjDFNhMqrvFaRhZwoPeNKI3Dhow2lFsNkxzLH5pIN06MK1YInNOVdCNxUPQ0pJNO9yQ%3D)
It’s time to get America back on track, take the power back from Democrats, and put an END to the issues that seem to multiply under Biden’s leadership.

Is Joe Biden so incompetent that he can’t fix the problems that he created, _or does he simply not care about the people they hurt._

I guarantee that Biden, Kamala, and Pelosi haven’t felt the effects of inflation or shortages, living in their million-dollar-plus mansions with staff to tend to their needs.

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Biden’s attack on Christians MUST END
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
body:
Do you think the Biden Regime’s push for inclusiveness includes Christians?
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/moFUF8ze78C2oDBHwjbhXA/GSpqJyWrfuaRpqAQtSJ8Sg)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/moFUF8ze78C2oDBHwjbhXA/GSpqJyWrfuaRpqAQtSJ8Sg) Do you think the Biden Regime’s push for inclusiveness includes Christians?

I can tell you right now, **Biden and his lackeys in Congress are doing all they can to silence and even MOCK Christians**.

Earlier this year, the IRS denied the non-profit application of a group called Christians Engaged because the “experts” at the tax-collecting agency concluded that the “Bible’s teachings are typically affiliated with the Republican party and candidates.”

After a national uproar, the decision was overturned – but that was just the start of the Biden Regime’s attack on Christians.

Last week, an anti-Christian, LGBT activist, Brenda “Sue” Fulton, was nominated to oversee our military’s chaplains.

Sue Fulton is on record tweeting about Republicans and Christians calling them, “right-wing anti-everyone nutjobs falling in love with a dictatorship.”

| | [STOP THE LEFTIST TAKEOVER](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/moFUF8ze78C2oDBHwjbhXA/GSpqJyWrfuaRpqAQtSJ8Sg)
---

But wait, that’s not all.

Fulton has stated her contempt for Christian chaplains saying that they “give up some of their rights as ministers when they become military chaplains” and that **“the vast majority of white evangelical leaders are utterly unmoored from the gospel of Jesus Christ.”**

Fulton, who has made a career out of trolling the Christian right and trying her best to destroy institutions like West Point, is now in charge of religious affairs for the United States Military.

**And the attacks will keep on coming if we fail to take back Congress next year!**

| [SEND LAURA LOOMER TO CONGRESS](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/moFUF8ze78C2oDBHwjbhXA/GSpqJyWrfuaRpqAQtSJ8Sg)
---

**Historically, Christians are the most persecuted people in the world and that will continue – even here in America – if we don’t fight back against Joe Biden’s Jihad against the Christian Right.**

I’ve spent my career fighting to protect our institutions and Judeo/Christian values from hateful people like Sue Fulton, and [**I need your help so I can continue the fight as a member of Congress**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/moFUF8ze78C2oDBHwjbhXA/GSpqJyWrfuaRpqAQtSJ8Sg).

The Mid-Term Elections are coming up fast – and the Biden Regime is in a rush to do everything they can to jam-pack our government with Leftists like Fulton.

| [STOP THE LEFTIST TAKEOVER](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/moFUF8ze78C2oDBHwjbhXA/GSpqJyWrfuaRpqAQtSJ8Sg)
---

You’ll need [**watchdogs like me who will help stop the next Leftist activist takeover**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/moFUF8ze78C2oDBHwjbhXA/GSpqJyWrfuaRpqAQtSJ8Sg) while keeping a close eye on the thousands of Biden Appointees who are already working from within to destroy our Republic.

If you haven’t already done so today, [**please donate to support my campaign**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/moFUF8ze78C2oDBHwjbhXA/GSpqJyWrfuaRpqAQtSJ8Sg) and help me keep fighting for our values.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

name: John Fetterman
subject: re: Governor Terry McAuliffe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
The polls are showing this race *wayyyyy* too close for comfort just two weeks out.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20211019-3080-header&t=1&akid=3080%2E434096%2EFsiUu-)
I've got a bit of a unique request for yinz today, Peter.
[**_Today, I am personally asking you to split a $10 donation between my campaign and Terry McAuliffe's (D) campaign for Governor of Virginia._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32606?refcode=em20211019-3080&t=2&akid=3080%2E434096%2EFsiUu-)
Here's why I'm asking:
The Virginia governor's election is now just two weeks away, and it's been rated as a **Toss Up** by _the Cook Political Report_ (just like our race here in PA)!
The choice is stark. On one hand there's Terry McAuliffe, a Democrat who's proven his ability to deliver real, bold progress to working people across their Commonwealth. And on the GOP side, there's a far-right Trump-backed ultra-millionaire who wants to restrict abortion access, is a lifetime member of the NRA, and who'd take a sledgehammer to our sacred right to vote.
To you + me, Peter, this decision might be a no-brainer. **Yet recent polls have shown the race locked in a statistical tie — and polls could get *even tighter* in these final, crucial weeks.** That's why I'm asking you to join me in throwing your support behind Democrat Terry McAuliffe as he fights to prevent another Trump 2.0 from winning this critical governorship in just two weeks.
[**_If it makes sense for your budget, would you take this important opportunity to split a $10 donation between Terry McAuliffe's race for Virginia Governor and our campaign? The polls are showing this race as neck and neck, so I'm really hoping you'll join me in fighting to hold this governorship. You can use this link._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32606?refcode=em20211019-3080&t=3&akid=3080%2E434096%2EFsiUu-)
**[Contribute $10](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32606?refcode=em20211019-3080&t=22&akid=3080%2E434096%2EFsiUu-)**
As Lt. Governor of Pennsylvania, I have a front row seat to the kinds of really big decisions that get made by a governor every single day.
That is exactly why I can tell you — without ANY exaggeration — that letting a Donald Trump-endorsed Republican win this race would be detrimental to the working families of Virginia, and could pose a critical threat to the progress Dems have fought for to gain more governorships nationwide.
The polls are showing this race _wayyyyy_ too close for comfort just a couple weeks out, Peter, so I'm coming to you to ask:
[**_Will you use this link to make a split contribution to Terry McAuliffe's campaign to keep Virginia blue + our campaign here in PA? Any amount would make a huge impact, so I'd be deeply grateful._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32606?refcode=em20211019-3080&t=23&akid=3080%2E434096%2EFsiUu-)
Thank you,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211019-3080-footer&t=24&refcode2=3080_434096_FsiUu-&akid=3080%2E434096%2EFsiUu-)**

Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

Friend, Every single day we lose thousands of lives across our country. It is vital that CONSERVATIVE AMERICANS stand up against this evil, and **speak for those who are being silenced****.** **I am unapologetically pro-life, and will always be a voice for the voiceless!** Human life begins at conception. That is not a political idea or a theological one. It is scientifically proven that a fetus is a person with its own unique genetic code, physicality, and potential for life. I believe in standing up for the rights of all people, especially **the most vulnerable among us. ** **It is up to you and I to speak out for those who cannot speak for themselves.** [**Join my team today as we take back Wyoming’s congressional seat and help protect the rights of the unborn! >>>** ](https://u23309276.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=cNjdLOXrNVuGJHRASJfKfsziR8mcAUOfgq0P5zhAedpsZP7lrCAkCuTBVwMnIruPObMMVop-2FLuQBlckD96fuE-2FiSKmbg75kRykJvrunausQ-3DwGyv_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6orGqi65UUJ-2BCM1gB0oO6-2F7J4EEiiCovW3T-2Fb1uQlBmYSn3xjxTZe4xA6qsqTqgP4ju4dNnY9CenLloLZpCf47y22gf2C0j56gf5ZZ-2F7KG2Btq9KldH-2FdoIULQ3-2Fwek3h5FrTr6J7nmRzl90wLBQA3JW9FBERnWrKNafdJIU-2FrmDMZvSjw01eBfCS7m7Bs-2BfJiJweKhyBU2ie7f-2BcKArQboafN1i5I5MXsUSpjPHs496gCP1jxVeY-2FrAEgR8F-2FWnv1vScxNdG4mrnOdGV19g6-2B3cJHWPkKyMgTySudI7PV-2BhUSP2gE6ElEqKI05vnSwvk9mYcNlzYKffKwo8Yf8Cbolgc3AbAvBgoLdFYaP43hxMIKjG4WZC9Nc8aK3jEqJSH-2BYaPweD7-2BgORRX7-2BI9Ybbgfih2dXNdWvzdHzrSqBJ07YVsdkCt3qj8cj7rpXzG4mZayUqvZioOl0r5WY50SRs8QynayueRWTEPUd3-2FiQWpCjTfxm4ZZKMGX-2FyZHs1-2FKl7zJuWp1XIxB5A2wyfQwXpZhgVP2CNGlFROtHxJBTh45pRXrPPHpspBliLuw19MsoCfd6-2Bc0MXPowSqNkzdRh2ptV9CGNLKxx87Hn95cX2XmKtp5nj6JG-2F2bXZVJD6hXget41uaS6eMfi9yjF-2BVEHOgswWxhm5zo-2BF4jvZAsQoeQpxZExOFWcbZ1wr9Hi4KJCOZ-2FJYG1TLLoGv2snGUoGorcQIsgWmxw4hfmKUTES9iGTrsj7PFQQAKvwsM7fqmjiqrzR3G6GiEcTZWC-2BgAAI2VvfSe6OUyUoXz2o419Kp3MUt3zsAvHraeAKyJ7LqwuP)

clean_body: | | | | I will always stand for life Friend, Every single day we lose thousands of lives across our country. It is vital that CONSERVATIVE AMERICANS stand up against this evil, and speak for those who are being silenced. I am unapologetically pro-life, and will always be a voice for the voiceless! Human life begins at conception. That is not a political idea or a theological one. It is scientifically proven that a fetus is a person with its own unique genetic code, physicality, and potential for life. I believe in standing up for the rights of all people, especially the most vulnerable among us. It is up to you and I to speak out for those who cannot speak for themselves. When I am elected, I will vote in favor of life-saving legislation. We are all created equal under law, and this includes unborn children. For Wyoming, Harriet Hageman | | | |

Trump 45th President of the United States Paid for by Save America JFC, a joint fundraising committee of Save America and Make America Great Again PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Donaldjtrump.com Save America, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219 - |

name: Erica Smith HQ
subject: One of three
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
This is OUR chance to flip another seat and elect a progressive champion in Erica Smith to the U.S. Senate.
#
**OFFICIAL: The Cook Political Report Rates North Carolina 1 of 3 TOSS UP Senate Races in 2022** Can you make a donation of $10 or more to support Erica Smith’s progressive Democratic campaign for U.S. Senate?**
****[Donate Now »](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/22737?refcode=em20211019-560&t=1&akid=560%2E3698%2E2Rjt-n)**
---
**The Cook Political Report’s 2022 Senate ratings list North Carolina as one of just three “toss-up” seats.**
To be sure, there will be dozens of U.S. Senate seats across the country up for election in 2022 — some incumbent, some vacant. But with Republican Senator Richard Burr’s retirement, only North Carolina and two other states are considered to be competitive, toss-up races.
**This is OUR chance to flip another seat and elect a progressive champion in Erica Smith to the U.S. Senate — and stop this Senate seat from getting in the hands of a Trump Republican or a Joe Manchin-type politician.**
In order to do so, though, we must raise enough money to fund our voter registration and organizing programs, and communications strategy (no easy feat when over 50% of our campaign fundraising comes from grassroots donations online).
[**We’re behind on our October fundraising, so can you chip in a few dollars to this email if you’re in a place to do so? Thank you SO much for your support, and please know that your donation has a direct and immediate impact on the success of our campaign.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/22738?refcode=em20211019-560&t=2&akid=560%2E3698%2E2Rjt-n)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/22744?refcode=em20211019-560&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=560%2E3698%2E2Rjt-n)**
— Erica Smith HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211019-560-footer&t=22&refcode2=560_3698_2Rjt-n&akid=560%2E3698%2E2Rjt-n)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=23&akid=560%2E3698%2E2Rjt-n)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=560%2E3698%2E2Rjt-n)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

name: Wade Herring
subject: Out and about
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wade Herring for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herring4congress?refcode=101921whem [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herring4congress?refcode=101921whem] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Peter – I am blessed to have lived in Georgia for most of my life. Now as a candidate, I continue to listen and learn about the different communities we have here, and our different histories. But still, we are all Americans – out of many, one.
This past week, I had plenty of opportunities to appreciate the diversity of our state once again, through local events in the area.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/homecoming.png]
On Saturday, I attended Savannah State’s Homecoming! I always love to see alumni returning home and celebrating with the community that the university has built.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/seafood-2.png]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/seafood-3.png]
Later that day, we headed over to the Great Ogeechee Seafood Fest in Bryan County. I was able to connect with the Bryan County Democratic Committee and, of course, the festival fare was incredible.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/246265269_132789389094928_3179527123865730299_n.jpg]
On Friday, I was honored to receive a Community Star award at Savannah Technical College’s 15th Annual Tribute to Community Stars. I promise to keep serving this community, and every community throughout the 1st District!
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/flu-shote.png]
And last but not least... Don’t forget to get your flu shot! Susan and I received ours last Wednesday, along with the required lollipop afterwards.
I hope your week is off to a good start, and I hope to see you soon out and about around the 1st District!
Thank you for your support,
Wade
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herring4congress?refcode=101921whem] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Wade Herring, lawyer and community volunteer, is running for Congress in Georgia’s First Congressional District. Wade grew up in Macon, Georgia. He has worked with the law firm of HunterMaclean since 1985. Among other volunteer positions, Wade has served as president of the Savannah Bar Association, chair of the trustees at Wesley Monumental United Methodist Church, and board member of Georgia Appleseed. Wade is a graduate of Dartmouth College and the University of Georgia School of Law.Wade lives in Savannah, Georgia with his wife Susan of 39 years. Wade and Susan are the parents of two children, a son who is a lawyer in Atlanta, and a daughter who is a doctor in Winston-Salem, North Carolina.

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
We need your urgent help to pick up the pace to win this race and help Republicans take back the Senate majority! |

Friend,

I'm personally reaching out to you today with both _good news and bad news._

The good news is that in the final 5 weeks of the 3rd quarter – versus the full 12 weeks other campaigns had, with the help of grassroots conservatives, we were able to raise $3.75 MILLION. **[We couldn't have done it without your support, so THANK YOU!](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJyNkUlvwyAQhX8NuRHZGGP74EPqOE2lqkuSLjeLZZwg4UWAm_bfF0dpDz1VjDh8w3ujeaiS0IwmsNAliUgcR3ERMxql8TKcqsqSpGJ5vYmzaJMhGnX8yLn0eui5AeuXcugWp5InaZ63shVUJIRLYHELVAgWCZWlVJGFKU_ejw4lK0Q2oRzIycLyrHsLajYJzAPv8AmskycwWPcysEF6PEzecu1AYcexRclm8l3jhslKQMnawgcibEaSdyPXxz7AX0loORnAdTXWbOvdvtrW901dN_tV81gd8OPLYbe629frZle_Bni160DpqQta6Lg2PzOG3kPvA-2lwc_bz6eH9_3beBvaTW-0Co0_0F1gzlgqRJRhEFxgWsgc87QgmOakaAuRFyr8gC3VeNbGaMfmqI_z3EvAYTGj268SZTeIkGkKloRcsiT_MZ4fkyrc_muEX-XVdHldj6Bs_Q09V6B5)**

The bad news is the Democrat senator in Georgia just released his fundraising numbers: **$9.5 MILLION in the last three months.**

Here's what one reporter tweeted:

[](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJyNkcFvgyAUxv8aeqMRVNCDh87adcmSLrXb1QA-WxLUBnBd__th43bYaeGFw-_xfS_voy1owpMYVrqgESUkIjlhSZSSdThlyeO4ZFm1IzzacZREvTgLobweB2HA-rUa-9WlSFkmUsm7jnQ5ZDFwmWZCUiE6Ijnp1MoUF--vDsUbRHehHKjJwvqmBwvtbBKYB9HjC1inLmCwHlRgo_J4nLwV2kGLncAWxbvJ940bJ6sAxVsLn4iyGSnRX4U-DwH-SkLLqQCW1Vizr451ua9em6pq6k1zKE_48H46bl7qatscq48AF7seWj31QQu90OZnxjh4GHyggzI4rRl9e667r3lOMxjdhsYf6B4wYyyVMuIYpJA4yVWGRZpTnGQ073KZ5W34AVu015s2Rjs2R32e5z4CDosZ3d0LxJ8QpdMULCl9ZEn_Yzw_pmW4_f0Kv8rFdL2sRxHffgPbsp_x)
Senator Warnock raised more money in the 3rd quarter than any Senate candidate in the _entire country_ – Republican or Democrat. And he already has **$17.2 million in his campaign war chest!**

National Democrats are rallying behind Senator Warnock's campaign because they know Georgia WILL DECIDE the Senate majority in the upcoming election.

Friend, we're facing the top funded Democrat in the country – so we can't afford to let our foot off the gas for a single day. **[We need your support today so that we can continue building momentum to WIN THIS RACE.](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJyNkM1uwyAQhJ-G3IhsbIM5-OA6TlOpUqT8tFIvFoZNQoXtCHCjvH1x5PbQUwXi8A07qxlVkJSlCSx0QSISx1HMY5pGWbwMp6pYklQ0r9cxi9YMpVEnzkJIr4deGLB-KYducSkIyFxxqVQCJDsJxWicy0hGnOVZKiBbmOLi_dWhpERkHa4DOVpY3nRvQU0mgXkQHb6AdfICButeBjZIj4fRW6EdKOwEtihZj75r3DBaCShZWfhChE5Iiu4q9LkP8HckSE4GMEejzabe7atN_drUdbMvm211wNvjYVe-7OtVs6vfApztOlB67MIsdEKbnx1D76H3gfbS4EMpjvy5fv_8CHLTG62C8Ae6B8wpzdo2Yhha0eKUyxyLjBOc5oSfeJvz0NzCFup608ZoR6eqz9PeR8EhmNGne4HYEyJkHIMlIY8uyX-Mp8-kCq-_X-F3cjZdzvEIYqtvX1OfsQ)**

clean_body: We need your urgent help to pick up the pace to win this race and help Republicans take back the Senate majority! | Friend, I'm personally reaching out to you today with both good news and bad news. The good news is that in the final 5 weeks of the 3rd quarter – versus the full 12 weeks other campaigns had, with the help of grassroots conservatives, we were able to raise $3.75 MILLION. The bad news is the Democrat senator in Georgia just released his fundraising numbers: $9.5 MILLION in the last three months. Here's what one reporter tweeted: Senator Warnock raised more money in the 3rd quarter than any Senate candidate in the entire country – Republican or Democrat. And he already has $17.2 million in his campaign war chest! National Democrats are rallying behind Senator Warnock's campaign because they know Georgia WILL DECIDE the Senate majority in the upcoming election. Friend, we're facing the top funded Democrat in the country – so we can't afford to let our foot off the gas for a single day. The Senate majority is on the line, and we have a tough fight ahead. The Democrats are raising record amounts of money, but we will win if we have the support from conservatives like you. Thanks, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for US Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Team Holly
subject: New Merch Alert!
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Dear Peter,
I'm Holly McCormack and today I'm announcing my candidacy against Marjorie Taylor Greene for Georgia's 14th Congressional District. We are kicking off our campaign today by reaching out to you because we need your support. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc]
I am a mother, small businesswoman, and a community activist. I have lived in this District most of my life and the issues our residents are facing are not addressed with conspiracy theories.
Rush a donation today:
$5.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $50.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $10.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $75.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $25.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $100.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vvydox3IxDY [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vvydox3IxDY]Northwest Georgia is currently represented by someone who parachuted into the District just before the election because she thought it would be an easy win. She likes to make noise and fuel hate while ignoring the needs of those who actually live in our District. That is not who we are ! We need someone from our community who knows our struggles and who can stand up for us to get things done in Congress.
We need a leader who has values and empathy for everyone in her District, not just those with the loudest voices. Let's cut through the noise and get to work.
Check out our Website [http://www.hollyforcongress.org/] , Twitter [https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress] , and Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/] . We have a tough road ahead of us but with your help we can fire Marjorie. Donate $50 today and help me take Northwest Georgia back. I couldn’t do it without you. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc]
In solidarity,
Holly McCormack
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] Join the #MackPack [http://www.hollyforcongress.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/ [https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/] https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress [https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress] https://www.instagram.com/hollyforcongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/hollyforcongress/] https://www.hollyforcongress.org [https://www.hollyforcongress.org]

Holly McCormack for Congress
862 Lafayette St
PO Box 1035
Ringgold, GA 30736
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/d2166e53-1b31-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/f2623f66-1d31-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjYyM2Y2Ni0xZDMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pvXXKMILZdKFglnXrHOk-vh3fd9Bb7Utp1a9zY1FaDw=&id=126471745 .

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: This is about defending democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
|
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37704471/312292043/-236917406?refcode=20211019_f_2_fl&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjdmZDE3MC0xZDMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WpMcaJlOPnG1H820feP8s1ywk70syCdnB6_nkyA-e6M=)
---

Folks,

I firmly believe that the role — _the duty_ — of the Governor of Virginia is to unite people. To bring about unity in times of division. And above all, to do the morally right thing, especially when others won’t.

After he failed to condemn Donald Trump and his ‘big lie’ rally, it’s clear Glenn Youngkin doesn’t hold those values.

From day one of his campaign, Youngkin has pushed Donald Trump’s lies about the 2020 election. He’s peddled dangerous conspiracy theories and keeps cozying up to Trump’s most extreme supporters.

**This is not who we are as Virginians — or as Americans. And we must not stand for this hateful, divisive rhetoric. This is about safeguarding the values that make this country what it is.**

**[That’s why, right now, I am asking you to split a donation between my campaign and Charlie Crist’s campaign for governor of Florida. Everything we raise right now will go directly toward getting out the vote in this election — because the best way to defend our democracy is to participate in it. I am humbly asking for your support today:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37704472/312292044/-236917406?refcode=20211019_f_2_fl&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjdmZDE3MC0xZDMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WpMcaJlOPnG1H820feP8s1ywk70syCdnB6_nkyA-e6M=)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Charlie Crist and Terry McAuliffe:_

January 6 was one of the darkest days in our history. We watched as our Capitol was desecrated. Police officers were killed. And our democracy was under siege.

Trump’s rally for Youngkin this month was another dark day. Attendees actually celebrated the insurrection by saying the Pledge of Allegiance to a flag that was used to try and bring down democracy — _the very democracy which that American flag symbolizes._

Glenn Youngkin saw January 6 just like the rest of us. His complacency in undermining American democracy is unacceptable.

**Friends, he is not fit to be Governor of Virginia.**

**[I’m asking you right now to stand up for our democracy and split a donation between my campaign and Team Crist by chipping in whatever amount makes sense for you. Together, we will build a movement that unites us and keeps our Commonwealth moving forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37704478/312292050/-236917406?refcode=20211019_f_2_fl&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjdmZDE3MC0xZDMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WpMcaJlOPnG1H820feP8s1ywk70syCdnB6_nkyA-e6M=)**

In solidarity,
Terry McAuliffe

Glenn Youngkin saw January 6 just like the rest of us. His complacency in undermining American democracy is unacceptable. Friends, he is not fit to be Governor of Virginia. = In solidarity, Terry McAuliffe = | Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor Charlie Crist for Governor P.O. Box 1547 St. Petersburg, FL 33731 United States

**And as a card-carrying member of the American Federation of Government Employees Union (AFGE), Shenise is in this fight to make it work even better to benefit the needs of everyday, working-class Daytonians.**

clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Patriot, Things are unraveling quickly for Anthony Fauci. The truth is emerging -- and it gets uglier and uglier by the day. Now the latest bombshell has come out: A report has come out in a newly-released book which reveals that Fauci had extensive knowledge of the dangerous experiments being done at the Wuhan lab ... ... but hid it from the Trump administration as the pandemic was unfolding. The fact that this man continues to serve at the highest levels of government is a disgrace. That's why I've filed a criminal referral against Anthony Fauci. The lies that he told the Trump administration at the height of the pandemic, and the lies he told the U.S. Senate under oath, are shameful. He shouldn't be filming documentaries on Netflix like a red-carpet celebrity ... He should be under investigation by the Department of Justice. I need you to join with me as I push to get rid of Fauci. I am working day and night in the U.S. Senate to remove him from power, so that he can't cause any more damage. And I need patriots like you to keep me here so that I can continue doing this important work. Your contributions have already helped immensely. But every day, my Democrat opponent raises more and more money. Left-wing donors are dumping millions into his campaign and organizing activists on the ground to defeat me. They are committed to making sure that Fauci's commands are never questioned, and that America remains masked up and locked down forever. I will never submit to them. I stand for freedom. That's why I'm here. But sadly, not everyone agrees that freedom is important. Some in Washington want Fauci to continue funneling money to dangerous labs in China. And those people are organizing aggressively to take me out. I need to continue the work that I am doing in the Senate. It is far too important to stop now. In Liberty, Rand Paul | | | | **** P.S. A new bombshell has come out about Anthony Fauci. He lied to Donald Trump about his funding of the Wuhan lab. The lies that Fauci has told about this scandal are shameful. I'm pursuing a criminal investigation against him by the Department of Justice. And I need your help to fend off the Democrats and keep my seat in the U.S. Senate, so that I can continue doing this critically important work. | | | | | | | Paid for by Rand Paul for US Senate | No longer want to receive these emails? . RANDPAC PO Box 72598 Newport, Kentucky 41072

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z0qim4hua0otblf0pts7a2mav8l6bpd9tp4igsdo_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cdjmeoj2c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zq2s5bfo3kdjr8umo7rkct2r8age310a0gjgkbpo_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cdjmeoj2c9h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z4v102597ln7rri6fk9reji1l1r87smu0peji6vg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cdjmeoj2c9h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

body:

The Pukita Train is on fire 🔥💥 and gaining momentum- _you don’t want to be out of the loop!_

We don’t want to elect a Rob Portman 2.0- right? That would be someone who says everything they know we want to hear and doesn’t give any substantial answers to what they would do. Then they go to Washington and compromise.

body:
#

Hey there, it’s Malcolm.
I'm about to ask you to rush a donation of $3 to my campaign today. Will you let me explain why?
One of my opponents just dropped a half a million dollars of their own money into this race.
**You read that right — $500,000 of their own cash.**
The truth is, campaigns like this one are ridiculously expensive. That gives wealthy candidates a huge advantage — and it’s why we don’t have more working people in our government.
I'm a working person from a working family. I'll never have money to self-fund like my opponent.
And I flat-out refuse to take a dime from corporate PACs that want to buy power in Washington.
But I’m not worried, because I have you.
**If you chip in $3 and the next person reading this chips in $5, and so on, then we can raise the funds necessary to compete in this race and win.**
[So I’m asking for your help. If you can spare it today, could you please chip in $3 right now to help us build a government that works for working people like us?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37705590/312296806/-360183459?refcode2=98ac3510-2131-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211019-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGFjMzUxMC0yMTMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KqU7FX3nl1BLaQ33D68dpsYrMPxoRh1r-4ZVMWpkUuM=)

name: Conor Lamb
subject: It's time workers got their fair share, friend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CONOR LAMB FOR SENATE Conor Lamb for Senate
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37705573/312296679/-1576960734?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGMxYjllYy0yMDMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JEYorbLjq2vAyM2_u4joHap7L2my0qxje3vm0a_a_iM=)

Friend,

Here's the unfortunate truth: **The minimum wage has been stuck at $7.25 for _more than a decade._**

Now, new police officers in many of our communities make less than $13 an hour. Nursing assistants working in many of our nursing homes were making less than $15 an hour -- in the middle of a pandemic. And while wages have largely remained flat, costs of living continue to rise.

That just shouldn't be the case in the United States of America in 2021.

**If we want to attract good people to important jobs, keep our communities safe, and make sure our loved ones get the quality care they deserve, we have to invest in American workers --_that means we have to pay them the wage they deserve._**

**[Friend, we need to stand up for working people and establish a living wage of $15 an hour. If you're with me, add your name to our petition calling on Congress to raise the minimum wage right now>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37705574/312296680/-528077402?ms=em21_211019_minwage&refcode=em21_211019_minwage&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGMxYjllYy0yMDMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JEYorbLjq2vAyM2_u4joHap7L2my0qxje3vm0a_a_iM=&emci=bdb885aa-0431-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=08c1b9ec-2031-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=18516396)** [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37705575/312296681/-528077402?ms=em21_211019_minwage&refcode=em21_211019_minwage&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGMxYjllYy0yMDMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JEYorbLjq2vAyM2_u4joHap7L2my0qxje3vm0a_a_iM=&emci=bdb885aa-0431-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=08c1b9ec-2031-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=18516396) Friend, anyone working full-time in America should be able to support themselves and their families -- not struggle to make ends meet month after month.

That's why in the House, I cosponsored and helped pass legislation to raise the minimum wage to $15, _and_ index the minimum wage to inflation so there will be automatic wage increases in the future.

**In the Senate, I will continue to push for fair wages and legislation that empowers workers on all fronts, and I need you by my side to help get there.**

clean_body: | = Friend, Here's the unfortunate truth: The minimum wage has been stuck at $7.25 for more than a decade. Now, new police officers in many of our communities make less than $13 an hour. Nursing assistants working in many of our nursing homes were making less than $15 an hour -- in the middle of a pandemic. And while wages have largely remained flat, costs of living continue to rise. That just shouldn't be the case in the United States of America in 2021. If we want to attract good people to important jobs, keep our communities safe, and make sure our loved ones get the quality care they deserve, we have to invest in American workers --that means we have to pay them the wage they deserve. Friend, anyone working full-time in America should be able to support themselves and their families -- not struggle to make ends meet month after month. That's why in the House, I cosponsored and helped pass legislation to raise the minimum wage to $15, and index the minimum wage to inflation so there will be automatic wage increases in the future. In the Senate, I will continue to push for fair wages and legislation that empowers workers on all fronts, and I need you by my side to help get there. Thanks for being part of this. \-- Conor Lamb = = *

name: Ryan Girdusky
subject: Resign, Recall, Replace
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
Peter, Will you join Tucker Carlson, Laura Ingraham, and Donald Trump Jr. In supporting our campaign to take back our schools from the radical socialist Left? [**_We need your help as we launch a nationwide effort to replace socialist, anti-American school board members with Patriots. Will you please support us?_**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58568407:631RPD2hN:m:1:3253819041:65C2ACDD07E0E35248E9C3AC5D0E98D7:r) For too long, the Left has worked to infiltrate schools and indoctrinate our kids with hateful "critical race theory" lessons. **As you may know, Critical Race Theory or "CRT" teaches our children to ****hate****our country,****hate****our history, and****hate****our American values. ** It's being taught in every state across the nation, and it MUST be stopped. If we're not careful, we will soon wake up in a country run by the generation that was trained by their teachers to hate America. And they'll work to destroy everything our country stands for. And friend, you may not have seen it happening at the time, but for too long Republicans have neglected local races and instead focused on "BIG" races for President, Governor, and Congress. **_But in the process, we 've neglected smaller local races - like school board - that are often not publicized._** One of the reasons these races get overlooked is that they're discussed as "non-partisan." What that means is radical leftists get to quietly slip into a position of power and waste your tax dollars on "equity" equity consultants and train your children and grandchildren to HATE America. That's the bad news: our nation is under assault by the left, and our children are their number one target. But here's the good news. We can and will stop the radical left from corrupting the minds of an entire generation. My name is Ryan Girdusky, and I founded the 1776 Project PAC to take back our local school boards and ensure that our children are taught to love and respect America. **Here 's my ****_3R 's Campaign Battle Plan:_****_ _** **_Resign:_** we'll turn up the public pressure with TV, Radio, and Print media campaigns calling for far left school board members to quit. **_Recall:_** we'll help collect petitions signatures and aid local parents, grandparents, and concerned taxpayers in efforts to recall radical school board members who must be removed from officed **_Replace:_** We'll support the campaigns of pro-America conservatives who run for local school board against liberal pro-CRT school board members. [_**But we can 't roll out this plan without your support. Will you rush in $17.76 to the 1776 Project PAC ahead of the 40+ November elections we're targeting?**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58568407:631RPD2hN:m:1:3253819041:65C2ACDD07E0E35248E9C3AC5D0E98D7:r) Now, you may not be familiar with me... But you're almost certainly familiar with Tucker Carlson, Laura Ingraham, and/or Donald Trump Jr. They know how effective the 1776 Project PAC will be, and you can take their word for it! **> >>> Tucker Carlson:**** "**Parents have almost no support, _but now they do_. The **_1776 Project PAC_** _ _ is a political action committee designed to help school boards and communities elect sane people." **> >>> Laura Ingraham:****** "For all the parents out there looking to reclaim your local school boards from radical leftists - help is on the way - a new political action committee called the **_1776 Project_** is going to support school board candidates who oppose indoctrinating kids with things like Critical Race Theory." **> >>> Donald Trump Jr.:****** "The **_1776 Project_** is the very first Political Action Committee of is kinds - specifically created to take on this sinister attack on our way of life from within our own communities by working to take local schools boards out of the hands of these America-hating radical liberals..." Even the failing and biased New York Times admitted that we "lit a fire" that is only growing as more conservative patriots like you join the fight in supporting the **1776 Project PAC.** **After 30 years of left-wing billionaires like George Soros flooding cash into local school board races, we finally have a way to fight back with the 1776 Project PAC.** [_**Help us fight back against George Soros and the radical socialist left in our school boards with a generous contribution of $17.76, $25, $50, and $100.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58568407:631RPD2hN:m:1:3253819041:65C2ACDD07E0E35248E9C3AC5D0E98D7:r) In closing, my friend Tucker Carlson said "If you're thinking of writing a check to [another group] maybe you should pause and send it to Ryan Girdusky instead." With your help, we will rid our schools of hateful Critical Race Theory by ridding our school boards of radical left-wing activists who despise our Country, our Constitution, and our Conservative American values. Sincerely, Ryan Girdusky P.S. I know you may not know anything about me, but I hope that the endorsements from incredible conservative leaders like my friends Tucker, Laura, and Donald Trump Jr. give you confidence in my dedication to the mission of taking school boards back from radical liberals. [_**Will you invest in the future of our country by making a generous contribution to the 1776 Project PAC as we fight to Resign, Recall, or Replace far-left indoctrinators? **_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58568407:631RPD2hN:m:1:3253819041:65C2ACDD07E0E35248E9C3AC5D0E98D7:r) [**DONATE NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58568407:631RPD2hN:m:1:3253819041:65C2ACDD07E0E35248E9C3AC5D0E98D7:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58568407:631RPD2hN:m:1:3253819041:65C2ACDD07E0E35248E9C3AC5D0E98D7:r) **[Please consider making a critical donation to the 1776 Project PAC today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58568407:631RPD2hN:m:1:3253819041:65C2ACDD07E0E35248E9C3AC5D0E98D7:r)** Paid for by 1776 Project PAC

name: John Stossel
subject: How you and I can overthrow the fake news media
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Center for Independent Thought
body:
I have watched the mainstream media transform into a merchant of half-truths, woke propaganda [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c494%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=3SbxxqHXExECxplOuQhRZA&sysid=1)

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66138%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=l4ax40jP6pLQHo6ORT2RlQ&sysid=1)

Friend,

I have watched the mainstream media transform into a merchant of half-truths, woke propaganda, and a non-stop push for bigger government. **I need your help to push back.**

**_I left my ABC News job because they resisted my attempts to report on unintended consequences of big government programs_**. They wouldn’t let me explain how free market capitalism was saving lives and lifting billions out of poverty.

Fox News let me, but after 7 years, I gave up my show on FBN because I wanted to reach younger people, people who haven’t already made up their minds.

That is why I created **Stossel TV and partnered with Center for Independent Thought.**

Stossel TV has produced more than 400 videos explaining the benefits of free markets and the harm done by big government. Thanks to social media, we don’t need TV networks anymore. Young people don't watch Fox or CNN. They surf the web and get their news from Facebook, YouTube, Instagram, Twitter, etc.

A surprise benefit of posting video on the internet is that our videos keep finding new viewers. We’ve gotten more than 450 million views.

[**You can help Stossel TV reach millions of people by making a donation today. Please click here or one of the links below to donate >>>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66139%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tPLHLJEFBCtncC5EwRcKPA&sysid=1)

[**Donate $20.22 >>>**
**Donate $50 >>>**
**Donate $100 >>>**
**Donate $250 >>>**
**Donate $500 >>>**
**Donate $1,000 >>>**
**Donate $5,000 >>>**
**Donate ANY Amount >>>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66138%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=l4ax40jP6pLQHo6ORT2RlQ&sysid=1)

My reporting is different from most news on cable and the networks. Most of that is “Donald Trump said today ... !” “Congress just passed ... “ “Biden will promise ... “ At a time when media is polarizing and politicized, Stossel TV maintains journalistic integrity by covering topics such as Socialism vs. Capitalism, Anti-racist Racists, and Social Media Censorship. We challenge the alarmism that demands more regulations.

These topics remain important year after year, election cycle after election cycle, and that’s why our videos keep finding new viewers.

This allows more people to keep learning the truth--years after the video was first released.

**Stossel TV’s rapidly growing views demonstrate people want to hear the facts and think for themselves--despite mainstream media’s pro-government, anti-business bias.**

[**Please help me spread our message of free markets, civil liberties, and individualism by making a donation today >>>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66130%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=57b9yNeJ8WoSrlocMLtcRQ&sysid=1)

[**Donate $20.22 >>>**
**Donate $50 >>>**
**Donate $100 >>>**
**Donate $250 >>>**
**Donate $500 >>>**
**Donate $1,000 >>>**
**Donate $5,000 >>>**
**Donate ANY Amount >>>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66138%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=l4ax40jP6pLQHo6ORT2RlQ&sysid=1)

Your donation will help me produce more videos, reach more viewers, and expose the truth about the corrupt media, government, and political elites.

[**Please click here to make a donation.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66131%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pRHUYjLAsCP3H5Y%2b0XY23w&sysid=1)

Thank you, Friend.

In liberty,

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66138%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=l4ax40jP6pLQHo6ORT2RlQ&sysid=1)
John Stossel
Journalist - _Stossel TV_
Center for Independent Thought

Paid for by Center for Independent Thought

_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c494%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=3SbxxqHXExECxplOuQhRZA&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37706430/312300652/-2023814932?refcode=20211019.7_JC_10FA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWM0M2JiOS0yMzMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hlZqVTAQYLtWRuyvc-X1eRJ3j69bShtZsMYU3lwAa9U=)

| | Derek, I don’t usually get worked up about a single poll, but this Trafalgar poll showing Glenn Youngkin with a 48.5 to 47.5 lead over Terry has me losing my damn mind.

[**I’m going to explain why, but first, will you pitch in right now towards Terry’s FINAL filing deadline goal to help him turn this race around?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37706431/312300653/-2023814932?refcode=20211019.7_JC_10FA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWM0M2JiOS0yMzMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hlZqVTAQYLtWRuyvc-X1eRJ3j69bShtZsMYU3lwAa9U=)

Here’s why I’m terrified:

Terry was already a great governor for Virginia. His sterling record of record job growth and a gangbusters economy speaks for itself.

To top that off, Donald Trump got whipped in Virginia in 2020. With Glenn Youngkin hugging Trump so tightly in the Virginia governor’s race, you’d think Virginia voters would be all in behind Terry.

But folks, this poll says the exact opposite. It says that Trumpism might still be alive and well in Virginia. That’s excellent news for Glenn Youngkin and Donald Trump and bad news for the rest of us.

[**Derek, my ask to you has never come at a more critical moment. Right now Terry’s fighting tooth and nail to retake the lead in the final days of this campaign, and he’s got his last filing deadline in less than 48 hours. clean_body: | | | = | | Derek, I don’t usually get worked up about a single poll, but this Trafalgar poll showing Glenn Youngkin with a 48.5 to 47.5 lead over Terry has me losing my damn mind. = Here’s why I’m terrified: Terry was already a great governor for Virginia. His sterling record of record job growth and a gangbusters economy speaks for itself. To top that off, Donald Trump got whipped in Virginia in 2020. With Glenn Youngkin hugging Trump so tightly in the Virginia governor’s race, you’d think Virginia voters would be all in behind Terry. But folks, this poll says the exact opposite. It says that Trumpism might still be alive and well in Virginia. That’s excellent news for Glenn Youngkin and Donald Trump and bad news for the rest of us. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = ** If we can beat Donald Trump in Virginia, we can deal a death blow to Trumpism in America. Thanks, James = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia

name: Team Lasry
subject: It’s been a few weeks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin **[alexlasry
body:
Alex is running to represent Wisconsin so we can oust ineffective Ron Johnson, but this campaign is about so much more than that. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37706653/312301709/-1670121809?refcode=EM_FR_211019ADFR_N_TL_90DA_5_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzNlNGQ2Ni0yNTMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VZXy6LJdfi2Sq4br7xN-kqvzw6CrccM1KBS9sS-Srgo=)

Peter,

It’s been a couple of weeks since our TV ad hit the air, and the people of Wisconsin are starting to take notice. Alex is running to represent Wisconsin so we can oust ineffective Ron Johnson, but this campaign is about so much more than that.

name: Nicole Neily, Parents Defending Education
subject: DOJ: “Concerned parents = domesticterrorists?”
body:
Maybe you heard the news – recently, the U.S. Department of Justice said they will mobilize the FBI against parents ... for st
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgp82ec1n67lvqd684thsqjugmmg7t4poo5ql02o_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cdjm9o34cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onkciqnecjhcao72o716coraclks9pj5d73cpie6tr4sco78ddkmlq7dcj4ehgrfduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75d3664pbbd77mpgmcclgm9h3csh5u)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo4uk2t7q10hg49rmgv2sf4ql232gra45kbrrp0o_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cdjm9o34cjh2bs) Fellow American, Maybe you heard the news – recently, the U.S. Department of Justice said **they will mobilize the FBI against parents ... for standing up for their own children!** On October 4, 2021, the DOJ announced a new initiative to address “harassment, intimidation and threats of violence” against school board members and employees – including but not limited to **the creation of a federal task force as well as dedicated lines of communication for threat reporting, assessment, and response by law enforcement under the auspices of the FBI.** [**Tell the DOJ this is unacceptable**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9d9hfsq4chqnnlpcli7hlnemovo3r9h8dvsmqfo_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cdjm9o34cjh2bs) My name is Nicole Neily, and I’m the President of Parents Defending Education. We’re a national grassroots organization working to reclaim our schools from activists promoting harmful agendas, and fighting against indoctrination in the classroom -- and _for_ the restoration of a healthy, non-political education for our kids. We are also standing with parents like you who are troubled by what’s happening in our schools today. You might be wondering how something so outrageous -- **the FBI being mobilized against parents for simply speaking up for their own children** \-- could happen in “the land of the free.” It all started recently, when the National School Board Association (NSBA) sent a letter to President Biden asking for help **silencing parents like you** who are demanding change at school board meetings. In their letter, NSBA cites a tiny number of minor incidents to insinuate that** parents who are criticizing and protesting the decisions of school boards are or may be engaging in “domestic terrorism and hate crimes."** While PDE naturally does not support _anyone_ who uses violence or threats against school board members, officials, or teachers, the NSBA choosing to invoke the PATRIOT Act (which was passed after 9/11 to uncover potential terrorist plots) takes it WAY too far. The association of legitimate protest with terrorism and violence reveals both NSBA’s contempt for parents and their unwillingness to understand and hear the sincere cries of parents on behalf of their children. In short, **_NSBA’s letter to President Biden was a thinly veiled threat_** , intended to intimidate into silence and submission the very constituents -- parents and taxpayers like you, -- that its members ostensibly represent. And the Department of Justice is wholly complicit in this charade. [**Tell the DOJ you OPPOSE FBI persecution of parents**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zood7vh6b03ep1u6dest89t8b5jaspmmsoeamc28_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cdjm9o34cjh2bs) I’m in awe that NSBA would choose to threaten parents for having the courage to hold them accountable -- as I’m sure you are. And it’s unthinkable that concerned parents should be equated with domestic terrorists. **We will not be bullied.** We refuse to have our free speech chilled by threats. America’s parents have a constitutional right to petition our elected officials -- and Parents Defending Education will continue to do so, with the support of parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens like you! The good news is that this proves the NSBA, the teachers’ unions, and radical school boards around the country are running scared. They’ve been bullying us for decades -- and now that parents are standing up to them, they’re terrified. **The mere fact that they’ve summoned the Biden administration to back up their crazy power trip clearly shows they feel the power slipping from their hands.** In cities and towns across America, we’re seeing a backlash against the school administrators and bureaucrats who disdain the parents whose children they are entrusted with educating. This behavior is arrogant and out of touch and these fiefdoms must be exposed and held accountable. And that’s exactly what Parents Defending Education is doing -- keeping the pressure on the NSBA, teachers’ unions, and school boards. But we need the support of parents, teachers, and concerned Americans like you to effectively fight back against these bullies and defend the rights of American parents and school children. [**Tell the DOJ you won’t be bullied**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjurs17fsktu0pk9brb8k0a243akvhd94gc0kg30_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cdjm9o34cjh2bs) So thank you for standing with us -- and standing _up_ for America’s parents! Nicole Neily President Parents Defending Education 4532 Lee Hwy #119
Arlington VA 22207
---

name: Michael Flynn
subject: General Michael Flynn endorses Josh Mandel for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Josh
body:
October 19, 2021 **General Michael Flynn endorses Josh Mandel for U.S. Senate in Ohio**
_Mandel leads in polls by commanding 24 point margin;
Receives endorsement from The People’s General_
ENGLEWOOD, FLORIDA – Today General Michael Flynn is announcing his endorsement of Josh Mandel, Marine Corps veteran, America First Warrior, and the only true consistent pro-Trump Conservative in the race for U.S. Senate in Ohio.

General Flynn served as the National Security Advisor to President Donald J. Trump. His unwavering support for the America First agenda made him public enemy #1 for the radical left and the deep state. So much so they fabricated false charges to remove him from the battlefield. General Flynn fought back and was vindicated, further proving he does not shy away from a fight. Not surprisingly, given his decades of military service, he knows fighters when he sees them.

"Josh Mandel is the fighter we need in the U.S. Senate. He served our country with honor in the Marine Corps and will bring that same fight to Washington. Our country needs leaders with backbone and grit to take on the plethora of threats facing our great nation. They are numerous and come from within and without. They include the Chinese Communist Party with their imperial ambitions to supplant us as the global leader, the scourge of radical Islam that wants to repeat their attacks on our homeland, the culturally Marxist radical left that is willing to appease these threats, and the D.C. swamp that refuses to get to the bottom of the 2020 election fraud," said Gen. Flynn.

"Josh Mandel has been, and will continue to be, a frontline fighter for President Trump and the America First Agenda. Ohio needs a warrior like Josh, who isn’t afraid to take on the deep state and stop the left’s cultural indoctrination of America with critical race theory and ‘woke’ cancel culture- those who work with big tech to abrogate and abridge our God-given, constitutionally protected freedoms. Josh already has a proven record of standing up to the leftist radicals, squishy RINO Republicans, and the corrupt news media. He has my complete and total endorsement for the U.S. Senate," continued Flynn.

"I am honored to receive the endorsement of General Michael Flynn. General Flynn is a fighter, warrior and true American Patriot. He has served our country both on the battlefield and in taking on the D.C. Swamp and the deep state. General Flynn epitomizes the MAGA movement and I am proud to be in the trenches fighting alongside him as we continue these existential battles," said Josh Mandel.

"When I go to Washington, I will be an America First Senator who takes on the radical left and reins in our military-industrial complex. As the looming threat of the Chinese Communist Party continues to rise and global Islamicist jihadism persists, I stand at the ready to again serve our great nation, just as I did in the Marine Corps," continued Mandel.

Gen. Flynn's endorsement comes as Mandel holds a consistent and commanding 24 point lead over his closest competitor.

Gen. Flynn joins Ohio Value Voters, Right to Life Action Coalition of Ohio, National Association for Gun Rights, Club for Growth, Senate Conservatives Fund, Senator Cynthia Lummis (R-WY), Senator Mike Lee (R-UT), Arizona State Senator Wendy Rogers, Former Trump Attorney Jenna Ellis, Ambassador David Friedman, and Conservative TV & Radio host Mark Levin in endorsing Mandel's campaign for Senate. | | [](http://links.joshmandel2022.com/u/click?_t=128ebb110d2d4fa293c540634a1733e0&_m=1a1e67a1f0594334aea1010e1aa50f00&_e=nYPzfzfy6W5N_iCbbLem6XSoOi45RRTPYTTC-2g0Py_TBtVRUr7KI74VCK6zwmWueDAIT2tx8EA-lqKQ3CgXeV82OlfdAWgeBup5aZmoL5pYtVcVDjNl9lKpxnkXXjXsRpLPSXomaDFJDn8AEn_B2OPngJll9Atq5Br1El3u-9YG6JLe_IoFg5EoLEpvoIH62DmeWYom9e-Y-xVc8Hc5cEZosgSpIEGTMeWqBta8VDpqllBFiduFM_dOAy5cpLboA0655mnkZxrJAPfg1oLJ3Q%3D%3D) | [](http://links.joshmandel2022.com/u/click?_t=128ebb110d2d4fa293c540634a1733e0&_m=1a1e67a1f0594334aea1010e1aa50f00&_e=nYPzfzfy6W5N_iCbbLem6QVulTKX2m63C98bhpBy4Jpvu9HkOzNpqlYDtM6ZtvBGjPxWVp2wlwzUEmSAdZavwiqfIF6He7m72y-F1tKBT8a98iodMZsgrAyBkMdTB01ofyS1mPQZ5JX5sVyluoXQVYvHbX8kpGkCGvCmYWl8qbomYEEwQMf0_ShqMRxSwA103DbrMZcNCulYfj9gkbMnubHC7AWMOmQu1_2hd66c1ZcwUTFk0PrMbcE0NDk-KnDJ7O4fITpKxmS-ac2_zSukwQ%3D%3D) | [](http://links.joshmandel2022.com/u/click?_t=128ebb110d2d4fa293c540634a1733e0&_m=1a1e67a1f0594334aea1010e1aa50f00&_e=nYPzfzfy6W5N_iCbbLem6QrAhgvnEpNwCTeOIbsktFe4UlawagIJPVVC-jshwiUTAq7z1B1O7EhxvzYEPRU1zXDvSnpuolghXYXMHhIfiet9I6NwKhUcpwq3iHCNy7qZ4-NkcjPpNsGnl0VpJ6gKBlTO76rWuezgKBkTSaQbpKzQz_UFJHv2s5jpQ_AquSNtQbWBdPTY1Z2tQu2KfCIedkRamXLdJuYl0hgaQRlDNb--KEURLCQY9Bd2yMkJYZjKnEzLQbNaW_Xw1BAiuAJlNnDURxJ6dqbY84Y6eCMJK_Y%3D)

Jason’s mom fled Cuba in 1965 and raised Jason and his two brothers with a passionate love for democracy and America. Jason knows the gift of freedom that America has to offer which is why he fights every day to protect that freedom and do what’s best for the people of his state. It is so important that Jason wins this race. Virginians deserve an attorney general who will put public safety before politics – something that the current attorney general has failed to do. Virginia’s murder rate is the highest it’s been in two decades, yet the current attorney general has blatantly shown that his focus is on making the office a “progressive powerhouse,” not keeping Virginians safe. name: Susan Wild
subject: re: Kyrsten Sinema
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
I’m tired of people in the Democratic Party not standing up for our values.

| | | **Rep. Wild says Sen. Sinema “isn’t in the right party” if she's against lowering drug costs**

-_MSNBC_
---
Peter,

In case you missed it, I was a guest on MSNBC recently, where I talked about how important it is to lower prescription drug prices for American families — and how disappointed I am in supposedly-Democratic Senator Kyrsten Sinema for blocking this crucial legislation.

**Lowering prescription drug prices is my number one issue. And as a Democrat, I’m tired of people in the Democratic Party not standing up for our values.**

I came to Congress to fight for the issues that matter most to families and workers in the Lehigh Valley and across the nation. I have made my position on prescription drug costs incredibly clear, and I am sick of Democrats like Kyrsten Sinema who don’t act like Democrats and who put their personal agendas ahead of the priorities of real Americans. **It’s simple: if she is going to block legislation on an issue as important as lowering prescription drug costs, then she is in the wrong party.**
