Fellow American -

Democrats are relentless about COVID-19 precautions... _for you._

This weekend, the Biden’s were seen walking through an expensive seafood restaurant maskless - when both the city and restaurant _require masks._ But I guess the rules only apply to Americans, not the liberal elite.

This isn’t the first time we’ve seen Democrats break their own rules:
* Pelosi’s hair appointments
* Obama’s birthday party
* AOC’s attendance at the Met Gala
* Newsom’s French Laundry event

_The list goes on and on._ Not to mention potentially over 350,000 illegal migrants streaming in at our southern border in October - with no vaccinations or COVID-19 precautions. **But Democrats still want your kids in a mask all day and for you to be fired from refusing a vaccine.**

[**It’s time to put a stop to the Democrat double standard – if you agree, will you sign my letter to Biden, telling him to follow his own rules!**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=980c054aec85407d9938db8df0f8e60d&_e=UlUNV9cn0DBqrh75xuTupAyUubaxYx49jbwWemrPixLqDZSWPMtA0cF46KjS2jGm8nOra4J3yK7GB5bWM2Uw1KpiLbiVpuZ9K6l_cb9xjxIT6NiJy4DO5xiOw5ElslFlzy0H7eDBm8GNuAP7uG1qb3kImheR4HewaRQShJzdXplylpeV4Nhi4tpXIJ4ARSS268Q0b_kFyneHTCoD9wtA0UsZ0YheMh1g3bNTTd6_wIuFNQ5QKuysRcGRKJAdXuffg5PVL1hmRCPvZC81B4N-3cMvfV2Hw2XDPqZbIxPDprAy62t-vO3_j3oDoCHXqyIdZpzcv47vO6pJz_rFwlue4YStaFCrzedhsvW7wmq1-V_QfyMKnN5vTnbBDD4lus4JG_6sga2Q0fWpv1kEPmkwtEFg7K7FSWzgKcNB4SFF_bayN2RbZzUOyMzSOsedxT0_DMKaYlntJE2DMxyZ2DzV0Zgn5X3kUEbX_6uerLpPJEJKNqrWnVjk66HeRfGrFT0RrW5Dt_tvuFlVWBdOLmufrq4aDhsoMyUq_Egfzf7tbCqjm0egU4t5jJC8JiqQASSk)

[** SIGN THE LETTER ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=980c054aec85407d9938db8df0f8e60d&_e=UlUNV9cn0DBqrh75xuTupAyUubaxYx49jbwWemrPixLqDZSWPMtA0cF46KjS2jGm8nOra4J3yK7GB5bWM2Uw1KpiLbiVpuZ9K6l_cb9xjxIT6NiJy4DO5xiOw5ElslFlzy0H7eDBm8GNuAP7uG1qb3kImheR4HewaRQShJzdXplylpeV4Nhi4tpXIJ4ARSS268Q0b_kFyneHTCoD9wtA0UsZ0YheMh1g3bNTTd6_wIuFNQ5QKuysRcGRKJAdXuffg5PVL1hmRCPvZC81B4N-3cMvfV2Hw2XDPqZbIxPDprAy62t-vO3_j3oDoCHXqyIdZpzcv47vO6pJz_rFwlue4YStaFCrzedhsvW7wmq1-V8bKiD5ZywmmdE3tMnDjjueuJV5dGqhrVq_rwJdeOew-YUJmC9WouHudZZwbn1jKxZyObV8GxvDSQLKn69J_Hje9I4dHby5ff_56YD9zPaThLRqx28AEiOXewDsezpS3tY-DMAgBl-lYoZ81OOouvZT9sMDILPNix6IXLAugJMjXVYC4aWDENGv0KEt_ye3FRIGFcGu_xrSzUmmaDWdEktJ)

Fellow American, this is the Democrat way - they want to give _**you**_ rules, while they’re free to party, eat out, and travel.

I’ve voted numerous times to help families struggling during the pandemic get the help that they need, but Democrats don’t care about your health anymore - they care about control.

It’s time to hold Democrats to the absurd rules they’ve created - especially the President. [**If you agree that the double standard must end, sign my letter immediately.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=980c054aec85407d9938db8df0f8e60d&_e=UlUNV9cn0DBqrh75xuTupAyUubaxYx49jbwWemrPixLqDZSWPMtA0cF46KjS2jGm8nOra4J3yK7GB5bWM2Uw1KpiLbiVpuZ9K6l_cb9xjxIT6NiJy4DO5xiOw5ElslFlzy0H7eDBm8GNuAP7uG1qb3kImheR4HewaRQShJzdXplylpeV4Nhi4tpXIJ4ARSS268Q0b_kFyneHTCoD9wtA0UsZ0YheMh1g3bNTTd6_wIuFNQ5QKuysRcGRKJAdXuffg5PVL1hmRCPvZC81B4N-3cMvfV2Hw2XDPqZbIxPDprAy62t-vO3_j3oDoCHXqyIdZpzcv47vO6pJz_rFwlue4YStaFCrzedhsvW7wmq1-V9dzXCdgjrasWasGR7buW0Dfp3SC38RWoJInBdVJ-LWI6KrcmJi2GbBlHOQrrFnTCkmu4J_Ph4y-m139ML5vVQnPySRRj8gRw6Mn4tx1vsTWodCudZi6LFPimUEm-1p5rdr5xFhePgzLDt4aS-f85mNkuP8lKq6q-0gnbPGFztU_0rDBSDHp8eHUkpDSAhHIX5SeFnIQe0xVTOwxsPS29ug)

[** SIGN THE LETTER ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=980c054aec85407d9938db8df0f8e60d&_e=UlUNV9cn0DBqrh75xuTupAyUubaxYx49jbwWemrPixLqDZSWPMtA0cF46KjS2jGm8nOra4J3yK7GB5bWM2Uw1KpiLbiVpuZ9K6l_cb9xjxIT6NiJy4DO5xiOw5ElslFlzy0H7eDBm8GNuAP7uG1qb3kImheR4HewaRQShJzdXplylpeV4Nhi4tpXIJ4ARSS268Q0b_kFyneHTCoD9wtA0UsZ0YheMh1g3bNTTd6_wIuFNQ5QKuysRcGRKJAdXuffg5PVL1hmRCPvZC81B4N-3cMvfV2Hw2XDPqZbIxPDprAy62t-vO3_j3oDoCHXqyIdZpzcv47vO6pJz_rFwlue4YStaFCrzedhsvW7wmq1-V-BzvXNkOvY4ThzNmMbEAyEj3AtKWlsYzp31XkzAe1G3YJq16zu2sa4BQG9Gs8msGWtnrelrg9_aQMfSl5-h0J4g0KYxy1x6hY9do0NmFG2PgWAk4m7t1DEqAr0ZAOKK5ptwBFeo9jNfLi8GElOmxOrqjU8LcMq_dxQuWgXkP73Tou8ewafVcS6Gq8Grg2CPAv9yFC3VM_WQTs1RqMIcFES)

Please don’t delay your response, it’s time for Democrats to start following their own rules!

For the future of America,
Andy Barr

| **MEET ANDY**
* * *
Andy Barr ran for Congress for a cause - to save America from bankruptcy, restore the American Dream and keep the American people safe and secure. Andy has never stopped fighting for these principles. Now more than ever, it is critical for central and eastern Kentuckians to have a strong, proven, and accountable leader representing them in Congress.

Now more than ever, it is critical for central and eastern Kentuckians to have a strong, proven, and accountable leader representing them in Congress. | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Andy Barr for Congress Christopher E. Anderson, C.P.A., Treasurer** Mailing Address: P.O. Box 2059 Lexington, KY 40588

name: National Republican Polling
subject: Future generations are counting on your response
body:
Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY T
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from National Republican Polling is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zj3q23ejqsbjor4pvv9ho7vk5tnjo2hba35mdl88_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cdge0o71clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s [**RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zq85cm3iufobsao84hvqos3sglh0ctqf44smcl2g_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cdge0o71clh2bs) My name is Bill Gray, and I’m the associate vice president of national donor outreach at Hillsdale College. It’s my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. **I don’t use the word “battle” lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt.** It’s clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation—a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called “progressives” seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. _The New York Times’_ recent “1619 Project” is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation’s history. If you haven’t heard, the “1619 Project” places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that “all men are created equal” and endowed by God with “unalienable rights.” **“Our democracy’s founding ideals,” the “1619 Project” proclaims, “were false when they were written.”** Outrageous! _The New York Times’_ stated goal with the “1619 Project” is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery—not freedom—is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayist just won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the “1619 Project” into a feature film. **Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans—and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas.** Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our** _most urgent priority._** Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. **We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective.** Hillsdale is America’s most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism—our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to new efforts such as the media-driven “1619 Project” that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work—especially in 2020. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the **RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. **As _The New York Times’_ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. ** _Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible._ And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale’s work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale’s multiple educational programs—which I will outline fo**r you shortly—it has been determined that to fully implement this[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zbidfffra3jc0r1es4pum4gq1e1e69duuo7hlg7o_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cdge0o71clh2bs)** for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700 within the next month. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale’s educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding—even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That’s so important, I need to say it again—Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! **In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College’s educational mission.** Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty—as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can—gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people—including our nation’s youth—with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z47ogk2012b4b8cdcrshma3j6fviqo4sm48s4998_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cdge0o71clh2bs)** And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale’s proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale’s plan for your review and feedback: **BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans** I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong—such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. **Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they’re needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people.** You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale’s confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I’m counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! **BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America’s Schools** In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale’s proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America’s history and founding principles—AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake—Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus—they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses _free of charge_ , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous—over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project.” This free course is called **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** and presents an unbiased and complete account of America’s past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called _Imprimis_ , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. _Imprimis_ is America’s most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the _Wall Street Journal_ or the “fake news” _New York Times_. Issues covering topics such as “Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History” and “Shall We Defend our Common History?” set _Imprimis_ apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you’re not yet an _Imprimis_ subscriber, we’ll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) **BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools** In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation’s history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. **Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year.** Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. **The response has been astounding.** We’ve now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale’s educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education—education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z3u2bk6nm2vq2mkbvl3akuoqk861aid3e25f6sfg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cdge0o71clh2bs)**
With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans—views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left’s agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU—your thoughtful input on the work we’re doing, and your generous support to expand our work. **So please complete the[Battle Plan Survey](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zbccoshq2bliq2hvf9ar3g4s0bvfi82oi9l1t3ho_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cdge0o71clh2bs) today.**
When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives’ attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Assoc. Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S**. We are in a battle for the future of America, because the Left is determined to transform our country ... by fundamentally changing how history is taught to young people. Education is the battlefield, and Hillsdale College urgently needs you standing with us to support and sustain our efforts. With your help, we can continue to reach and teach millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the Constitution. Please complete **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zpq2u6j05gauqip8eahbm5v8slhs4o95halqm9p8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cdge0o71clh2bs)** to shape Hillsdale College’s defense of America against the progressive assault on history. Your response is needed within five days so we can finalize plans to expand our educational outreach on behalf of liberty.
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for National Republican Polling, [please use this preferences page](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/prefs/9z2zj875mu1v7lgao1n5v15l0onsfob5h6u1omq1vi0).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z451m5phaoucikun95vrrmih8q7ni066q9v0o5n0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6c5hm1o30s5im49fg)

Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus—they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses free of charge , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous—over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters The New York Times’ “1619 Project.” This free course is called “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope” and presents an unbiased and complete account of America’s past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called Imprimis , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. Imprimis is America’s most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the Wall Street Journal or the “fake news” New York Times. Issues covering topics such as “Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History” and “Shall We Defend our Common History?” set Imprimis apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you’re not yet an Imprimis subscriber, we’ll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation’s history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year. Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. The response has been astounding. We’ve now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale’s educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education—education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans—views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left’s agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU—your thoughtful input on the work we’re doing, and your generous support to expand our work. So please complete the today. When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives’ attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards, Bill Gray Assoc. Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. We are in a battle for the future of America, because the Left is determined to transform our country ... by fundamentally changing how history is taught to young people. Education is the battlefield, and Hillsdale College urgently needs you standing with us to support and sustain our efforts. With your help, we can continue to reach and teach millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the Constitution. Please complete to shape Hillsdale College’s defense of America against the progressive assault on history. Your response is needed within five days so we can finalize plans to expand our educational outreach on behalf of liberty. If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for National Republican Polling, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Kellyanne Conway
subject: This email contains the truth
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BILLY LONG FOR SENATE
body:
The increasingly radical Democrats will stop at nothing to force their socialist agenda on America, which is why they are directing all their resources towards breaking the 50-50 Senate tie and increasing their power in Washington. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8845%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=MieSRFzdhtu5P%2f8uXP7G%2fA&sysid=1)
|
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16544%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UcXEcXyNcxv7EF3gOGIstw&sysid=1)

---
Fellow Conservative,

You and I have fought together for freedom for years now. **The increasingly radical Democrats will stop at nothing to force their socialist agenda on America,** which is why they are directing all their resources towards breaking the 50-50 Senate tie and increasing their power in Washington.

_Their top target?_ Missouri’s soon-to-be vacated U.S. Senate seat currently held by a Republican. America, and Missouri, literally cannot afford for the Democrats to come in and take this seat. **We must band together and support a rock-solid conservative who is prepared for the job - Missouri’s own, Congressman Billy Long.**

[**I’ve already joined Billy on the campaign trail, and plan to continue, but need grassroots conservatives like you to join us.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16655%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HAjWXLFbnILzRQ1%2bELYsSQ&sysid=1)

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16544%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UcXEcXyNcxv7EF3gOGIstw&sysid=1)
Your support is vital to not only Billy Long, but the Republican Party in what’s set to be one of the _TOUGHEST_ Senate races in the country. [**Will you join me by chipping in $10 or more right now to Billy Long for Senate?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16656%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7lYq%2bg%2b16PuFLa5zPmDSmw&sysid=1)

[** SUPPORT BILLY LONG NOW ➞ **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16657%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ScyfUVb0aDFZ1mKMAdEDEg&sysid=1)
From day one in Washington, **Billy fought to implement the America First Agenda by standing up to Communist China and encouraging American companies to expand right here in the United States.** He has cut taxes and regulations, and helped small businesses thrive. Billy is a friend to the unborn, our military veterans and law enforcement. **His loyalty to the American people has never wavered.**

_I’m writing to tell you this:_ **If we put Billy Long in the U.S. Senate, we won’t have to worry about him giving into the swamp.** His vote will be for you. What you see is what you get. He’s been in Washington for 10 years, **but he’s never been of Washington.**

He’s not just talking the talk, like the power-hungry Democrats do. Billy passed legislation to release Missourian workers from unnecessary government regulations, improving their economic situation and quality of life.

_Sounds like the opposite of what the radical-Democrats are doing in Washington, right?_ **Because unlike Joe Biden, Kamala Harris or Chuck Schumer, Billy understands that Americans should ALWAYS come first.** That’s the type of Republican we need fighting for us, Fellow Conservative.

This race is going to be competitive and it will certainly be one of the most expensive battles we see this cycle. [**The only way we’re going to be able to keep Missouri in Republican hands is if conservatives like you join our team right now.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16658%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qy5py2XAm9hKB%2b2j4bqj%2fQ&sysid=1)

[** SUPPORT BILLY LONG NOW ➞ **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16657%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ScyfUVb0aDFZ1mKMAdEDEg&sysid=1)
Even President Trump is confident that we can and will take back the Senate, but that plan becomes increasingly difficult if the Democrats swoop in and buy and lie their way into one of our red-state seats. **Let me tell you, Democrats already have their eyes and pocketbooks set on Missouri.**

They aren’t wasting any time using big corporations and dark-money donors to pad their campaign accounts. [**Fellow Conservative, that’s why I am counting on you to step up immediately, asking that you give generously to ensure my friend Billy Long has the resources he needs to keep Missouri RED for the Republican Party.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16659%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fECC2XKM4Yq0tY1ary0Nsg&sysid=1)

Thank you,

Kellyanne Conway
Former Counselor to President Donald J. Trump

[** SUPPORT BILLY LONG NOW ➞ **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16657%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ScyfUVb0aDFZ1mKMAdEDEg&sysid=1)

| | PAID FOR BY BILLY LONG FOR SENATE
---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8845%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=MieSRFzdhtu5P%2f8uXP7G%2fA&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8845%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=MieSRFzdhtu5P%2f8uXP7G%2fA&sysid=1)

name: Alexandra Rojas (via JusticeDemocrats.com)
subject: Today’s announcement
body:
Summer Lee is running for Congress to represent every community in her district, because for too long, leadership has left them behind.
#
Peter, did you see the news?
**We just went from 4 endorsed primary candidates to 5. Summer Lee is running for Congress in PA-18 and has our Day 1 endorsement.**
[](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/78841?refcode=em20211019-20091&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=20091%2E1203867%2ESFNJWk)
**[Chip in directly to Summer Lee’s campaign on Day 1>>](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/78841?refcode=em20211019-20091&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=20091%2E1203867%2ESFNJWk)**
Summer joins Odessa Kelly, Jessica Cisneros, Kina Collins, and Rana Abdelhamid on our 2022 slate of primary candidates. Summer is ready to fight for Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, an end to student debt, overdue solutions to fix the unjust criminal legal system, and much more.
She’s been representing the people of Southwestern Pennsylvania in the state legislature, after defeating a political dynasty in 2018. We know something about overcoming the odds to shake things up in our government. It’s one of the reasons Summer is Justice Democrats-endorsed on Day 1 of her campaign.
**[We set a goal to raise $50,000 for Summer’s campaign in the first 24 hours of her launch this morning. Will you donate $3 right now directly to Summer’s campaign to help us reach our goal? Every dollar will help Summer jumpstart her campaign!](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/78841?refcode=em20211019-20091&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=20091%2E1203867%2ESFNJWk)**
**[Contribute](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/78841?refcode=em20211019-20091&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=20091%2E1203867%2ESFNJWk)**
Born and raised in North Braddock, PA, Summer saw how the deck was stacked against her community — from the ever-present racism to some of the worst air quality in the country. Her advocacy to end fracking, fix the unjust criminal legal system, fight police violence, and end America’s reliance on fossil fuels is deeply personal.
She’s already a tireless advocate for the people of Southwestern Pennsylvania. Now she’s ready to bring our collective fight to Congress. To win this race, she’ll need a ton of grassroots support. That means strong fundraising right from the start, Peter.
**[Can you help Summer’s campaign start strong with a donation right now? Every dollar shows the political establishment and reporters that we have a serious candidate ready to win a seat in Congress.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/78841?refcode=em20211019-20091&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=20091%2E1203867%2ESFNJWk)**
Thank you for whatever support you can give,
Alexandra Rojas
Executive Director
Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=25&akid=20091%2E1203867%2ESFNJWk) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. clean_body: Summer Lee is running for Congress to represent every community in her district, because for too long, leadership has left them behind. Peter, did you see the news? We just went from 4 endorsed primary candidates to 5. Summer Lee is running for Congress in PA-18 and has our Day 1 endorsement. Summer joins Odessa Kelly, Jessica Cisneros, Kina Collins, and Rana Abdelhamid on our 2022 slate of primary candidates. Summer is ready to fight for Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, an end to student debt, overdue solutions to fix the unjust criminal legal system, and much more. She’s been representing the people of Southwestern Pennsylvania in the state legislature, after defeating a political dynasty in 2018. We know something about overcoming the odds to shake things up in our government. It’s one of the reasons Summer is Justice Democrats-endorsed on Day 1 of her campaign. Born and raised in North Braddock, PA, Summer saw how the deck was stacked against her community — from the ever-present racism to some of the worst air quality in the country. Her advocacy to end fracking, fix the unjust criminal legal system, fight police violence, and end America’s reliance on fossil fuels is deeply personal. She’s already a tireless advocate for the people of Southwestern Pennsylvania. Now she’s ready to bring our collective fight to Congress. To win this race, she’ll need a ton of grassroots support. That means strong fundraising right from the start, Peter. Thank you for whatever support you can give, Alexandra Rojas Executive Director Justice Democrats Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. name: Adam Schiff
subject: All eyes are on Virginia in these final days
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Hey Derek, What happens in Virginia’s gubernatorial election in just a few weeks will have major implications for the midterms next year and elections for years to come. In a moment, I’m going to ask you to make a critical $10 donation to help Terry McAuliffe keep Virginia blue in just a few weeks. But first, I want to tell you why. Right now, Democratic Governors are often the last line of defense for our Democracy. As you’re well aware, Republicans are looking to rip away voting rights – with voter suppression bills sitting in nearly every statehouse across the country. In 27 of those states, especially while the Senate has no courage to act, we will likely see these craven voter suppression bills signed into law. Why? Because Republicans control the Governor mansions in those 27 states, while Democrats only inhabit 23. We need to protect every last Democratic governor across the country. And then we need to elect more. I realize protecting our razor-thin majorities in Congress is a tall task as is – but protecting Democratic governors, especially right now, is also critically important. **Our most urgent focus for the next two weeks must be ensuring Terry McAuliffe wins in Virginia. It’s imperative we keep Virginia blue.** Terry’s Trump-endorsed Republican opponent is Glenn Youngkin. He’s proud of the former president's unequivocal support and his supporters even brought a flag flown at the January 6th insurrection to a GOTV rally on his behalf. If he were to win, it would be a disaster for Virginia and the country. Period. Full stop. **So, right now I’m asking for your help. We need to protect Terry and ensure he wins. clean_body: | Hey Derek, What happens in Virginia’s gubernatorial election in just a few weeks will have major implications for the midterms next year and elections for years to come. In a moment, I’m going to ask you to make a critical $10 donation to help Terry McAuliffe keep Virginia blue in just a few weeks. But first, I want to tell you why. Right now, Democratic Governors are often the last line of defense for our Democracy. As you’re well aware, Republicans are looking to rip away voting rights – with voter suppression bills sitting in nearly every statehouse across the country. In 27 of those states, especially while the Senate has no courage to act, we will likely see these craven voter suppression bills signed into law. Why? Because Republicans control the Governor mansions in those 27 states, while Democrats only inhabit 23. We need to protect every last Democratic governor across the country. And then we need to elect more. I realize protecting our razor-thin majorities in Congress is a tall task as is – but protecting Democratic governors, especially right now, is also critically important. Our most urgent focus for the next two weeks must be ensuring Terry McAuliffe wins in Virginia. It’s imperative we keep Virginia blue. Terry’s Trump-endorsed Republican opponent is Glenn Youngkin. He’s proud of the former president's unequivocal support and his supporters even brought a flag flown at the January 6th insurrection to a GOTV rally on his behalf. If he were to win, it would be a disaster for Virginia and the country. Period. Full stop. So, right now I’m asking for your help. We need to protect Terry and ensure he wins. Will you rush a $10 donation before midnight tonight to our campaigns? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for being part of this team, and doing so much good for Democrats across the country. Your support is so critical and I can’t thank you enough. — Adam Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress Schiff for Congress 150 E. Olive Ave. Suite 208 Burbank, CA 91502 United States

name: CharlesBooker.org
subject: Everyone’s talking about our campaign right now, Peter. 👀
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Everyone’s talking about our campaign right now,
Peter. 👀

Take a look at this article that talks about the strength of our historic,
people-powered movement. 💪

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11503?refcode=em20211019-1072&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=1072%2E346206%2EZ94pDm ][IMG][ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11503?refcode=em20211019-1072&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1072%2E346206%2EZ94pDm ][IMG]
"The standout numbers weren’t just limited to the South. In Kentucky,
Charles Booker, a former state legislator fresh off a 2020 Senate
Democratic primary defeat in which he was financially outgunned, raised
$1.7 million."

This is exactly the kind of grassroots energy we need to build a winning
people-powered movement. But this also means we can’t slow down: We must
continue growing this momentum if we want to compete with Rand Paul’s war
chest of dark money.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11503?refcode=em20211019-1072&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1072%2E346206%2EZ94pDm ]That’s why it’s critical we reach our $75,000 mid-month fundraising
goal tonight. We’re just a little bit short — but if you and a handful of
other supporters chip in — we can make it in time. Will you give $20.17
(our average donation) or whatever you can afford right now?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11503?refcode=em20211019-1072&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=1072%2E346206%2EZ94pDm ]Contribute $20.17

What’s even more powerful is that 98% of our contributions come from
everyday people giving small-dollar donations. In contrast, 75% of Rand
Paul’s money comes from Wall Street and corporate donors.

It’s clear that Kentuckians are excited to see the change that Charles is
leading. Together, we have the power to turn Kentucky blue and expand our
Senate majority to ensure we can finally pass the bold, progressive
policies working families need.

But excitement isn’t enough,
Peter. It’s going to be an
uphill battle to run a massive, state-wide organizing program and make
sure we reach voters from the hood to the holler so we can defeat Rand
Paul.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11503?refcode=em20211019-1072&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=1072%2E346206%2EZ94pDm ]Reaching our mid-month goal tonight is critical so we can raise the
funds our organizers need to execute these plans. Please donate $20.17 or
anything you can so that our team can continue growing this movement.

Let’s do this,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211019-1072-footer&t=1025&refcode2=1072_346206_Z94pDm&akid=1072%2E346206%2EZ94pDm

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1072%2E346206%2EZ94pDm

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

subject: Amanda is the true conservative pick for FL-13!
body:
Representative Jake Ellzey has officially endorsed Florida’s very own Amanda Makki. |
---
| | [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=5c627ac760&e=c2296cffff)
---
| | Dear Friend, More good news for the conservative movement here in Florida and our campaign to flip the 13th District! Congressman Jake Ellzey, the newest Republican member of Congress, has officially endorsed Florida’s very own Amanda Makki. Before serving as Texas’ representative, Jake spent over 20 years in the United States Navy and is a proud champion for our conservative values. Here’s what Congressman Ellzey had to say: **_“I’m proud to endorse Amanda and know that she will be a rock-solid conservative in Congress who will work to secure our border, protect our rights, and stand strong against the radical Biden/Pelosi agenda.”_** ****
---
| [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=6d14494a7d&e=c2296cffff)
---
| Amanda has - and always will - stand for our conservative values, unlike her opponents. Republicans across our district know that, which is why Amanda is also leading the fundraising race among Republicans!
---
| [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=456b33996a&e=c2296cffff)
---

name: Drew Godinich
subject: Building Team Nikki
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

I’m Drew, Nikki’s new Communications Director. I wanted to take a moment to introduce myself and tell you what’s new with Team Nikki.

This week, we welcomed three new staff members, all of whom you’ll be hearing from over the next few days. We also announced our ten-member Latin America and Caribbean Advisory Council.

Friends, we’re building the robust organization we’ll need to defeat Ron DeSantis and bring something new to Tallahassee. Can you click here to chip in and help us continue growing our campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-oct-21?refcode=1019drew]

Make no mistake: winning next year won’t be easy. But as the only Democrat to win statewide since 2012, Nikki knows how to do this.

We’re gearing up to reach voters in every corner of Florida, from Little Havana to Pensacola and everywhere in between. But friends, we need your help to continue staffing up, connecting with voters, and reaching people across our state.

That’s why I’m asking for your help today. If you’re all in on our strategy and all in for something new, click here to chip in now and help us build our winning movement. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-oct-21?refcode=1019drew]

Thanks!
Drew Godinich
Communications Director

They're giving him the cufflinks and the plaque — and they are expunging his record of any mention of that firing unpleasantness. Just for good measure, the FBI — that would mean you, the taxpayer — is also paying McCabe's lawyers $539,000 in fees. The meeting included Rosenstein, Deputy Assistant AG for Intelligence Tashina Gauhar and Principal Associate Deputy Attorney General Jim Crowell in Rosenstein’s Justice Department office. [13x13x1] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56914&L=15574&F=T&] READ MORE [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56914&L=15574&F=T&] [180x150x2] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56914&L=15554&F=T&] 2017-11-21 New FBI Records Show FBI Leadership’s Conflicts of Interest Discussions on Clinton Email Investigation [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56914&L=15554&F=T&] Source: Judicial Watch [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56914&L=15554&F=T&] Judicial Watch released 79 pages of Justice Department documents concerning ethics issues related to FBI Deputy Director Andrew McCabe’s involvement with his wife’s political campaign. The documents include an email showing Mrs. McCabe was recruited for a Virginia state senate race in February 2015 by then-Virginia Lieutenant Governor Ralph Northam’s office. The IG report released today portrays McCabe as a serial liar. When regular people lie to the FBI, they get slapped with felony charges. **Everything is at stake in this election, and your vote can make all the difference** between a Virginia led by fear, hate, and prejudice OR a Virginia where we value our democracy, our reproductive freedoms, our workers’ rights and more.

I started Virginia for Everyone to empower Virginians to political action -- because our democracy doesn’t work when we don’t use our voices.

We’re rolling up our sleeves, putting in the work, and reaching every single one of our neighbors to make sure they vote in this election.

Democrats have a real shot at keeping control of the House of Delegates and State Senate, while also holding the Governorship... _but only if you vote!_

[**To accomplish a just future, we need every single voter to turn out, Peter: and it starts with you. We need 5,000 Virginians to pledge to vote in this election. Hi Peter, Mark here.

As always, I’m so grateful to have the support of this incredible online community.

**That’s why I’ve had my team set up a special survey for some of my top grassroot supporters:** I want to know what you think about my platform and what issues you think I should tackle first in Congress.

[**Peter -- with just a few months left in the year, I would love to get your input. I need 500 responses to get a full picture, so can you take this survey right now? It will only take a minute! »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37709103/312312921/-1601395042?refcode=MTFC_20211019_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODI1MDdkOC0zMDMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lEcqRxEpYmzOdWlinUe7bBcfVYN23_rGtKfq-MSa7ZI=&emci=595274b7-0231-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=c82507d8-3031-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=18839602) | [TAKE THE SHORT SURVEY »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37709104/312312922/-1601395042?refcode=MTFC_20211019_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODI1MDdkOC0zMDMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lEcqRxEpYmzOdWlinUe7bBcfVYN23_rGtKfq-MSa7ZI=&emci=595274b7-0231-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=c82507d8-3031-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=18839602)

Many pundits think us Democrats will lose our majorities in Congress in 2022. And while we’re fighting to defy the pundits and keep our majorities safe from MAGA extremists, we have to face reality.

_**We may only have a year or less to take advantage of our majorities in Congress and work with President Biden to pass significant progressive legislation.**_

But with so many issues plaguing our nation -- from COVID-19 to climate change, racial injustice, LGBTQ+ inequality and more -- I wanted to ask YOU what you think we should focus on first.

[**Time is running out to enact our progressive agenda! So, Peter, can you take my survey NOW and help me figure out what to fight for in Congress? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37709105/312312923/-1601395042?refcode=MTFC_20211019_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODI1MDdkOC0zMDMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lEcqRxEpYmzOdWlinUe7bBcfVYN23_rGtKfq-MSa7ZI=&emci=595274b7-0231-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=c82507d8-3031-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=18839602)

name: American Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8848%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=YMYsfIMxLJ9UXgEidy40hA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16651%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zu4SfTnCs7sfjrkIKttCvg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16652%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=49J%2fny4xwNSOWG0bFyLh0A&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16652%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=49J%2fny4xwNSOWG0bFyLh0A&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8848%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=YMYsfIMxLJ9UXgEidy40hA&sysid=1)_

body:
Let’s Talk About Protecting Your Rights

|
* * *
---
Friends,

It's Ted's wife, Amy Kate, reaching out today about something very important: Our Second Amendment rights. Every day we are getting closer to them being squashed. Democrats do not care about protecting our sacred freedoms!

**Now usually you would expect to hear from Ted about this,_but it is just as important to me!_** Having the ability to protect myself and my family is something I do not take lightly, and neither should you.

**Funny story: All my friends call me "AK." So, what do you think Ted bought me for my 47th birthday? An AK‐47 of course!**

_I believe that it is the right of every American to defend themselves and their family. I know Ted agrees with me ‐**and I bet you do too!**_

**Will you stand with Ted and me in protecting the rights and freedoms of every American?**

clean_body: Let’s Talk About Protecting Your Rights | Friends, It's Ted's wife, Amy Kate, reaching out today about something very important: Our Second Amendment rights. Every day we are getting closer to them being squashed. Democrats do not care about protecting our sacred freedoms! Now usually you would expect to hear from Ted about this,but it is just as important to me! Having the ability to protect myself and my family is something I do not take lightly, and neither should you. Funny story: All my friends call me "AK." So, what do you think Ted bought me for my 47th birthday? An AK‐47 of course! I believe that it is the right of every American to defend themselves and their family. I know Ted agrees with me ‐and I bet you do too! Will you stand with Ted and me in protecting the rights and freedoms of every American? | This cannot wait. Act now to make a difference and protect our rights! God Bless, Amy Kate Budd Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright © 2021 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

Flipping this district is the ONLY way we’ll be able to do it, and we need your help raising enough funds to make it happen. If you think prices are high now, you’ll never believe how unbelievable they’ll be if Dems are in control for another couple of years! If you want to make life more affordable for everyday Americans, we need your support in the fight to flip the House. Thank you, Team Earls | | | Paid for by Earls for Georgia | | 824 S Milledge Ave Ste 101, Athens, GA 30605 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: I agree: Audit Pima
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Trump is right |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=bc3fa60705&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
My name is Mark Finchem. I am the Election Integrity Conservative leading the charge in Arizona. And today I’m writing you with an important update.
President Trump just released a statement about the terrible fraud in Pima County!

**This is what he said...**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a767c6cd0c&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=eb890fb401&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d2ee18e067&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **The findings that President Trump mentions in this statement are the very findings I was talking about at his Des Moines, Iowa rally!**

One of the key statistics that the President Trump brings up is that he was winning in the middle of the night in Pima up until the truckloads of mail-in votes started showing up.

_And the mail-in votes caused a REVERSAL in the trend proportional exactly to how many mail-in votes that there were. And this only happened in the middle of the night while most everyone was sleeping._

**But it gets worse than that. If we peel back the data, what we see is something that is mathematically IMPOSSIBLE!**
* **The first is that in Pima County, the total number of mail in ballots that were returned was over 100% of what was sent out.**
* **The second is that there were multiple other precincts that had return rates in the high 90’s, when the average was in the 70’s nationwide. Statistical outliers like these are just as much an indicator of fraud as having more ballots returned than sent out to begin with!**

Additionally, the President cites evidence from the Maricopa Audit which I helped lead which absolutely proves that the election should be decertified:
* 6,545 ballots with no envelopes
* 2,580 bad signatures
* 1,919 mail-in ballots without signatures.

**_This is more than the margin of Biden’s so-called “victory!”_**

This is why we need to do two things:

_The first is to Audit Pima County. There is clear evidence of fraud and we cannot let the thieving Democrats get away with this._

_The second is to decertify Arizona’s election and recall the electors. There is sufficient evidence to do so._
[_Will you help me push for the Pima Audit and decertification of Arizona with a donation today?_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=8ce3f397d0&e=44b8c466b0)
**Make no mistake, there has been substantial progress that has been made in Arizona while I have been leading the Election Integrity movement!**
* **We have demonstrated and proved that there has been substantial election fraud in Maricopa County**
* **We have found statistically accurate results that show that President Trump actually won the election.**
* **Attorney General Mark Brnovich has just recently began to investigate the Maricopa Case, in particular those who fraudulently deleted election files.**
* **We have now gathered tens of thousands of signatures to Audit Pima County**
* **I am meeting with Election Integrity Patriots and Experts from around the country to help them push for audits in their state.**
* **I have worked with third party firms to develop currency-level authentication processes with ballots – a technological innovation that simply has not been seen and we can apply to our elections here in America!**

[_This is a tremendous amount of progress, and none of it happens without your continued support!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=94fa1cb5ae&e=44b8c466b0)

_I have accomplished every single one of these things with your help. And now I am pushing to Audit Pima and Decertify Arizona. [Will you help me take the next step for America with a donation today?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=c292226820&e=44b8c466b0)_
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=82d5e62a03&e=44b8c466b0)
God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=fdcd1a9838&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. I am trying to Audit Pima County. If you support my efforts, [please contribute whatever you can by the end of this month](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=0f595937d7&e=44b8c466b0).

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE

| |
---

Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=484fffb851) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=484fffb851).

\- Ted

Certainly, he deserves our most heartfelt gratitude for jumpstarting the economy, taking on the #fakenews, and refusing to bend under the attacks from the Democrats. But we're in a difficult situation now, and we need to know where YOU stand: Do you want Trump to run for President in 2024? If so, telling him that you want him to run. While liberals are all rooting for him to end up in jail -- if you are ready, then personally tell Trump you want him to be our President again and that we're counting on him to defeat Joe Biden in 2024! Thank you and God Bless, \- Ted Chairman, Committee to Defeat the President (aka StopJoe.com) StopJoe.com // ABOUT THE RED WAVE FUND** Our future is hanging by a thread, and Democrats are preparing to give it everything they've got in order to break past their 50+1 majority in the Senate. So if we lose just ONE Senate seat next year, Joe Biden's expanded Majority will be very powerful. Democrats will be able to pass their dream slate of far-left garbage...and it's game OVER for the America First Agenda. That's why we're launching an emergency campaign to retake the Senate and flip the House (more on that to come)... but first, we MUST secure 100,000 contributions this month if we're going to get it off the ground. The Committee to Defeat the President (StopJoe.com) is a grassroots-funded effort dedicated to stopping Joe Biden and (as they would say) "resisting" the Democrat Party's radical socialist agenda. We know that emails are a crucial way for us to stay in touch with supporters like you...so we sent this alert to you at your gmail.com email account, but if you're ready to throw in the towel: . If your email address ending in @gmail.com is no longer the best place for us to reach you, please Our movement is driven and accountable to supporters like you. Your grassroots support is critical to helping us defeat Joe. If you'd like to contribute, . Thank you - and God bless you - for your support!

name: Election Updates (Via House GOP)
subject: Virginia is for the taking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
| | | We have the momentum.

We have the grassroots support.

We have it in the bag.
**Say it with us: Virginia is OURS for the taking.**
Virginia slipped right out of our hands just like Georgia did - but it's not over until it's over. All eyes are on this **blue **state that we're about to flip back to **red**.

If we can win in Virginia, it will be a massive win for our party. Pollsters, pundits, and the Liberal Media are eager to see what happens because they know it will foreshadow what's to come...

**The opportunity to take back the House and the Senate.** Congress BACK in Republican hands where we can advance a common sense conservative agenda.
EXPRESS DONATE:
---
| | | [SAVE VIRGINIA VICTORY FUND](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58568603:JydC9D2Np:m:1:3253819041:5445934F06C1EDB78961666CB76115AE:r "Generic Button")
---
House allies need this boost from a Virginia victory to make a grand slam in the midterms. If we win in Virginia - we can win back red districts that the Democrats flipped and add more Republicans to the House.

Pollsters and pundits will use this as a sign of what's to come - **if we fail Virginia, we will fail the rest of the country. **

**The future of the Republican agenda rests on this state._Can we count on you to hold the line at this pivotal moment?_**

$20")**
We can't let the Democrats win again. They came for Georgia. They came for Texas. And now they're coming for Virginia. **They 're even bringing in the big guns - Barack Obama, Jill Biden, and Stacey Abrams are all going to Virginia to surge the hopes of the liberal establishment. **
They're nervous and they know it's a tossup race. If we can garner enough support, we can win. And if we can do that...

Anything is possible.

clean_body: She has her sights set on Texas’ brand-new congressional seat. | Friend, Our chances to flip the House have skyrocketed... U.S. Army Captain Wesley Hunt has enlisted in the fight to win Texas’ NEW 38th congressional district -- 1 of the 5 seats needed to END Pelosi’s majority. With so much riding on this one new seat, I promised Wesley I would reach out to every grassroots patriot in our records to ensure he hit his October fundraising goal. As Republican Whip, I can assure you that hitting our benchmarks at the end-of-month fundraising deadline is absolutely critical. For Wesley’s race especially, we can’t afford to miss a single end-of-month goal. You see, Nancy Pelosi knows as well as I do that this race for Texas’ new seat will determine the fate of her radical majority -- and she also knows that as things stand, Wesley has her beat. That’s why she and her DCCC are gearing up to spend MILLIONS in Texas to try and torpedo all of Wesley’s recent momentum. So, can I count on YOU to stand with me and help ensure Wesley hits his October goal? Thank you, Steve Scalise House Republican Whip 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. body:
Yesterday, Donald Trump sued the January 6 select committee and the National Archives to block White House records related to the Capitol insurrection from being released. Trump is doing whatever it takes to cover up his role in the attack on our democracy and stop the committee from uncovering the truth. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37710252/312325272/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMwY2I4ZDJhLTNjMzEtZWMxMS05ODIwLWM4OTY2NTNiMjZjOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XwnSgustTab0Pov_m66PUk1tpyPFTqkn1K1tPFIZGKs=&emci=327d1229-f330-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=30cb8d2a-3c31-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=16335001) Two huge updates in the January 6 investigation, team.

**Yesterday, Donald Trump sued the January 6 select committee and the National Archives to block White House records related to the Capitol insurrection from being released.** Trump is doing whatever it takes to cover up his role in the attack on our democracy and stop the committee from uncovering the truth.

**And just now, the House select committee investigating January 6 voted to hold Steve Bannon in contempt of Congress for refusing to comply with their subpoena.**

The committee is sending a strong message that they won't let Trump and his allies get away with impeding their investigation and escaping accountability. Now, Congress will be voting on whether to refer the matter to the Justice Department.

Trump and his cronies must cooperate fully with the January 6 investigation in order for us to uncover the truth, and if they refuse, they must face the consequences. clean_body: The cost of living is too dmn high | | | | | | | | | Friend, Fewer than nine months into his term, President Joe Biden has created economic , border , and national security crises that have undermined America's strength at home and abroad. Driven by Democrat policies that incentivize eligible workers to stay out of the workforce, millions of Americans are forced to pay more for everything from gas to groceries. This situation simply can't continue, and the easiest way to stop it is to Take Back the House. Americans cannot afford more of the same Liberal policies that only increase our national debt while raising the costs of everyday goods. The Democrats are already planning to raise $2.1 TRILLION in taxes from working families and small businesses. God Bless, Fred Keller (Taking the values of PA's 12th District to Congress) Paid for by Fred Keller for Congress Our mailing address is:** 23 North Derr Drive, Suite 2 Lewisburg, PA 17837 Don't want to receive our emails anymore?

body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mihG2-M7AB3dkcwwbh_95NDH6hASCikPSqgAaKM1Oq0y0DCzNv7drn6gd_gTCnpqRpZGORHF3bDJZ4ozorhMkmsTfcn8oFXhKcFUjbcf2M3LHZ1nr2hWEoMeWuvxmCcd3aQ_BgMQSP5x_8HvMDSJe2RA1Sh3FhlupzAe2FFpPt6-7igfUGabfCRCabKwvq7iIsYZsGBdzpBSusK1FoJL4V2EL4f_73Z8J8ssVfsrJ_Q8KULDbX-5A-nPRrp8SBpGDsJXKeeOHgvRWm1pTMd5GqH8Pla1bXnyIveZHdFJ1gj42t87lSCeH9LZbVR_w0gG26F5RcIX9urKJybqPBluHt9l11W_f1DXXWGKJyY_oJbaE/3ga/WTywmBMRQ2aOZ7u2dWRabA/h0/ECu3ax9CTt8M0gDGUqGG_B-yuxES_1CWbFlixCWY18E)
My name is Marcus Flowers and I am an Army veteran running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore civility and common sense to our political discourse.

As someone who spent a decade of my life serving in war zones, I’m sick of seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene and the other leaders of the alt-right hijack the phrase "patriotism" to serve their own vile beliefs. I know patriotism -- and the reality is they’re the farthest thing from it.

**Through my work serving overseas on four continents, I’ve seen firsthand the damage done by radicalism, extremism, disinformation, lawlessness, and propaganda -- and after seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene bring her conspiracy theories and hatred to my home district? I knew I had to get in the race.**

**[I’m asking you to split a donation between my campaign and Common Good VA so we can stop the alt-right and Marjorie Taylor Greene:](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mihG2-M7AB3dkcwwbh_95NDH6hASCikPSqgAaKM1Oq0y0iAGbqiWoo3ObO67l6Q9upWDayTA7o8eWWd1HXJcR_8siFtItWSubuP5-iKK_KlHbeOQ_ECGDO6_ct1pEpax6rF9IGO3bbGaF5b3TXdBRfGboVd9T4UXPS3PAws7rcv5D5ntLL3uPuG_BoWUryUMLvdF1jw1w4MKpru7Mi7pB0nkEudSl465oD9dO0tAIq05AGiuYAJMia0AtXmQTO3RNkqlpmOwASm2gDfEaxf50LnztiFPrBx5lYnDrXxz6fmZ3dubSinM6c654DmEKR9IppkVTbWUpTJqYrYnDBn6TLFd9wyfS5jGW5L8jCspX3cUE/3ga/WTywmBMRQ2aOZ7u2dWRabA/h1/2l6PV5hhEJw0u8zgLZtqNXC3KFjN8fUjhuZhiGZhClc)** **[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mihG2-M7AB3dkcwwbh_95NDA3UhOSX1i2tHmGZO40_swQ5e6eunRN7cam_rCMJRlOJMjTz-fglJ_E39obB8Ca7I6T8IO6nZ8Dec02b-YmRFm8nKw7JHSAZk4WeQLu50wrsXk5WJCOjrg5xxNV3pyZs-yfypiwLpsoA9pfvi18T9paVGnX1dgwFXkHUoM1ispaC9hsLWlw7s702OBpByGE8BPM8JeAiWp__y2DYTzEHefOwlAgMudBvcJ9Cah4a2YGv1RoojulrzRBknpyOwIuQ2jI7pHSh1K0_jSDRvuPI8QMLa7yh4McoB51o1PJgZ6-42sjcrrWBC79eZxr9sUXqF5m9ZX6ZbCGu8E-xBmFZ7PRe6Hr8newbdtMKDP6FOO-L/3ga/WTywmBMRQ2aOZ7u2dWRabA/h2/ebyJGhNT2rnshoP0QxxYNN4x-iEwBbsZUbuql32cBaE)

name: Laura Loomer
subject: LOOMERED is out!
body:
My book, LOOMERED: How I Became The Most Banned Woman In The World, was officially released today!
| | | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/b7KuryP2or6g1UGF6Wu9wQ/ZFSekh8oaPw1A3J3763sebiw) | Patriot,

[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/674kxdFNLuusPGfP8M4f763g/ZFSekh8oaPw1A3J3763sebiw) My book, [_LOOMERED: How I Became The Most Banned Woman In The World_](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/674kxdFNLuusPGfP8M4f763g/ZFSekh8oaPw1A3J3763sebiw), was officially released today!

If you didn’t pre-order or get a copy of the signed version, I recommend you [**order from Barnes & Noble today**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/674kxdFNLuusPGfP8M4f763g/ZFSekh8oaPw1A3J3763sebiw) before they sell out.

You can also [**buy from Amazon**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/x3lO7vZrL3VefH7635N5SEFw/ZFSekh8oaPw1A3J3763sebiw), but they’re already playing games just as I expected.

I thought it was a little weird that I only had three reviews, and this morning, a friend sent me this screen shot:

While it says only people who purchased the book from Amazon can leave a review, that’s not even the case as my friend purchased the book and was still denied the ability to post a review!

However, Amazon has no problem allowing leftist trolls to comment and call me a Tranny even if they didn’t order my book. Crazy huh?

How ironic: I write a book about censorship and my supporters are censored from sharing their views.

It may be a bit of an inconvenience, but please [**order from Barnes & Noble**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/674kxdFNLuusPGfP8M4f763g/ZFSekh8oaPw1A3J3763sebiw) when you have a chance.

Also, if you happen to see my book on the shelves in your local book store, [**shoot me an email with a picture of it**](mailto:lauraloomer@loomered.com?subject=I%20saw%20your%20book). It’s great to see conservative authors out there!

Thanks so much!

Laura Loomer

P.S. If you already received my book, or you’re just not a reader, [**please support my work by donating here**.

---

720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

[View Web Version](https://libersend.loomered.com/w/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/jNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg/ZFSekh8oaPw1A3J3763sebiw)

Friend,

clean_body: As the Biden Border Crisis continues to surge, Laura Kelly is refusing requests from border states to send help that would keep our own state safe. Friend, As the Biden Border Crisis continues to surge, Laura Kelly is refusing requests from border states to send help that would keep our own state safe. In 2021 alone, our border patrol agents have seized enough fentanyl to kill every person in the United States. As Governor, you would have my full commitment to working with states like Texas and Arizona to stop trans-border crime and keep our communities safe from the increase in drugs and crime caused by Biden’s refusal to secure the border. Laura Kelly on the other hand won’t even acknowledge the crisis at the border. The Governors of Texas and Arizona have called on Laura Kelly to help them stop crime and drugs that cross the border - before they get to Kansas. She’s responded by calling the request “political games.” Protecting Kansas families is not “political games.” I’m counting on you, friend. Derek Schmidt | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | | ---|---|---

Donald J. Trump October 19th, 2021
The fake, highly partisan Unselect Committee continues to rock and roll. They were unable to make a deal with Kevin McCarthy to put real Republicans on the Committee, so they got stuck with low-polling warmonger Liz Cheney and Cryin’ Adam Kinzinger who have no idea what our Party stands for. Cheney is polling in the low 20’s in Wyoming, the State she doesn’t represent. This is just a continuation of the Witch Hunt which started with the now fully debunked and discredited Russia, Russia, Russia Scam, quickly reverting to a perfect phone call with Ukraine, Ukraine, Ukraine, Impeachment Hoax #1, Impeachment Hoax #2, and now this. The Unselect Committee is composed of absolute political hacks who want to destroy the Republican Party and are decimating America itself. I am the only thing in their way. MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!

Donald J. Trump October 19th, 2021
General Keith Kellogg has written a sweeping and powerful account of the Trump Presidency. He spent four years with me in the White House and in the 2016 Campaign for the Presidency. His narrative is factual and indisputable. Unlike other Fakers and Slimeballs that write fictional books without knowing me or virtually anything about me, The General knew me and my administration well, and he was there for every major National Security decision.
